raw_html:
About ReSource Pro

ReSource Pro is a global leader in insurance operations outsourcing, providing end-to-end solutions to leading insurance organizations across North America and the UK. Established in 2025, our Malaysia office serves as a premium client services and global account management hub, supporting advanced insurance operations, quality assurance, and operational excellence.

We are committed to helping our clients achieve greater efficiency while providing employees with long-term career growth and development opportunities.

 

About the Role…

We are seeking detail-oriented and proactive candidates for a permanent, full-time, non-voice, day-shift position based in Kuala Lumpur. In this role, you will provide end-to-end back-office operational support for US insurance clients, contributing to high standards of accuracy, efficiency, and service excellence in a global environment.

This is a back-office operations role supporting US insurance processes. Candidates will be assessed for Analyst, Specialist, or SME level based on relevant experience, expertise, and demonstrated capabilities.


What You Need To Be Successful...

  • Diploma or above;

  • Minimum 3 years of backend operations experience.

  • Hands-on experience in audit, QA, training or process improvement projects is required.

  • Insurance BPO industry working experience is highly preferred.

  • Excellent written and verbal English proficiency.

  • Outstanding communication and client service capabilities.

  • Quick learner with strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

  • Result-driven mindset, flexible and adaptable to shifting workloads and priorities.


In This Role, You Will Be...

1.Processing

• Independently understand client needs, operate client systems and perform complex insurance tasks without supervision to meet quality, quantity and time deadlines;

• Accurately maintain client records and policy documentation, ensuring that all essential documents and renewal information are promptly and precisely saved in the appropriate folders/system.

• Handle client’s new requests or changes, analyze the reasons behind these requirements or changes and provide clear thoughts and suggestions to assist Customer Service Representatives (CSR) in making informed decisions and next steps.

• Follow ReSource Pro’s Information Security policies/guidelines, as well as the client’s security requirements, policies, and practices that are provided to ReSource Pro and information security requirements.

2.Manage Customer Experience

• Responsible for routine communication in daily work. Able to independently solve common problems in the Renewal process and respond to clients promptly and accurately via email. Identify complex issues and seek support from team leader in a timely manner.

• Follow SOP to collect and record client information, including business conditions, changes, etc., and submit it to team leader.

• Analyze the data, generate and present the report to client.

3.Internal Operations

• Follow SOP to execute team internal operation activities to meet with data accuracy and time requirement. Timely report issues to team leaders.

• Assist with new task/office/program on-boarding.

• Update workflow and get client approval independently.

 

Compensation & Benefits

  • Salary: RM 4,000 – RM 6,000 per month, depending on experience and qualifications.

  • Statutory benefits: SOCSO/EIS/EPF

  • Annual Leave (as per company policy)

  • Sick Leave/Maternity & Paternity Leave

  • Paid Public Holidays

  • Structured onboarding training & continuous learning opportunities


Career Growth Opportunities

We believe in promoting talent based on performance and capability.

  • Career Path: Service Delivery Assistant → Service Delivery Analyst → Service Delivery Specialist → Senior Specialist / Team Lead→ Higher-level operational and management roles

  • This role is ideal for individuals seeking to build a long-term career in insurance operations, business process outsourcing (BPO), and client services.


Other

1. Working Hours: Monday – Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM（No Shift)

2. Office Location: A-5-1 & A-5-2, Level 5 of Hampshire Place Office 157, Hampshire 1, Jalan Mayang Sari 50450 Kuala Lumpur, Wilayah Persekutuan Kuala Lumpur Malaysia

We are seeking a detail-oriented and analytical Finance Business Analyst to support financial planning, reporting, and business decision-making across the organization. The successful candidate will be responsible for analyzing financial performance, preparing budgets and forecasts, improving financial processes, and providing actionable insights to drive profitability and operational efficiency. This role requires strong financial analysis capabilities, business partnering skills, and experience with ERP systems such as SAP or Oracle Financials to support client solutioning, requirement gathering, and end-to-end project documentation, specifically within Mobile Virtual Network Operator (MVNO) services, cloud services, and bulk SMS services. This role plays a critical bridge between business needs and technical execution, working closely with clients as well as internal stakeholders across product, technology, compliance, and operations.

Key Responsibilities

  • Prepare accurate and timely financial reports and management dashboards to support business decision-making.

  • Develop and manage annual budgets and periodic forecasts, ensuring alignment with business objectives.

  • Prepare comprehensive documentation including BRDs, FRDs, user journeys, process flows, and UAT scenarios

  • Conduct detailed profit and loss analysis to identify performance drivers, risks, and opportunities for improvement.

  • Perform revenue analysis to evaluate business performance, pricing strategies, and growth drivers.

  • Analyze revenue trends and business performance to support growth strategies and profitability.

  • Identify and recommend cost-saving opportunities to improve operational efficiency and financial performance.

  • Leverage ERP systems to enhance financial reporting, analysis, and process efficiency.

  • Ensure accurate and timely preparation of regulatory reports in compliance with applicable standards and requirements.

  • Build and maintain financial models to support strategic planning, investment evaluation, and business decisions.

  • Act as a coordination point across business, technology, compliance, and operations teams to ensure alignment

  • Develop high-quality PowerPoint presentations and materials for client discussions and stakeholder engagements


Requirements

  • 2–5 years of experience in financial analysis, FP&A, business finance, or a related role.

  • Bachelor's Degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, Business Administration, or a related field.

  • Professional qualification (ACCA, CPA, CIMA, CFA, or equivalent) is an advantage.

  • Experience with SAP, Oracle Financials, or other ERP systems.

  • Strong understanding of financial reporting, budgeting, forecasting, and accounting principles.

  • Experience in financial modelling and business performance analysis.

  • Prior exposure to payments, fintech, e-wallets, banking, or other regulated financial services environments

  • Strong analytical thinking with the ability to break down complex business needs into actionable requirements

  • Experience supporting proposals, client-facing documentation, or presentation deck preparation is a plus

  • Ability to work in a fast-paced, cross-functional environment with multiple stakeholders

raw_html:
Job Summary:

We are seeking a tech-savvy Data Analyst to join our Risk & Fraud Intelligence team. Here is the best part: No data cleaning required. Our data pipelines are fully managed; your core mission is to sort structured datasets, build intelligence logic, and map metrics directly into dynamic, high-impact risk dashboards.

You will work alongside senior leadership to identify fraud patterns, leverage AI-driven insights, and turn raw logic into live monitoring systems. If you have a knack for SQL, Python, and Power BI, and want a role focused on insights and visualization rather than fixing messy data, this is your perfect next step.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Dashboard Architecture & Linking: Design, develop, and maintain automated risk monitoring dashboards (Power BI / Tableau) by mapping and linking pre-processed datasets.

  • Data Sorting & Logic Mapping: Utilize SQL and Python to sort, query, and structure refined data into actionable risk matrices and pattern-detection matrices.

  • Risk Assessment & Modeling: Develop and maintain risk assessment models, evaluate potential risks, and provide actionable insights to mitigate exposures.

  • Risk Monitoring & Reporting: Monitor key risk indicators in real-time, prepare reports, identify and assess potential risks to company performance and profitability through detailed data analysis.

  • Fraud Detection & Prevention: Implement AI-driven fraud detection systems and strategies to prevent fraud, scams, and ensure customer protection.

  • AI-Enhanced Fraud Intelligence: Work with pre-integrated, AI-driven fraud systems to analyze anomalies, identify scams, and trigger alerts for suspicious ecosystem activity.

  • Real-Time Monitoring: Track Key Risk Indicators (KRIs) in real-time through your dashboards, ensuring senior stakeholders have visibility into platform integrity and performance.

  • Cross-Functional Strategy: Collaborate with Product, IT, and Operations to embed your dashboard insights into daily business workflows and defense strategies.

Job Requirements:

  • Education: Bachelor’s degree or Diploma in Data Science, Business Intelligence, Statistics, Mathematics, Finance (Quantitative), or a related field.

  • Experience: Minimum 1 year of hands-on experience in data analytics, dashboard creation, or business intelligence (relevant data internships are highly welcomed).

  • Technical Stack: Strong foundational skills in SQL and Python for data queries, sorting, and manipulation.

  • BI Visualization: Proficient in Power BI, Power Query, or Tableau (specifically in establishing data relationships and data linking).

  • AI Exposure: Experience or a strong interest in using AI-powered development tools (e.g., GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT Advanced Data Analysis) to optimize code writing and dashboard structuring.

  • Mindset: A strong analytical brain focused on pattern recognition and system logic. Note: We are not looking for a traditional legal/compliance background.


Why Join Us?

  • Accessible Location: Office is within walking distance from the MRT.

  • Monthly Performance Bonus: Up to 4 digits monetary reward, get paid for your hard work.

  • Professional Development: Sponsorship for professional training and workshops.

  • Annual Leave Encashment: Get paid for unused leave.

  • Team Bonding: Monthly team bonding activities based on your preference.

  • Work Assets Provided: All necessary work tools and equipment are supplied.

raw_html:
We are seeking a detail-oriented and analytical Finance Business Analyst to support financial planning, reporting, and business decision-making across the organization. The successful candidate will be responsible for analyzing financial performance, preparing budgets and forecasts, improving financial processes, and providing actionable insights to drive profitability and operational efficiency. This role requires strong financial analysis capabilities, business partnering skills, and experience with ERP systems such as SAP or Oracle Financials to support client solutioning, requirement gathering, and end-to-end project documentation, specifically within Mobile Virtual Network Operator (MVNO) services, cloud services, and bulk SMS services. This role plays a critical bridge between business needs and technical execution, working closely with clients as well as internal stakeholders across product, technology, compliance, and operations.

Key Responsibilities

  • Prepare accurate and timely financial reports and management dashboards to support business decision-making.

  • Develop and manage annual budgets and periodic forecasts, ensuring alignment with business objectives.

  • Prepare comprehensive documentation including BRDs, FRDs, user journeys, process flows, and UAT scenarios

  • Conduct detailed profit and loss analysis to identify performance drivers, risks, and opportunities for improvement.

  • Perform revenue analysis to evaluate business performance, pricing strategies, and growth drivers.

  • Analyze revenue trends and business performance to support growth strategies and profitability.

  • Identify and recommend cost-saving opportunities to improve operational efficiency and financial performance.

  • Leverage ERP systems to enhance financial reporting, analysis, and process efficiency.

  • Ensure accurate and timely preparation of regulatory reports in compliance with applicable standards and requirements.

  • Build and maintain financial models to support strategic planning, investment evaluation, and business decisions.

  • Act as a coordination point across business, technology, compliance, and operations teams to ensure alignment

  • Develop high-quality PowerPoint presentations and materials for client discussions and stakeholder engagements


Requirements

  • 2–5 years of experience in financial analysis, FP&A, business finance, or a related role.

  • Bachelor's Degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, Business Administration, or a related field.

  • Professional qualification (ACCA, CPA, CIMA, CFA, or equivalent) is an advantage.

  • Experience with SAP, Oracle Financials, or other ERP systems.

  • Strong understanding of financial reporting, budgeting, forecasting, and accounting principles.

  • Experience in financial modelling and business performance analysis.

  • Prior exposure to payments, fintech, e-wallets, banking, or other regulated financial services environments

  • Strong analytical thinking with the ability to break down complex business needs into actionable requirements

  • Experience supporting proposals, client-facing documentation, or presentation deck preparation is a plus

  • Ability to work in a fast-paced, cross-functional environment with multiple stakeholders

raw_html:
About the role
We are looking for a Banking System Analyst to join our Kuala Lumpur office supporting the delivery and maintenance of financial technology solutions used by banks and financial institutions.

This is a client-facing role where you’ll work between banking users and technical teams to support and implement live systems used in day-to-day financial operations. You’ll gain hands-on exposure across implementation, support, and financial product knowledge.

It is suited for someone who enjoys working across technology, business, and client support, and wants to build strong fundamentals in financial systems.

Key responsibilities

  1. Requirement Gathering: Gather, analyze, and document detailed functional and business requirements from banking clients.

  2. System Design & Alignment: Design system solutions that align with banking regulations, compliance standards, and business objectives.

  3. Technical Collaboration: Collaborate with IT development teams to translate business needs into technical specifications.

  4. Testing & Validation: Conduct system testing, workflow troubleshooting, and quality assurance to ensure solutions meet standards.

  5. Implementation & Training: Support live system deployments and provide comprehensive training and documentation to end-users.

  6. Client Engagement: Manage stakeholder relationships, monitor system performance, and recommend optimization strategies.

  7. Perform other ad-hoc tasks or responsibilities as assigned by the company.

What we're looking for

  1. Malaysian citizen.

  2. Degree in IT, Computer Science, Finance, Banking, or related discipline.

  3. 2+ years of experience in banking system support or fintech environments. (Fresh graduates with exceptional learning agility are also highly encouraged to apply).

  4. Familiarity with Microsoft-based applications (web and Windows client) and MS SQL for issue investigation and data validation.

  5. Strong analytical thinking, excellent problem-solving skills, and the ability to explain technical concepts to non-technical users.

  6. Experience with requirements gathering, documentation, application testing, and stakeholder management.

Bonus Points

  1. Knowledge of banking software solutions, fintech, or application/ support environments.

  2. Knowledge of or keen interest in financial markets (Treasury, FX, Derivatives, Equities, Unit Trust)

What we offer

  1. Competitive base salary.

  2. Up to 19% EPF contribution and SOCSO

  3. Medical insurance

  4. Client site expenses claims

  5. Travel allowance

  6. Overseas assignment support opportunity

About us
FinIQ is a financial technology (fintech) pioneer. Founded in Singapore in 2001, we build the cutting-edge software platforms that power capital markets, wealth management, and over-the-counter (OTC) trading for over 60 of the world's leading financial institutions. Our innovative engineering simplifies complex banking workflows. We automate price discovery, cross-asset trading, and post-trade life-cycle management to eliminate manual friction globally. At FinIQ, you will work alongside top-tier talent to build high-performance systems that reshape global investment banking.

How to apply
Please submit your resume, a cover letter highlighting your relevant experience, and any relevant certifications or credentials to apply now. We review applications on a rolling basis and will contact shortlisted candidates for interviews.

raw_html:
JOB PURPOSE

Lead the research, design, curation, development and validation of engaging, relevant and future-ready STEM learning content and experiences. The role applies emerging technologies, including artificial intelligence (AI), robotics, data-driven tools and immersive platforms, to strengthen learning effectiveness, broaden audience reach and deliver measurable impact in support of the national STEM agenda and the company’s vision and mission.

KEY ACCOUNTABILITIES

 1) STEM Learning Content Design & Development

·       Research, design and develop STEM learning content and modules in alignment with Petrosains’ learning frameworks and strategic priorities.

·       Develop modules and learning approaches that support inclusive learning for diverse audiences, including indigenous communities and learners with disabilities such as Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD).

·       Integrate AI tools and digital technologies to enhance learner engagement, interactivity and personalisation.

·       Translate scientific and technical concepts into structured, learner-centred content suitable for exhibitions, programmes and digital platforms.

·       Utilize simple analytics and feedback tools to assess learning impact

·       Contribute to continuous improvement of content using data-driven insights


2) Trend Analysis & Innovation

·       Identify opportunities to integrate emerging technologies, including AI, data analytics and extended reality (XR) into learning experiences.

·       Conduct research on content development requirements by identifying relevant STEM topics, approaches and tools, while analysing industry needs and key global and local trends guided by Petrosains Guiding Principles, the National Agenda, PETRONAS Corporate Agenda and the Sustainable Development Goals.

·  Collaborate across departments and functions to co-create relevant and impactful learning solutions.


3) Content Design & Project Execution

·       Support end-to-end content development lifecycle (research → design → development → deployment → evaluation)

·       Curate appropriate content tailored for diverse learning platforms including physical, digital, or hybrid formats.

·       Execute special projects development as per assigned. The special projects include but not limited to Petrosains new portfolio and assignment based.

·       Collaborate across teams to develop innovative, learner-centric programmes to ensure impact and sustainability


4) Collaboration & Ecosystem Engagement

·       Engage and liaise with relevant academic institurions, tech partners and industry experts to ensure alignment, support content co-creation, validation and accreditation.

·       Support partnerships related to AI, inclusive learning, digital learning, and STEM innovation


5) Commercialization

·       Support the design of STEM learning products, including services and physical offerings, with a customer-centric approach to enable commercialisation

QUALIFICATION & EXPERIENCE

1.    Bachelor’s degree in

·       Computer Science / Artificial Intelligence / Data Science

·       Engineering (any discipline with digital/AI exposure)

·       Science / STEM fields with strong digital or programming component

·       Educational Technology / Science Communication (with AI exposure)

 2.    Fresh graduates (0–2 years experience). Candidates with internships, projects or portfolios in AI/EdTech/STEM content is a plus

 3.    Digitally savvy with the ability to work effectively with emerging tools and platforms are preferred

·       Generative AI (e.g., ChatGPT, Copilot, Gemini)

·       Prompt engineering fundamentals

·       AI-assisted content creation tools (video, design, text, coding)

·       Python / basic programming OR no-code AI tools

·       Data handling or simple analytics

·       Learning platforms (LMS, interactive tools, simulations)

·       Video/content creation tools (Canva, CapCut, Adobe, etc.)

4.    Content & Learning Design Skills and Project Management

·       Strong science communication skills and sound knowledge of Science, Technology, Engineering and Mathematics (STEM).

·       Excellent writing and presentation skills

·       Sound project management skills

5.    Candidates with any of the following will have an advantage:

·       Microsoft Certified: Azure AI Fundamentals

·       Google AI / Machine Learning Crash Courses

·       Instructional Design / Learning Experience Design (LXD) certification

·       Digital learning or e-learning development certifications

·       Python for Beginners / Data Analytics certification

·       Lean Six Sigma, Innovation Masterclass, Design Thinking, IBSE practitioner

raw_html:
Benefits of this role:

  • 13th Months Salary (upon Company Declaration)

  • Project Incentive (upon Company Declaration based on project performance)

  • Transport, Meal, Birthday Allowances (upon Confirmation)

  • Sports Activities (Badminton & Basketball), Company Outing

  • Training and certification sponsored by company (Selected employees).

  • Rewards and recognition: Long Service Award / Best Performer Award / Role Model Awards etc


Job Responsibilities

Project Lifecycle Management

  • Lead project initiation, define objectives, scope, budget, and delivery standards, and create the Project Charter.

  • Plan the overall project process (e.g., Agile, Waterfall, or Hybrid models), break down work packages (WBS), and allocate resources.

  • Monitor project execution, ensure progress aligns with the plan, address major deviations, and adjust strategies.

Team Management and Collaboration

  • Lead cross-functional teams (e.g., development, testing, design) by clarifying roles and responsibilities, and motivate members for efficient collaboration.

  • Resolve team conflicts, optimize communication mechanisms, and improve overall execution efficiency.

Risk Management and Decision-Making

  • Identify, assess, and prioritize project risks, develop contingency plans, and lead issue resolution.

  • Make decisions on key milestones (e.g., requirement changes, technology selection), balancing quality, cost, and time.

Resource and Budget Control

  • Develop project budgets, monitor actual expenditures, and control cost overruns.

  • Coordinate human resources, software/hardware resources, and third-party vendors to ensure proper resource allocation.

Quality and Delivery Management

  • Define acceptance criteria for deliverables, organize stage reviews (e.g., requirement reviews, UAT testing).

  • Ensure final deliverables meet customer or business objectives, and address any issues until closure.

Stakeholder Communication and Reporting

  • Regularly report project progress to senior management and clients, manage stakeholder expectations, and gain support.

  • Coordinate client requirement changes (CCB process), and ensure contract and SLA compliance.


Job Qualifications

Educational Background
Bachelor's degree or above, preferably in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Project Management, or related fields.

Experience Requirements

  • Possesses a minimum of 1 year of working experience in the related field, showcasing a comprehensive understanding of complex projects and experienced in product management.

  • Proficient in the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC) and practical experience with Agile development (Scrum/Kanban) or Waterfall models.

Core Skills

  • Methodology and Tools: Proficient in project management tools (Jira, Confluence, MS Project) and collaboration platforms (Slack, Teams).

  • Familiar with requirements management (e.g., user story maps), Gantt charts, burndown charts, and other planning methods.

Soft Skills

  • Leadership: Ability to unite teams, drive decision-making, and take ultimate responsibility.

  • Negotiation and Influence: Balance client, team, and company interests to secure resource support.

  • Stress Resistance: Adapt to high-intensity work and stay goal-oriented amidst uncertainty.

About the role
We are seeking a Research Assistant to support our coverage of a) China’s insurance and banking and b) commodities & renewable energy sectors.   Your main duties are news flow and data analysis and helping with report writing.

 Major Responsibilities and Objectives: 

  • Assist in report writing, generating and communicating investment ideas.

  • Maintain and update comprehensive financial forecasting, earnings tracking and market valuation models.

  • Actively monitor news flow on corporate announcements, sectors under coverage.

  • Handle sales and client request.

  • Liaise with various sector teams for joint reports.


The successful candidate will have: 

  • Minimum 2:1, GPA 3.2/4.0 (or equivalent) bachelor's degree in accounting/ finance or economics.

  • Strong analytical and financial modelling skills.

  • Proficiency in written English is a MUST.

  • Excellent attention to detail, ability to multi-task, strong organizational and communication skills.

  • Familiarity with Excel, PowerPoint and Databases like CEIC, iFinD and Bloomberg.

  • Fluency in English and Mandarin.

  • Support readiness checks and go-live preparation activities

  • Assist in post-go-live stabilisation and follow-up activities.

We are looking for a Data Analytics Engineer to join our growing Data & Analytics team. This hybrid role combines data engineering and data analytics, focusing on building reliable data pipelines while transforming data into actionable business insights. You will work closely with data analysts, product teams, and business stakeholders to ensure data is accessible, accurate, and impactful for decision-making. This role is ideal for candidates who enjoy both technical data infrastructure work and analytical problem-solving.


Key Responsibilities

Data Pipeline & Infrastructure

  • Design, build, and maintain scalable data pipelines for data collection, processing, and analysis.

  • Improve and optimize existing pipelines to ensure performance, reliability, and data quality.

  • Support ETL/ELT processes and maintain data warehouse structures.

  • Manage and optimize SQL/NoSQL databases.

Data Analysis & Insights

  • Analyze data to identify trends, patterns, and actionable insights.

  • Perform exploratory data analysis (EDA) and basic statistical analysis.

Support business teams (marketing, product, operations) with data-driven insights

Data Integration and Collaboration

  • Integrate data from multiple sources (databases, APIs, third-party tools).

  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand business needs and define data requirements.

  • Bridge communication between technical and non-technical stakeholders.

Data Quality, Automation & Monitoring

  • Ensure data accuracy, consistency, and reliability across systems.

  • Automate data workflows and validation processes.

  • Monitor data pipelines and troubleshoot issues proactively.


Qualifications Required

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Statistics, or related field.

  • 1–3 years of experience in data engineering, data analytics, or similar roles.

  • Proficiency in SQL and Python (must-have).

  • Understanding of ETL/ELT processes and data pipeline concepts.

  • Experience with data visualization tools (Tableau, Power BI, etc.).

  • Familiarity with relational databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL, etc.).

  • Basic knowledge of statistics / data analysis methods (EDA, hypothesis testing).

  • Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail.

  • Good communication skills to work with cross-functional teams.

Preferred / Nice to Have

  • Experience with real-time data pipelines or big data tools.

  • Exposure to gaming / user behavior analytics.

  • Experience with APIs and data integration.

  • Knowledge of A/B testing or experimentation.

  • Experience with cloud platforms (AWS / GCP / Azure).

raw_html:
Our client is seeking an Associate Data Manager (Junior) to join their team!

This is a unique opportunity to join a leading consultancy firm in Malaysia, where you will play a pivotal role in managing clinical data and ensuring data integrity. This role offers a chance to work with cutting-edge technology and contribute to meaningful clinical research.


About Our Client

Our client is a local financial consultancy firm based in Malaysia, dedicated to providing expert audit and tax services. They are a forward-thinking company committed to innovation and excellence.


What you'll be doing?

  • Design CRF: You will design case report forms following the clinical trial protocol.

  • Data Validation: Develop data validation specifications based on the protocol and CRF.

  • Data Entry: Perform clinical data entry and data review to ensure data quality.

  • Data Reconciliation: Manage external data reconciliation to ensure data consistency.

  • Team Collaboration: Work independently and as part of a team with data managers, programmers, and statisticians.


Who are they looking for?

  • Educational Background: You should hold a minimum Bachelor's degree in Statistics, Biostatistics, Computer Science, Information Technology, Data Science, Mathematics, Pharmacy, Life Sciences, Biomedical Science, or a related field

  • Language Proficiency: You must be fluent in both Mandarin (Chinese) and English, written and spoken, as you'll be working with international teams and supporting research across different regions

  • International Mobility: You should be willing to relocate to Guangzhou, China for 6 months of comprehensive on-the-job training upon hiring, providing you with valuable international experience

  • Clinical Research Interest: Experience in clinical data management, clinical research, or healthcare/pharmaceutical roles is valued, though candidates with no prior experience are welcomed to apply if you demonstrate passion for the field

  • Technical Skills: Hands-on experience with Electronic Data Capture systems (Medidata Rave, Oracle InForm, or similar) would be advantageous but not essential

  • Programming Knowledge: Working knowledge of R, Python, or SAS for data analysis and validation is preferred but we're open to candidates eager to learn these skills


How to apply

Ready to join this role? Click Apply now to submit your resume and share your availability and expected salary with us!

We welcome all qualified candidates to apply, regardless of experience or background.

All information received will be kept strictly confidential and will be used only for employment-related purposes.

Know someone who'd be perfect for this role? Share this role with them! (Click this link to share referral details via Email)

#SmartHire

job_description: JOB PURPOSEManage the Environmental, Social and Governance (ESG) framework of the Group and work with the business to consolidate and analyze the development and implementation of ESG strategy to enhance the Group’s sustainability performance.DUTIES AND RESPONSIBILITIESThe position requires the employee to perform the following:1.    Policies and strategies: Compile and research to produce data analytics and reports that include ESG related factors, risks and opportunities to support and achieve the department’s objectives, which are in line with the company’s vision and mission. 2.    Communication materials – ESG: Gather and analyse ESG related data and information, conduct materiality survey to support the timely production of draft sustainability reports. (i.e. ESG reports, sustainability reports and annual/integrated reports, exco proposals, ESG surveys, etc.) 3.    Brand communication: Analyse and report any pertinent ESG issues that could impact the company’s brand reputation for effective brand communication. (i.e. including peer analysis and sustainability benchmarks using ESG measures, standards and methodologies to keep informed of the latest developments in the industry) 4.    Media communication: Compile content on ESG to prepare media related drafts to ensure delivery of accurate and timely information. 5.    Projects: Browse and report any pertinent ESG issues that could impact the department’s Projects for effective brand communication. Prepare draft proposals for review. 6.    Budgeting & Administration: Monitor any costs incurred in relation to ESG to ensure the costs are within department’s budget and provide value-added inputs to ensure cost efficiency of the implementation of the ESG works. 7.    Procurement: Liaise and prepare the vendor selection process (comparative analysis and recommendation) to select vendors/agencies on ESG works (if any) to provide timely information for decision making. Administer payment of invoices (if any) to provide timely payment of completed work to vendors. 8.    Corporate website: Administer the sustainability/ESG section of the company’s corporate website to ensure the ESG content is updated, accurate and consistent (where applicable) across the Company and its subsidiaries. 9.    Content archives: Collage and archive all ESG files and past works (including final and working files, references, research materials and multimedia materials) with a proper documentation and filing system for easy retrieval. 10.  Event management: Administer the assigned ESG-related events (such as ESG reporting data collation briefings to company departments and subsidiaries to develop measurable sustainability initiatives for external reporting) to ensure smooth running of the event. 11.  Management papers: Gather and provide ESG findings to support the drafting of management papers/ presentation slides to provide accuracy of information and timely completion of task. 12.  Perform any other duties and responsibilities as and when assigned by the Superior to ensure timely completion and meet the department’s objectives. KNOWLEDGE / EXPERIENCEMinimum working experience: 3-5 yearsMinimum qualification: Bachelor’s DegreeArea / Field of Study: ESG Data Analyst / Sustainability / Business Finance / Mathematics / CommunicationSpecific skill / knowledge required:Experiences: 1-3 years of sustainability reporting or data analytics reporting experienceSkills: Good analytical skills (including logical reasoning, critical thinking, communication, research and data analysis), creativity and writing skills.Knowledge: Good understanding of the history and corporate working culture of the Company and the Group (subsidiaries)
raw_html:
JOB PURPOSE

Manage the Environmental, Social and Governance (ESG) framework of the Group and work with the business to consolidate and analyze the development and implementation of ESG strategy to enhance the Group’s sustainability performance.


DUTIES AND RESPONSIBILITIES

The position requires the employee to perform the following:

1.    Policies and strategies: Compile and research to produce data analytics and reports that include ESG related factors, risks and opportunities to support and achieve the department’s objectives, which are in line with the company’s vision and mission.

 

2.    Communication materials – ESG: Gather and analyse ESG related data and information, conduct materiality survey to support the timely production of draft sustainability reports. (i.e. ESG reports, sustainability reports and annual/integrated reports, exco proposals, ESG surveys, etc.)

 

3.    Brand communication: Analyse and report any pertinent ESG issues that could impact the company’s brand reputation for effective brand communication. (i.e. including peer analysis and sustainability benchmarks using ESG measures, standards and methodologies to keep informed of the latest developments in the industry)

 

4.    Media communication: Compile content on ESG to prepare media related drafts to ensure delivery of accurate and timely information.

 

5.    Projects: Browse and report any pertinent ESG issues that could impact the department’s Projects for effective brand communication. Prepare draft proposals for review.

 

6.    Budgeting & Administration: Monitor any costs incurred in relation to ESG to ensure the costs are within department’s budget and provide value-added inputs to ensure cost efficiency of the implementation of the ESG works.

 

7.    Procurement: Liaise and prepare the vendor selection process (comparative analysis and recommendation) to select vendors/agencies on ESG works (if any) to provide timely information for decision making. Administer payment of invoices (if any) to provide timely payment of completed work to vendors.

 

8.    Corporate website: Administer the sustainability/ESG section of the company’s corporate website to ensure the ESG content is updated, accurate and consistent (where applicable) across the Company and its subsidiaries.

 

9.    Content archives: Collage and archive all ESG files and past works (including final and working files, references, research materials and multimedia materials) with a proper documentation and filing system for easy retrieval.

 

10.  Event management: Administer the assigned ESG-related events (such as ESG reporting data collation briefings to company departments and subsidiaries to develop measurable sustainability initiatives for external reporting) to ensure smooth running of the event.

 

11.  Management papers: Gather and provide ESG findings to support the drafting of management papers/ presentation slides to provide accuracy of information and timely completion of task.

 

12.  Perform any other duties and responsibilities as and when assigned by the Superior to ensure timely completion and meet the department’s objectives.

 

KNOWLEDGE / EXPERIENCE

Minimum working experience: 3-5 years

Minimum qualification: Bachelor’s Degree

Area / Field of Study: ESG Data Analyst / Sustainability / Business Finance / Mathematics / Communication

Specific skill / knowledge required:

Experiences: 1-3 years of sustainability reporting or data analytics reporting experience

Skills: Good analytical skills (including logical reasoning, critical thinking, communication, research and data analysis), creativity and writing skills.

Knowledge: Good understanding of the history and corporate working culture of the Company and the Group (subsidiaries)

job_description: We are seeking a detail-oriented professional to join our team as a Mid to Senior Staff member. This role focuses on supporting the Customer Service (CS) department by managing cost analysis, financial planning, and expense forecasting for our analysis services. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in finance and strategic planning, with the ability to collaborate across teams to drive financial efficiency and accuracy.This role also supports AI-driven customer experience  initiatives by leveraging data insights to enhance service performance, optimize costs, and enable data-driven decision making.Roles & Responsibilities·        Perform monthly analysis of service-related costs and manage cost-related claims.·        Conduct Profit & Loss (P&L) analysis to identify financial trends, variances, and improvement opportunities.·        Manage sample unit, expense and forecast monthly CS department all expenses.·        Develop and maintain monthly and yearly financial plans.·        Monitor budgets, ensure policy compliance, and identify cost-saving opportunities.·        Collaborate with stakeholders to improve financial strategies and operational efficiency.·        Prepare reports and provide insights to support decision-making.·        Support digital transformation initiatives, including automation and AI adoption.·        Analyze data using AI tools to generate insights and improve service performance.·        Identify key cost drivers and optimize efficiency through data analysis.·        Work with cross-functional teams to implement AI-driven process improvements.Skills & Qualifications·        Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Business Administration, or a related field.·        Minimum 5 years of relevant experience in financial planning, cost control, or budget analysis.·        Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills with keen attention to detail.·        Familiarity with AI tools, data analytics, or automation (preferred).·      1 Year Renewable Contract Available.
raw_html:
We are seeking a detail-oriented professional to join our team as a Mid to Senior Staff member. This role focuses on supporting the Customer Service (CS) department by managing cost analysis, financial planning, and expense forecasting for our analysis services. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in finance and strategic planning, with the ability to collaborate across teams to drive financial efficiency and accuracy.

This role also supports AI-driven customer experience  initiatives by leveraging data insights to enhance service performance, optimize costs, and enable data-driven decision making.

Roles & Responsibilities

·        Perform monthly analysis of service-related costs and manage cost-related claims.

·        Conduct Profit & Loss (P&L) analysis to identify financial trends, variances, and improvement opportunities.

·        Manage sample unit, expense and forecast monthly CS department all expenses.

·        Develop and maintain monthly and yearly financial plans.

·        Monitor budgets, ensure policy compliance, and identify cost-saving opportunities.

·        Collaborate with stakeholders to improve financial strategies and operational efficiency.

·        Prepare reports and provide insights to support decision-making.

·        Support digital transformation initiatives, including automation and AI adoption.

·        Analyze data using AI tools to generate insights and improve service performance.

·        Identify key cost drivers and optimize efficiency through data analysis.

·        Work with cross-functional teams to implement AI-driven process improvements.

Skills & Qualifications

·        Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Business Administration, or a related field.

·        Minimum 5 years of relevant experience in financial planning, cost control, or budget analysis.

·        Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills with keen attention to detail.

·        Familiarity with AI tools, data analytics, or automation (preferred).

·      1 Year Renewable Contract Available.

raw_html:
About us
Aspial is a publicly listed company in Singapore, overseeing a diverse portfolio of businesses that include jewellery retail, property development, financial services, hospitality, and resort management. Aspial Lifestyle Business Services (ALBS), located in Malaysia, serves as a shared service business centre, playing a crucial role in supporting the Group’s various operations. The Group features prominent brands such as Maxi-Cash, Lee Hwa, Goldheart Jewellery, and Niessing.

About the role
We are seeking a System Analyst (SA) to join our dynamic team as a pioneer in Malaysia at Aspial Lifestyle Business Services Sdn Bhd. In this role, you will play a crucial part in transforming business needs into clear, structured system requirements and functional specifications, ensuring that solutions are scalable, maintainable, and aligned with business objectives. This role requires flexibility to travel as required.

What you'll be doing

Role Summary
The System Analyst manages the bridge between business needs and technical implementation across the full SDLC and Agile Development. In this role, you will work closely with Business Analysts, UI/UX, Developers, QA, Operations, and Support teams from requirement elicitation to solution validation, UAT, and deployment support.

Key Responsibilities

  • Requirements Analysis & Solution Definition:
    Analyse business requirements gathered by BAs and stakeholders to identify system impacts, dependencies, risks, and feasibility. Translate business needs into clear functional and technical specifications, including API/Data Process flows, data mappings, validation rules, and Support Guides (BCP, Table-Top).

  • Functional & Technical Documentation:
    Create and maintain comprehensive system documentation for integration touchpoints (internal and external systems) and non-functional requirements (performance, security, auditability) using standard templates.

  • BA & UI/UX Collaboration:
    Ensure Functional Specification Documents (FSDs), Use Cases, and Test Scenarios align with project objectives. Agree on clear user journeys and exceptional workflows before UI/UX design.

  • Development Team Collaboration:
    Work closely with software developers to clarify requirements, answer technical questions, validate proposed solutions, participate in design discussions, and ensure systems meet architectural standards.

  • Testing & Solution Validation:
    Support test planning by defining test scenarios, cases, and acceptance criteria.
    Actively support UAT by clarifying outcomes, assisting users in defect validation, analysing root causes, and verifying solutions before sign-off.

  • Implementation & Post-Go-Live Support:
    Assist in deployment activities, release validation, and post-implementation checks.
    Support the transition to Operations and Support teams via functional walkthroughs, user guides, knowledge transfers, and Table-top Exercises.

  • Stakeholder Engagement & Communication:
    Act as a key liaison between business users, IT teams, vendors, and support teams.
    Facilitate requirement clarification sessions and communicate professionally with technical and non-technical stakeholders remotely and onsite.

What we're looking for

Technical & Analytical Skills

  • Strong understanding of system design concepts, databases, data structures, application integrations, and APIs.

  • Experience integrating in-house systems with external platforms.

  • Ability to analyse complex business processes, translate them into logical system requirements, and read source code created by other developers.

  • Experience working with enterprise systems, multi-system environments, writing TSDs, interpreting FSDs, and managing projects end-to-end.

Functional & Collaboration Skills

  • Proven experience producing high-quality functional specifications and system documentation with strong logical thinking and attention to detail.

  • Strong verbal and written communication skills; comfortable explaining technical concepts clearly to non-technical users.

  • Able to work independently and collaborate comfortably in cross-functional, multi-stakeholder environments remotely and onsite.

Education & Experience

  • Diploma or Degree in Computer Science, IT, Engineering, or a related field.

  • 3+ years of experience as a System Analyst, Application Analyst, or Developer with proven project management exposure.

  • Experience in retail, payments, POS, or enterprise systems (Preferred).

  • Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines, microservices, and cloud platforms (Preferred).

  • Vendor management and project leadership experience (Preferred).

  • Strong foundation in SQL & NoSQL databases, programming logic, APIs, system architecture concepts, and cloud fundamentals.

raw_html:
1. Market Surveillance Monitoring & Analysis
    Conduct daily monitoring of trading activities, communications, and alerts to identify potential market misconduct, irregularities, or control gaps.

  2. Investigation & Case Management
    Perform detailed investigations into suspicious activities, gather and validate evidence, and prepare clear, well-supported investigation reports.

  3. Compliance & Procedure Adherence
    Ensure all surveillance activities, investigations, and alert closures are conducted in accordance with established policies, procedures, and methodologies.

  4. Escalation & Issue Management
    Timely escalate identified risks, breaches, or control issues and provide clear rationale and documentation for actions taken.

  5. Projects & Continuous Improvement Initiatives
    Participate in surveillance system enhancements, process improvement initiatives, and compliance-related projects to strengthen monitoring effectiveness.

  6. Cross-Functional Collaboration & Reviews
    Support ad hoc reviews and collaborate with stakeholders across departments to address issues, close gaps, and enhance internal controls.

  7. Team Support & Leadership Backup
    Assist the Head of Monitoring in overseeing team operations, providing guidance, and ensuring continuity of operations in the absence of the team lead.

Job Requirements

  1. Experience in market surveillance, compliance, or related functions, with exposure to financial markets and products.

  2. Understanding of financial market regulations, trading activities, and surveillance practices.

  3. Strong ability to analyse trading behaviours, investigate alerts, and produce well-supported findings.

  4. Experience in handling projects, reviews, or initiatives, with ability to manage multiple tasks effectively.

  5. Strong verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to engage and influence stakeholders, including senior management.

  6. High attention to detail, integrity, resilience under pressure, strong work ethic, and proficiency in Microsoft Office tools (Excel, Word, PowerPoint).

job_description: Job Descriptions:1. Understand the Process•      Sit with business owners and map how the work really flows — including the exceptions and the unwritten rules.•      Identify the highest-leverage intervention points, not just the most automatable ones.2. Design the Solution•      Decide what should be agentized, what keeps a human in the loop, and what should not be touched at all.•      Sequence the rollout so it is safe and adoptable.3. Build It•      Create Claude skills, agents, and lightweight apps that fit the actual workflow.•      Iterate quickly with users rather than disappearing for a month.4. Drive Adoption•      Get the function to trust and use what you built.•      Handle friction, half-given requirements, and “it got one thing wrong” moments without folding.5. Hand Over and Govern•      Document the solution and train the owners.•      Ensure it fits the Group’s AI governance and quality standards before moving to the next engagement.Requirements:•      Strong business and process sense•      You can look at a messy function, understand why it works the way it does, and reason clearly about where to intervene.•      Systems thinking — you naturally break a problem into steps, inputs, decisions, and edge cases.•      Stakeholder spine — you can manage resistant business owners, push back when a request is wrong, and stay steady when the first version gets blamed for something.•      A bias to build and iterate, not just advise.•      Proven, hands-on command of Claude in real work — you build agents and skills confidently and reliably, not as a casual user experimenting at the edges.•      Fluent at writing clear prompts, structuring tasks for an agent, and getting dependable output. You know how to decompose a process into something an agent can execute.•      Comfortable in a hands-on technical environment (files, configuration, tools). You do not need to be a software engineer, but a terminal or a config file should not slow you down.
raw_html:
Job Descriptions:

1. Understand the Process

•      Sit with business owners and map how the work really flows — including the exceptions and the unwritten rules.

•      Identify the highest-leverage intervention points, not just the most automatable ones.

2. Design the Solution

•      Decide what should be agentized, what keeps a human in the loop, and what should not be touched at all.

•      Sequence the rollout so it is safe and adoptable.

3. Build It

•      Create Claude skills, agents, and lightweight apps that fit the actual workflow.

•      Iterate quickly with users rather than disappearing for a month.

4. Drive Adoption

•      Get the function to trust and use what you built.

•      Handle friction, half-given requirements, and “it got one thing wrong” moments without folding.

5. Hand Over and Govern

•      Document the solution and train the owners.

•      Ensure it fits the Group’s AI governance and quality standards before moving to the next engagement.


Requirements:

•      Strong business and process sense

•      You can look at a messy function, understand why it works the way it does, and reason clearly about where to intervene.

•      Systems thinking — you naturally break a problem into steps, inputs, decisions, and edge cases.

•      Stakeholder spine — you can manage resistant business owners, push back when a request is wrong, and stay steady when the first version gets blamed for something.

•      A bias to build and iterate, not just advise.

•      Proven, hands-on command of Claude in real work — you build agents and skills confidently and reliably, not as a casual user experimenting at the edges.

•      Fluent at writing clear prompts, structuring tasks for an agent, and getting dependable output. You know how to decompose a process into something an agent can execute.

•      Comfortable in a hands-on technical environment (files, configuration, tools). You do not need to be a software engineer, but a terminal or a config file should not slow you down.

raw_html:
Why Us?

In AIA Digital+, we serve as AIA’s Group-led Technology, Digital & Analytics hub by evolving innovative technology to shape the future. We aim to design & develop a detailed, human centered experiences to positively impact the lives of millions of people.

Join us as a part of AIA Group today!


Job Description

  • Meet with business stakeholders to understand new requests and communicate high-level requirements to the project delivery teams in the form of Business Requirements Document (BRD) for effort estimation.

  • Once a project is initiated, consult and collaborate with business teams to develop detailed business requirements based on the initial (approved) BRD. This includes creating workflows to represent the future “To-Be” process using Visio or Lucid chart. 

  • Create business requirements documentation for projects using a well-defined hierarchy within project tools such as DevOps or Jira.

  • Lead meetings with business stakeholders and present requirements clearly to ensure information is easily understood and actionable.

  • Provide subject matter expertise on Power Platforms, UiPath, Workday, Copilot Studio and Generative AI, distinguishing between default/implicit features and customized requirements.

  • Create wireframe designs using Figma or Sketch and align them with business stakeholders as part of the requirements-gathering process.

  • Manage requirements and user stories within projects using Azure DevOps.

  • Engage with business stakeholders to refine requirements and secure formal sign-off.

  • Create UAT test plans that align with business requirements documentation.

  • Work with both offshore and onshore development teams to ensure that implementation and design align with business requirements.

  • Increase the quality of business requirements at the start of the project to ensure request are well defined for the developers & testers, enabling UAT to be completed with minimal defects and errors.

  • Deliver project on time while ensuring high levels of customer satisfaction.


Requirements:

  • Candidate must possess at least a Degree in Computer Science/Information Technology or equivalent.

  • 4 to 5 years of relevant experience as Business Analyst & familiar with IT Project Management.

  • Possess relevant experience or skill set in Microsoft 365, Power Platform, Copilot Studio, Generative AI, UiPath. Familiarity with implementing other system such as SAP, Oracle or Sales Force is an additional advantage.

  • Possess relevant experience with project management tools such as Azure DevOps and Jira.

  • Possess relevant experience with design and wireframing skills such as Visio, Figma and Sketcher.

  • Good communication (written and spoken) and interpersonal skills.

  • Able to work independently with cross-functional teams.

  • Able to work under pressure and tight timelines.

  • Adapt quickly to IT changes and any new tasks assigned by the supervisor.

Overview
Mister Mobile is seeking a detail-oriented and enthusiastic Product Executive to support our product team in driving product development and system improvement initiatives.
Working remotely from Malaysia, you will assist with product documentation, research, system testing coordination, and cross-team collaboration to support ongoing product and ERP-related projects. This role is ideal for someone who is interested in product management and technology, and looking to gain hands-on experience in a fast-paced and collaborative environment.

Key Responsibilities
Product Support and Coordination

  • Assist the product team in planning, executing, and tracking product development initiatives, including system enhancement and ERP-related projects.

  • Coordinate with cross-functional teams, including IT, QA, marketing, sales, and operations, to ensure alignment on product goals, requirements, and deliverables.

  • Support the Product Specialist in organizing product launch activities and tracking project timelines

Market Research and Analysis

  • Conduct market research and competitor analysis to gather insights on product trends, customer preferences, and industry developments.

  • Analyze customer feedback and assist in identifying improvement opportunities for current products and system features.

  • Compile and present research findings to support product decisions.

Product Documentation and Reporting

  • Prepare and maintain product documentation, including product requirements, feature specifications, and internal process documentation.

  • Assist in creating presentations, reports, and updates to communicate product status and progress to the team.

  • Ensure product information and documentation are accurate, organized, and easily accessible.

User Experience and Feedback Collection

  • Collaborate with customer support and operations teams to gather and analyze user feedback on product performance and system usability.

  • Identify patterns in feedback and suggest potential improvements to enhance the overall user experience.

  • Support the team in testing product features and documenting findings.

Ad-hoc Product Support Tasks

  • Perform ad-hoc tasks related to product research, data analysis, documentation, and project coordination as assigned by the Product Specialist

  • Assist in improving internal workflows and processes to support efficient product development and system implementation.

Requirements

  • Degree in Business, Marketing, Information Technology, or a related field.

  • 1-3 years of experience in product support, project coordination, or related roles.

  • Experience in market research, data analysis, product management, or system-related projects is an advantage.

  • Basic understanding of product development processes and project coordination.

  • Strong organizational and time-management skills with attention to detail.

  • Proficient in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint), Google Workspace and Figma.

  • Familiarity with project management tools (ClickUp) is a plus.

  • Analytical thinking with a proactive attitude toward learning and adapting to new challenges.

  • Self-motivated, adaptable, and able to work independently in a remote environment.

  • Ability to coordinate with multiple teams and manage tasks effectively.

Role Overview

This role focuses on ensuring the accuracy and quality of map data by identifying, validating, and updating Points of Interest (POI) such as businesses, landmarks, and locations. The associate will work closely with client guidelines to maintain high standards of data accuracy and consistency.

Key Responsibilities

  • POI Data Management

Identify and map geographic locations and Points of Interest (POIs) using web research and imagery

Validate POI names, addresses, and details using approved reference sources

Perform POI edits and reviews in accordance with client guidelines

Classify POIs into correct categories

  • Data Accuracy & Quality Control

Ensure all data meets defined quality standards (SLA, KPI, OLA)

Cross-check information using authorized sources only

Provide descriptive details and relevant links for validation

Report data inconsistencies, bugs, and system issues

Analyze and update road network geometry, attributes, and classifications using satellite imagery, street-level imagery, and digital map sources

Validate road names, directions, turn restrictions, and connectivity

  • Operations & Process Compliance

Follow defined procedures for data collection and processing

Maintain a clear understanding of end-to-end operational workflows

Escalate complex issues when necessary

  • Client & Stakeholder Support

Maintain effective communication with internal teams and clients

Adapt to changing client requirements and timelines

Ensure tasks are completed accurately and within deadlines

raw_html:
Industry Research Intern (Paid Internship)

Job Responsibilities:

As a member of the industry research team, participated in the analysis and research work of the metal commodities industry:

1. Continuously track global industry market dynamics, pay attention to real-time hotspots, and conduct analysis and interpretation.

2. Master industry research methodology, and study industry fundamentals, macro environment, development trends, etc.

3. Complete data organization, analysis, and utilization.

4. Participate in the optimization and upgrade of the industry database, and complete the timely update of data content.

5. Complete other tasks.

Job Requirements:

1. Currently enrolled students who have not graduated.

2. Possess excellent logical analysis and rapid learning abilities, as well as a certain level of industry analysis thinking.

3. Interested in market research, proficient in both Chinese and English as working languages, and has good writing skills.

4. Proficient in using work software such as PPT and EXCEL.

5. Possess good communication skills, stress tolerance, and be good at teamwork.

6. Outgoing and willing to communicate, able to maintain relationships in information channels effectively.

6.Must start work as soon as possible, with five days of in-person work per week, and an internship duration of 3 months or more.

Delivering a step change in team reporting output.Work closely with stakeholders to fully understand requirements and provide collaborative solutions based on a commercial and analytical understanding.Prepare and Maintain Planograms that operationally simpler for stores and good display for customers.Update databases for actionable reports that support Space, Range and Display processes.Produce planogram data that is recognized for its accuracy, quality and reliability.Ensure all planograms are build based on Customer Decision Tree.Support projects to develop with analysis as requiredSupport the development of Space & Range processesJob Requirements                                     Candidate must possess at least Bachelor's Degree/Post Graduate Diploma/Professional Degree in Business Studies/Administration/Management, Others or equivalent.At least 3-4 Year(s) of working experience in the related field is required for this position. Exceptional analytical, problem solving and numerical skills Excellent communication and organisational skills with the ability to work in a team or as an individualAbility to interact with the business to understand their needs and interpret how they could be fulfilled using the available data.Ability to communicate and explain data to all levels Can work using own initiative and deliver results under pressureRequired Skill(s): MS Excel, PowerPoint, Power BI & Data Analytical Skills
raw_html:
Job Description

  • Provide range and space analysis to Space & Range and Trading teams, with the purpose of improving commercial performance.

  • Develop and prepare reports and insight for key stakeholders to monitor performance, as well as presenting and illustrating findings. Delivering a step change in team reporting output.

  • Work closely with stakeholders to fully understand requirements and provide collaborative solutions based on a commercial and analytical understanding.

  • Prepare and Maintain Planograms that operationally simpler for stores and good display for customers.

  • Update databases for actionable reports that support Space, Range and Display processes.

  • Produce planogram data that is recognized for its accuracy, quality and reliability.

  • Ensure all planograms are build based on Customer Decision Tree.

  • Support projects to develop with analysis as required

  • Support the development of Space & Range processes


Job Requirements                                     

  • Candidate must possess at least Bachelor's Degree/Post Graduate Diploma/Professional Degree in Business Studies/Administration/Management, Others or equivalent.

  • At least 3-4 Year(s) of working experience in the related field is required for this position.

  •  Exceptional analytical, problem solving and numerical skills

  •  Excellent communication and organisational skills with the ability to work in a team or as an individual

  • Ability to interact with the business to understand their needs and interpret how they could be fulfilled using the available data.

  • Ability to communicate and explain data to all levels 

  • Can work using own initiative and deliver results under pressure

  • Required Skill(s): MS Excel, PowerPoint, Power BI & Data Analytical Skills

raw_html:
Job Purpose

To support the planning, coordination, and execution of performance management processes and initiatives across Malaysia and, where applicable, at the Group level, under guidance from the Team Lead.

Key Responsibilities 1. Performance Management Cycle Support

  • Support coordination of annual performance cycles (goal setting, mid-year, year-end review)

  • Track timelines, deliverables, and submissions

  • Liaise with HRBPs and business units to ensure timely completion

  • Lead and deliver assigned projects

  • Perform other tasks as assigned by Team Lead

2. Goal Setting (KPIs) & Scorecard Support

  • Assist in collation and consolidation of HR inputs for division scorecards

  • Maintain and update KPI scorecards/templates

  • Perform validation checks to ensure data accuracy and consistency

3. Process & Policy Support

  • Maintain guidelines, FAQs, and communication materials

  • Update process documentation for clarity and consistency

  • Provide basic clarification to stakeholders on processes and timelines

4. Data & Reporting

  • Support preparation of reports and dashboards

  • Consolidate data for analysis (e.g. ratings distribution, cycle completion)

  • Ensure data accuracy, completeness, and proper documentation

5. System & Operational Support

  • Support system activities (testing, data uploads, issue tracking)

  • Log and follow up on system queries

  • Support continuous improvement of tools

6. Stakeholder Coordination

  • Coordinate with HRBPs, divisions, and COEs

  • Support communication of key updates and timelines

7. Project & Administrative Support

  • Support performance management projects/initiatives

  • Prepare meeting logistics and track action items

8. Governance & Compliance

  • Ensure adherence to policies, guidelines, and audit requirements

  • Maintain proper documentation for audit and tracking

Job Specification Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s Degree or Professional Qualification (HR or related is an advantage)

Professional / Regulatory Requirements

  • Nil

Relevant Work Experience

  • 0–2 years of experience

  • Internship or exposure to HR / data / administration is an advantage

Required Competencies & Skills Technical / Functional

  • Basic proficiency in MS Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint)

  • Ability to handle data consolidation and tracking

  • Strong attention to detail in reviewing data and documents

Personal (Soft Skills)

  • Good communication and coordination skills

  • Strong attention to detail and organisation

  • Willingness to learn and take guidance

  • Ability to manage multiple tasks and timelines

  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

  • Good interpersonal skills

Travel Requirements

  • As and when required

raw_html:
Responsibilities:

  • Support the development and implementation of Maybank Group’s employee benefits strategy to ensure alignment with business priorities and talent management objectives, including and applicable to across the Group.

  • Support preparation of governance papers, presentations, and supporting analysis for internal committees and senior management reviews.

  • Assist in reviewing and enhancing employee benefits programmes including medical, insurance, wellness, retirement, and flexible benefits.

  • Maintain and consolidate employee benefits policies, ensuring accurate and updated documentation of employee terms and conditions.

  • Support benefits harmonisation initiatives across Malaysia and international entities where applicable.

  • Consolidate benefits requests from business units and assist in compiling analysis and recommendations for benefits review exercises.

  • Conduct market benchmarking/study on industry practices and keep abreast of regulatory / legislative developments.

  • Organising and delivering internal engagement sessions such as brown bag sessions, workshops, and employee briefings.

  • Collate employee feedback and recommend improvements to benefits communication strategies.

  • Provide guidance and support to HR Business Partners and business units on employee benefits policies, plans, and terms and conditions.

  • Respond to employee benefits-related queries and provide interpretation of policies where required.

  • Support HR partners with insights and data analysis to facilitate rewards-related decision-making


Requirement

  • Strong analytical and problem‑solving skills, with the ability to translate data / findings into recommendations.

  • Good written and verbal communication skills, particularly in preparing presentations, and employee communications.

  • Strong stakeholder management skills, including the ability to build and maintain effective networks with internal and external peers.

  • Good organisational and coordination skills with ability to adapt and manage multiple priorities.

  • Meticulous to detail with strong documentation skills to ensure policies and records are accurate, current, and well maintained.

  • High level of professionalism, integrity, and confidentiality.

Job Title: Allocation Analyst, SEA (2-year Contract)

Reporting into: Senior Manager, Buying

Location: Malaysia

Primary Purpose: The Allocation Analyst is responsible for all product newness and replenishment allocation activities associated with SEA retail and outlet business channels for lifestyle categories. The ideal candidate will be required to manage and develop allocation strategy to ensure the right product arrives at the right stores at the right time. This is a key role in executing the merchandising strategy in the market and ensure store inventory levels are appropriate. This role is also responsible for re-balancing inventory opportunities and initiating any store-to-store transfers to optimize inventory.


The successful individual will leverage their proficiency in Allocation to...

  • Create & support allocation and inventory strategy based on sales analysis and financial projection.

    • Sales analysis needs to be according to: Door profiling, Product category plan, current trends, seasonality and various Events

  • Allocation execution for all regions’ stores to meet or exceed sales, comp gross margin, turn/W-O-H, and inventory goals

    • Initial Allocation planning & execution

    • Weekly replenishment to stores

    • Store to store transfer

    • New store allocations, seasonal markdowns, marketing / promotional events

  • Perform in-season analysis to recommend regional inventory balancing opportunity to drive financial results and product productivity.

  • Work closely with DC/logistics team to fine-tune inbound/outbound shipments schedules and volume projection to ensure smooth inventory flow to support the business strategy 

  • Cross-functional partnership and decision making to prioritize stores/products with on-time delivery for monthly newness launch, marketing events and new store openings.

  • Communicate Allocation plan, delivery status and inventory related strategies directly with stores & other cross-functional partners especially retail management and Visual Merchandising

  • Visit stores on a bi-weekly basis to understand opportunities on what’s working, what’s not working and develop action plan with cross functional teams (Retail management & VM)

  • Proactively drive business process reengineering and optimize system capabilities


The accomplished individual will possess...

  • Min. 3-5 years’ experience in retail business. Merchandise Allocation / Planning experience is preferred.

  • Proven track record of buying/merchandising/allocation success for multinational brand/company

  • Experience in managing multiple direct reports

  • Analytical skills and ability to translate data into action points with clear communication

  • Ability to perform well under pressure with multiple deadlines

  • Experience in merchandising/planning systems and SAP a plus 


An outstanding professional will have...

  • Clear written and verbal communication skills

  • Comfortable in presenting and communicating to upper management

  • Self-starter and able to work independently and as a team player

  • Intermediate to Advanced Excel (vlookups, pivot tables, macro building a plus)

  • BA/BS university degree or its equivalent in merchandising, business, finance, economics, or supply chain.


Our Competencies for All Employees
Courage: Doesn’t hold back anything that needs to be said; provides current, direct, complete, and “actionable” positive and corrective feedback to others; lets people know where they stand; faces up to people problems on any person or situation (not including direct reports) quickly and directly; is not afraid to take negative action when necessary.
Creativity: Comes up with a lot of new and unique ideas; easily makes connections among previously unrelated notions; tends to be seen as original and value-added in brainstorming settings.
Customer Focus: Is dedicated to meeting the expectations and requirements of internal and external customers; gets first-hand customer information and uses it for improvements in products and services; acts with customers in mind; establishes and maintains effective relationships with customers and gains their trust and respect.
Dealing with Ambiguity: Can effectively cope with change; can shift gears comfortably; can decide and act without having the total picture; isn’t upset when things are up in the air; doesn’t have to finish things before moving on; can comfortably handle risk and uncertainty.
Drive for Results: Can be counted on to exceed goals successfully; is constantly and consistently one of the top performers; very bottom-line oriented; steadfastly pushes self and others for results.
Interpersonal Savvy: Relates well to all kinds of people, up, down, and sideways, inside and outside the organization; builds appropriate rapport; builds constructive and effective relationships; uses diplomacy and tact; can diffuse even high-tension situations comfortably.
Learning on the Fly: Learns quickly when facing new problems; a relentless and versatile learner; open to change; analyzes both successes and failures for clues to improvement; experiments and will try anything to find solutions; enjoys the challenge of unfamiliar tasks; quickly grasps the essence and the underlying structure of anything.
