raw_html:
Funding Societies | Modalku is the largest SME digital financing platform in Southeast Asia. We are licensed in Singapore, Indonesia, Thailand, and registered in Malaysia. We are backed by Sequoia India and Softbank Ventures Asia Corp amongst many others and provides business financing to small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs), which is crowdfunded by individual and institutional investors.

And here at Funding Societies | Modalku we live by our core values:

  • Serve with Obsession: Build win-win relationships for the long-term by having a customer obsession.

  • Grow Relentlessly: Strive to become our best, most authentic selves.

  • Enable Teamwork, Disable Politics: Only by forging togetherness, we help each other succeed.

  • Test Measure Act: Stay curious and reinvent ourselves, through innovation and experimentation.

  • Focus on Impact: Create impact through bias for action and tangible results.

The Senior FP&A Manager will be a senior finance business partner and analytical leader, responsible for the day-to-day execution and continuous improvement of financial planning, performance management, and reporting across the group. Working closely with senior Finance leadership, this role brings the rigour, depth, and initiative needed to elevate the quality of financial insight that informs strategic decisions.

What You Will Do --

1. Business Partnering

  • Partner with Business Heads and Sales/Marketing to drive business decisions.

  • Advise on sales commission/incentive plans and conduct deep-dive sales analyses as required.

  • Work closely with Business Heads on driver-based approaches for forecasting and budgeting exercises.

  • Support Monthly/Quarterly Business Reviews, providing insights on revenue drivers, headcount, sales productivity and operating expenses.

2. Financial Analysis & Insights

  • Run scenario modeling, ROI evaluation, and Risk & Opportunity tracking.

  • Align financial metrics with KPIs and provide insights on key performance trends.

  • Design and improve dashboards & reporting templates, ensuring timely reporting with actionable insights.

  • Support quarterly forecasts, annual plans, and ad-hoc analysis.

3. Team & Capability Development

  • Lead the team's AI and automation agenda — identifying opportunities to eliminate low-value manual work, deploying AI-assisted workflows across planning and reporting, and setting the standard for how Finance leverages emerging tools.

  • Champion adoption of data tools and automation workflows; identify and drive structural improvements to how Finance operates.

  • Act as a bridge between Finance and business-facing functions — translating complexity into clear, actionable guidance for non-finance stakeholders.

Requirements --

What we are looking for:

  • Have a (minimum) Bachelor's degree in Finance, Accounting, or equivalent field from a reputable university.

  • 7+ years of relevant experience in financial planning and analysis, corporate finance, or business analysis.

  • Demonstrated ability to lead components in the planning cycle and influence senior stakeholders.

  • Expert-level financial modelling; able to build, challenge, and communicate complex models to a non-technical audience.

  • Deep grounding in lending economics: EIR, COF, ECL, NIM, PUE — able to hold substantive conversations with portfolio and risk leadership.

  • Comfortable with data analysis tools (BI platforms, financial planning systems); experience with data warehouses or SQL a strong plus.

  • Genuine curiosity about AI and automation — has actively experimented with AI tools in a finance context and can credibly lead the team's adoption rather than just participate in it.

  • Proven track record operating across multi-entity, multi-currency, multi-jurisdiction environments.

  • Proficient in both spoken and written English, with the ability to articulate complex concepts clearly to both technical and non-technical audiences.

  • Strong interpersonal skills and ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams.

  • High integrity, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple priorities.

  • Ability to think critically and challenge existing processes.

Benefits --

  • Time off - We would love you to take time off to rest and rejuvenate. We offer flexible paid vacations as well as many other observed holidays by country. We also like to have our people take a day off for special days like birthdays and work anniversaries.

  • Flexible Working - We believe in giving back the control of work & life to our people. We trust our people and love to provide the space to accommodate each and everyone's working style and personal life.

  • Medical Benefits - We offer health insurance coverage for our employees and dependents. Our people focus on our mission knowing we have their back for their loved ones too.

  • Mental Health and Wellness - We understand that our team productivity is directly linked to our mental and physical health. Hence we have Wellness Wednesdays and we engage partners to provide well-being coaching. And we have our Great FSMK Workout sessions too to keep everyone healthy and fit!

  • Learning & Development - We believe learning should never end and we support everyone with self-learning L&D allowances.

  • Tech Support - We provide a company laptop for our employees and the best possible support for the right equipment/tools to enable high productivity

raw_html:
Objectives of the Position

  • Seek to understand business needs and provide support to a range of HR processes and programs within Payroll, Compensation & Benefits and Labor Relations & Law.

  • Offer day-to-day support to service recipients on HR inquiries, work collaboratively with others and perform researches on market insights and legal legislations to provide resolutions.

  • Participate process improvements, automation, and digitalization measures to offer best service delivery experience



Main Areas of Responsibilities


Operational Excellence

  • Ensure data quality and data integrity for Payroll, Compensation & Benefits and Labor Relations & Law processes.

  • Receive, analyze, process and follow-up on personnel administration requests via multiple request channels, ensure accurate and timely interface to the respective internal/ external processing chains i.e. payroll, finance, data analytics, external service providers, local authorities etc.

  • Manage entire termination workflow for all termination types which includes leaves calculations, information checks, letters preparation, systems updates, payment calculations and exit clearance.

  • Responsible for time and attendance administrations, including manual calculations on time allowances/deductions, maintenance of work schedules, leaves, overtimes, and shift substitutions.

  • Support the delivery of compensation and benefits programs and administration i.e. employee subsidies, fleet management, long service awards etc.

  • Administer performance management activities, preparing performance metrics and managing performance review cycles. Support the salary review exercises on employee data preparation, letter generations and new salary processing.

  • Responsible for the local labor administrative activities and scheduled statutory HR reporting, ensure timely and compliant deliveries as per legislation requirements.

  • Responds to recurring or ad-hoc business needs to design and to deliver country specific or customized reports which could not be auto-generated by the analytics/reporting systems.

  • Work closely with other teams and external service providers to ensure all service requests are completed accurately and timely.


Service Engagement

  • Manage the hub inquiry line for the supported countries in providing advisory on employee enquiries, policy/guidelines clarifications, HR processes, HR systems guides, legislation processes etc.

  • Monitor multiples service requests to ensure services delivered by the team are in accordance with established Service Level Agreement (SLA) and internal Key Performance Indicators (KPI).

  • Perform researches and information gathering on local market HR news, legislation updates and guidelines to maintain internal knowledge database.

  • Analyze, clarify, and resolve operation issues and enquiries with close collaboration with relevant counterparts to ensure quality services are delivered from the hub. All unsolved and potential operational issues are escalated timely according to establish escalation process, with detailed analysis provided to manager.


Process Improvement and Project Initiatives

  • Continuously review and maintain knowledge documents in areas of expertise to develop the formation of competence hub.

  • Identify opportunities, prepare business cases, and participate in digitalization and process optimization. Support the implementation of process improvements, automation and digitalization measures which will be rolled out predominantly in the GB KL Hub for achieving the efficiency target.

  • Drive initiatives which contribute to the improvement of service experience

  • Identify deviations from the established blueprints of multiple system processors in Payroll, Compensation & Benefits and Labor Relations & Law processes and escalate to team leads in ensuring the capturing of business requirements, system settings, configuration needs and change trackers. Provide inputs and participate in user acceptance testing in system maintenance and upgrade, follow up and escalate timely with respective party to ensure fixes or changes can be delivered on time.


People Leadership

  • Works with moderate supervision within established procedures and practices.

  • Contribute positively to a knowledge sharing environment through generously sharing knowledge with others. Assist in orientation training and act as buddy to new team member.  



Job Requirements


Education

  • Relevant tertiary qualifications: Degree in Accounting, Mathematics, Commerce or Business Administration


Working Experience

  • With 1 - 2 years of related HR working experiences in Payroll, Compensation & Benefits and Labor Relations & Law.

  • Fresh graduates with relevant internship experience or majored in Human Resources are encouraged to apply.

  • Proficiency in Mandarin is required to support business operations in Hong Kong/Taiwan/China.

  • Preferably experience in relevant HR procedures, practices, and country statutory

  • Preferably working knowledge of integrated payroll systems preferably on SAP.


Technical & Professional Knowledge

  • Demonstrates a good level of proficiency in language and culture of the supported country/location

  • Preferably understanding of HR principals and/or Employee Laws of the supported country/location.

  • Strong processing skills and analytical abilities 

  • Service mindset with strong interpersonal and communications skills.

raw_html:
About the Opportunity: Drive Business Performance Through Financial Insights

We are seeking a highly analytical and business-minded Senior FP&A Analyst to support financial planning, performance reporting, and strategic decision-making across the organization. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys working with data, uncovering business insights, and translating complex financial information into actionable recommendations.

You will play a key role in management reporting, financial analysis, budgeting, forecasting, and business performance evaluation. This is not purely a reporting role, we are looking for someone who can think critically, challenge assumptions, identify opportunities, and partner closely with stakeholders to drive business performance and operational efficiency.

🔥 Are You the Perfect Fit?

  • FP&A & Management Reporting Experience: You have 4–6 years of experience in FP&A, finance analysis, management reporting, or commercial finance roles. Big 4 experience are preferred.

  • Strong Analytical Mindset: You enjoy working with numbers, investigating trends, reconciling data, and uncovering meaningful business insights.

  • Advanced Excel & Financial Modeling Skills: You are highly proficient in Excel or Google Sheets and comfortable building financial models and analysis frameworks.

  • Business Partnering & Communication Skills: You can communicate financial findings clearly and collaborate effectively with both finance and non-finance stakeholders.

  • Ownership & Accountability: You work independently, take initiative, and proactively follow through on issues until resolution.

  • Detail-Oriented Problem Solver: You can work with complex datasets, identify discrepancies, and improve reporting accuracy and reliability.

Key Responsibilities: Your Core Mission

1. Management Reporting & Business Analysis (40%)

  • Prepare and deliver accurate, timely management reports based on business and leadership requirements.

  • Perform variance analysis on revenue, profitability, operational costs, merchant fees, and key business drivers.

  • Monitor business performance trends and provide actionable insights to support decision-making.

  • Analyze operational KPIs, FX gain/loss, and profitability metrics to identify opportunities and risks.

2. Financial Planning & Strategic Support (30%)

  • Support budgeting, forecasting, and financial planning activities across business units.

  • Conduct business performance and unit economics analysis to evaluate profitability and efficiency.

  • Assist management with strategic planning initiatives and performance reviews.

  • Prepare financial presentations, business summaries, and decision-support materials for leadership.

3. Data Validation & Reporting Accuracy (15%)

  • Validate financial and operational data across multiple systems and data sources.

  • Investigate reporting discrepancies, abnormal movements, and unreconciled balances.

  • Work closely with stakeholders to ensure reporting completeness and accuracy.

  • Improve reporting reliability when dealing with complex or incomplete datasets.

4. Stakeholder Collaboration & Process Improvement (15%)

  • Partner closely with Accounting, Operations, Marketing, Commercial, and Management teams.

  • Translate business requirements into meaningful reports, dashboards, and analysis.

  • Drive continuous improvement of reporting frameworks, templates, and financial processes.

  • Support reporting automation, standardization, and scalability initiatives.

Technical & Cultural Requirements

  • Financial Expertise: Strong understanding of financial statements, P&L analysis, management reporting, budgeting, and forecasting.

  • Advanced Tools & Reporting Skills: Highly proficient in Excel or Google Sheets; experience with financial modeling and reporting automation is preferred.

  • Analytical & Detail-Oriented: Strong reconciliation skills with the ability to identify trends, anomalies, and business drivers.

  • Independent & Proactive: Able to work with minimal supervision while maintaining strong ownership and accountability.

Benefits: The Environment

  • 100% WFH: Complete autonomy in your workspace.

  • Supportive Culture: Join a team that values proactivity and high-quality execution.

  • Competitive Compensation: Based on your depth of experience and expertise.

raw_html:
Role Purpose:

We are looking for a high-calibre Account/Finance Executive with strong work ethic, passion for excellence, good organizational skills and attention to details to join our regional office.

Necessary skills for the role:

  • Knowledge in the use of MS Excel, MS Word and other Accounting software.

  • Analytical, hardworking, detail-mined and logical thinking

  • Ability to manage and process a high volume of transactions accurately and efficiently

  • Proactive in identifying opportunities to improve processes through the use of IT solutions or AI technologies

  • Good team players with effective communication and interpersonal skills

  • Mature, proactive, independent and able to work under pressure

  • Good command of spoken Cantonese/Mandarin and Fluent in English

Desirable qualifications for the role:

  • Candidate must possess at least Diploma/Bachelor's Degree in Finance/Accounting or equivalent

  • Fresh graduated or at least 1-2 Year(s) of working experience in the related field is required for this position

Impact and Key Deliverables:

  • To perform daily accounting duties of the account receivable, account payable, general ledger and bank reconciliation.

  • Manage daily accounting function of the account receivables including prepare sales order, invoices, credit notes and statement of accounts.

  • Assist in the credit control and collection of customers’ payment, including sending reminder.

  • Handle a high volume of transactions and ensure accuracy, timeliness, and compliance

  • Identify opportunities to enhance operational efficiency and automate processes by leveraging IT systems or AI tools

  • Assist in update and maintains of the project management system

  • Assist in month-end closing and general accounts administration

  • Perform ad-hoc assignments as required

  • Collaborate with team members to support various departments and activities on a daily basis Essential personal attributes and behavioural traits the individual must possess.

  • Desire and ability to work independently, to drive the regional office concept.

  • Able to demonstrate an ability to influence and persuade at all levels.

  • Strong character who’s able to remain motivated and motivate others whilst working independently and remotely

  • Shall be capable of working under pressure

  • Highly motivated; eager to contribute to an effective team operation

  • Reliable and responsible, shows attention to detail.

  • Strong analytical, interpersonal and negotiation skills.

  • Must work at all times in the best interest of the COMPANY and CLIENT.

  • Must have good written and verbal communication skills and be able to effectively communicate with staff, management, customers and vendors. 

  • Being multi-lingual is preferred.

  • Must possess sound reasoning skills and have the ability to follow directions

  • Ability to deal with different types of people and speak with tact and diplomacy

  • Must have the ability to communicate effectively with both technical and non-technical staff in a multi-cultural environment.

  • Able to work independently and remotely.

  • Demonstrated mindset for continuous improvement, with the ability to leverage digital tools and AI to optimize processes

job_description: Plan and manage all the macroeconomic and banking research in the major industrial economies and its linkages with Malaysia as well as to the Bank including assessing global and domestic development, emerging risks and impact, forecasting trends and outlook as well as leading research to provide the Bank with a better understanding of latest issues affecting growth prospects.Gathering financial and economic data, advising organizations on effective business and financial decisions.Perform modelling exercise related to forecasting.Job Requirements:Bachelor’s Degree in Economics/Banking/Finance/Statistics/Accountancy/Business Administration in other equivalent professional qualification.Working experience in the economic and financial areas of at least 5 years.Experience in assisting Bank’s management in business strategies formulation is an added advantage.Sound theoretical knowledge in macroeconomic policies and concepts particularly in monetary, international and financial economics.Ability to understand macro-financial linkages and its interaction with macro policies and the real economy.Able to produce written output (including research papers) within the stipulated deadline.
raw_html:
1. Plan and manage all the macroeconomic and banking research in the major industrial economies and its linkages with Malaysia as well as to the Bank including assessing global and domestic development, emerging risks and impact, forecasting trends and outlook as well as leading research to provide the Bank with a better understanding of latest issues affecting growth prospects.

  2. Gathering financial and economic data, advising organizations on effective business and financial decisions.

  3. Perform modelling exercise related to forecasting.


Job Requirements:

  1. Bachelor’s Degree in Economics/Banking/Finance/Statistics/Accountancy/Business Administration in other equivalent professional qualification.

  2. Working experience in the economic and financial areas of at least 5 years.

  3. Experience in assisting Bank’s management in business strategies formulation is an added advantage.

  4. Sound theoretical knowledge in macroeconomic policies and concepts particularly in monetary, international and financial economics.

  5. Ability to understand macro-financial linkages and its interaction with macro policies and the real economy.

  6. Able to produce written output (including research papers) within the stipulated deadline.

job_description: We are seeking a detail-oriented and analytical Finance Business Analyst to support financial planning, reporting, and business decision-making across the organization. This role requires strong financial analysis capabilities, business partnering skills, and experience with ERP systems such as SAP or Oracle Financials to support client solutioning, requirement gathering, and end-to-end project documentation, specifically within Mobile Virtual Network Operator (MVNO) services, cloud services, and bulk SMS services. raw_html:
We are seeking a detail-oriented and analytical Finance Business Analyst to support financial planning, reporting, and business decision-making across the organization. The successful candidate will be responsible for analyzing financial performance, preparing budgets and forecasts, improving financial processes, and providing actionable insights to drive profitability and operational efficiency. This role requires strong financial analysis capabilities, business partnering skills, and experience with ERP systems such as SAP or Oracle Financials to support client solutioning, requirement gathering, and end-to-end project documentation, specifically within Mobile Virtual Network Operator (MVNO) services, cloud services, and bulk SMS services. This role plays a critical bridge between business needs and technical execution, working closely with clients as well as internal stakeholders across product, technology, compliance, and operations.


Key Responsibilities

  • Prepare accurate and timely financial reports and management dashboards to support business decision-making.

  • Develop and manage annual budgets and periodic forecasts, ensuring alignment with business objectives.

  • Prepare comprehensive documentation including BRDs, FRDs, user journeys, process flows, and UAT scenarios

  • Conduct detailed profit and loss analysis to identify performance drivers, risks, and opportunities for improvement.

  • Perform revenue analysis to evaluate business performance, pricing strategies, and growth drivers.

  • Analyze revenue trends and business performance to support growth strategies and profitability.

  • Identify and recommend cost-saving opportunities to improve operational efficiency and financial performance.

  • Leverage ERP systems to enhance financial reporting, analysis, and process efficiency.

  • Ensure accurate and timely preparation of regulatory reports in compliance with applicable standards and requirements.

  • Build and maintain financial models to support strategic planning, investment evaluation, and business decisions.

  • Act as a coordination point across business, technology, compliance, and operations teams to ensure alignment

  • Develop high-quality PowerPoint presentations and materials for client discussions and stakeholder engagements


Requirements

  • 2–5 years of experience in financial analysis, FP&A, business finance, or a related role.

  • Bachelor's Degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, Business Administration, or a related field.

  • Professional qualification (ACCA, CPA, CIMA, CFA, or equivalent) is an advantage.

  • Experience with SAP, Oracle Financials, or other ERP systems.

  • Strong understanding of financial reporting, budgeting, forecasting, and accounting principles.

  • Experience in financial modelling and business performance analysis.

  • Prior exposure to payments, fintech, e-wallets, banking, or other regulated financial services environments

  • Strong analytical thinking with the ability to break down complex business needs into actionable requirements

  • Experience supporting proposals, client-facing documentation, or presentation deck preparation is a plus

  • Ability to work in a fast-paced, cross-functional environment with multiple stakeholders

Position Objective

According to the business changes and needs, provide a proper system functional solution with estimation by assessing and analyzing those changes, capture and document requirements as functional specification, support the communication and delivery of these requirements with relevant parties and conduct system briefing and user training while needed. Produce BRD (business requirement document) for project at small scale, lead user interface (UI) design, write testing plan and conduct testing to ensure system implementation/ enhancement is meeting business needs.


Roles & Responsibilities

  • Work with developers to support end user acceptance testing.

  • Work with Project Manager to control and follow-up User requirement change.

  • Work with business parties to confirm delivery schedule and follow up the system implementation. Conduct system demonstration while needed.

  • Conduct User training while needed

  • Work as junior BA’s mentor

Job Requirements

  • BA experience (>= 3 years full time BA) and skills in new projects and in BAU enhancements.

  • Presentation skills

  • Good understanding of SDLC and BA process

  • Basic Project management skills

  • Insurance BA or Financial BA experience

  • PPT skills

Job Opening in KL: Business Reporting Associate Analysts Wanted!

Your new company

A chemical manufacturing company, with a well-established supply chain hub in Kuala Lumpur. They are looking for a Business Reporting Associate Analyst as they expand the hub and to take on global projects.




Your new role

  • Deliver accurate and timely financial/business reporting in line with company policies and compliance standards.
  • Manage month-end closing, inventory valuation, cost accounting, and budgeting activities.
  • Perform financial analysis (cost variances, Plan vs Actual) and provide insights to stakeholders.
  • Ensure data accuracy across material ledger, pricing, and financial records.
  • Resolve reporting issues and support team members as needed.




What you'll need to succeed

  • University degree in finance and accounting or business studies
  • Minimum 2 years' experience in finance and accounting functions, preferably in Business Reporting.
  • Minimum 2 years' experience in General Ledger, R2R, cycle maintenance experience
  • Ideally, experience in overhead management or product costing
  • Mandarin is preferred due to China's portfolio.




What you need to do now

If you're interested in this role, click 'apply now' to forward an up-to-date copy of your CV.

This includes design automated workflows for all the automated reports, and processes.Close engagement with Group Data & Artificial Intelligence (GDAI) team, Technology team, users and stakeholders to ride on the existing platform in supporting the data-mart for CMSP and CBPA.Manage the documentation of processes and procedures on automated reports, including to consolidate all CMSP reports into a structured, documented, and categorized inventory by creating a clear technical documentation (data source, logics, scripts).Good risk mitigation planning by establishing backup processes and version controls to ensure continuity in case of staff turnover or unforeseen incidents.Ability to support and provide basic training to internal staff to support the automation processes.Support the automation needs of information/reports identified by the teams within CMSP with improvement on turnaround time.Support information needs for initiative identified by CBPA that requires extensive programming and automation.Reduce manual reporting effort, decrease report generation time, to improve data accuracy and consistency, and to reduce key-person dependency risk.Tracking and produce % of reports automated within stipulated timeline, number of redundant reports eliminated, and TAT improvement for report generation and ad-hoc requests.
raw_html:
This role provides expertise through application of software tools and Business Intelligence (BI) platform to facilitate optimization of reporting processes across the Unit to reduce manual workload in supporting the demanding needs from the Businesses/Stakeholders with faster turn-around time. The role will automate, standardize, and centralize reporting processes across the unit, reducing manual effort, eliminating key-person dependency, and improving reporting efficiency, accuracy, and scalability.

Description for Internal Candidates

  1. Support other Unit to manage and optimize data/information requirement needs for their reports to ensure compliance and accuracy in reporting within Consumer MIS and Sales Performance (CMSP) scope.

  2. Manage and support the automation of processes and reports for the Unit in CMSP. To discuss, streamline, provide proposal to the related automation requirements within CMSP by converting existing manual and Qlikview base reports into scalable solutions using tools like Python, SAS, or modern BI platforms.

  3. Improve reports SLA and turnaround time  with implemented automation programs/scripts to reduce manual intervention and improve the data preparation process. This includes design automated workflows for all the automated reports, and processes.

  4. Close engagement with Group Data & Artificial Intelligence (GDAI) team, Technology team, users and stakeholders to ride on the existing platform in supporting the data-mart for CMSP and CBPA.

  5. Manage the documentation of processes and procedures on automated reports, including to consolidate all CMSP reports into a structured, documented, and categorized inventory by creating a clear technical documentation (data source, logics, scripts).

  6. Good risk mitigation planning by establishing backup processes and version controls to ensure continuity in case of staff turnover or unforeseen incidents.

  7. Ability to support and provide basic training to internal staff to support the automation processes.

  8. Support the automation needs of information/reports identified by the teams within CMSP with improvement on turnaround time.

  9. Support information needs for initiative identified by CBPA that requires extensive programming and automation.

  10. Reduce manual reporting effort, decrease report generation time, to improve data accuracy and consistency, and to reduce key-person dependency risk.

  11. Tracking and produce % of reports automated within stipulated timeline, number of redundant reports eliminated, and TAT improvement for report generation and ad-hoc requests.

raw_html:
Join Our Team!

We are looking for a detail-oriented and analytical Executive – eKYC to support and enhance our digital customer onboarding and identity verification processes. This role offers an exciting opportunity to work closely with system enhancements, quality assurance, compliance monitoring, and process improvement initiatives within our Credit Assessment Department. If you enjoy problem-solving, data analysis, system testing, and ensuring operational excellence, we would love to hear from you.

Key Responsibilities

  • Conduct regular eKYC quality assurance and sampling reviews to ensure compliance with internal policies and regulatory requirements.

  • Identify, investigate, and report discrepancies or anomalies detected during eKYC reviews.

  • Maintain accurate documentation of review findings and corrective actions.

  • Prepare reports and analysis for management and audit purposes.

  • Support continuous improvement initiatives to enhance eKYC processes and operational efficiency.

  • Manage end-to-end User Acceptance Testing (UAT), including test script preparation, test execution, issue tracking, and resolution.

  • Support testing activities for system enhancements and new eKYC solutions.

  • Analyse operational data and business information to identify opportunities for process improvements.

  • Ensure data accuracy, integrity, and confidentiality in all assigned tasks.

  • Collaborate with internal stakeholders to support business and regulatory requirements.

Requirements

  • Bachelor's Degree in Banking, Finance, Business Administration, Economics, Information Technology, or related disciplines.

  • Minimum 1 year of working experience in operations, credit assessment, compliance, quality assurance, system testing, or related fields.

  • Fresh graduates with strong academic achievements and relevant internship experience are encouraged to apply.

  • Experience in eKYC, digital onboarding, UAT testing, quality assurance, or process improvement will be an added advantage.

  • Basic SQL knowledge for data extraction and analysis, programming, or system testing is an added advantage.

  • Good command of English and Bahasa Malaysia.

  • Strong analytical, problem-solving, and organizational skills.

  • Able to work independently and manage multiple tasks within tight timelines.

  • Detail-oriented with a high level of accuracy and integrity.

We are seeking a Senior Financial Analyst to join our global FP&A team, where innovation knows no borders. This team helps commercial leaders understand performance and make sharper investment choices across the Asia-Pacific region. By connecting financial analysis with business insights, the team supports growth across the travel agency business. With an inclusive culture and flexible work environment, we work together with boldness, curiosity and commitment so we can all win together.

As a Senior Financial Analyst, you will manage financial planning, forecasting and commercial analysis to support our regional travel agency business. Operating with minimal review, you will influence regional success by turning financial data into clear business actions.   • Minimum 8 years of experience in financial planning and analysis, commercial finance or a related role.

  • Proven stakeholder management skills with the ability to influence cross-functional decisions.

  • Demonstrated proficiency creating dashboards using Power BI or Qlik to improve data visibility.

  • Practical experience using generative AI, automation or analytics tools to enhance reporting productivity.

Benefits that support you

We know support looks different for everyone. That is why Sabre offers benefits beyond medical and financial coverage, with programs designed to support your well-being, growth and life outside work:

  • Competitive pay and performance-based bonuses

  • Flexible work options

  • Comprehensive healthcare coverage

  • Generous PTO and holidays

  • Strong retirement planning support

  • Family-friendly benefits

  • Professional development opportunities

raw_html:
At Xevera, we deliver AI-powered, multilingual customer support for one of the world’s leading multi-asset brokers. 

Since 2018, our team of 1,000+ people from 62 nationalities has empowered over 1 million clients in 130+ countries to trade with confidence—combining 27 languages, human care, fintech expertise and cutting-edge tech.

Why this role matters

Collect, process, and analyze data to generate actionable insights supporting data-driven decision-making across the Client Relationships & Service Division. The role involves identifying trends, uncovering patterns, causal Inference  and creating visualizations or reports to communicate findings effectively to stakeholders, driving improvements in operations, strategy, and performance.

The role is based in our office in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia. In case of relocation, we offer full relocation support for you and your family to make your move smooth and worry-free.

You will:

  • To define/improve metrics representing the product’s performance and operations efficiency

  • Collect data from multiple sources, ensuring its accuracy and completeness.

  • Clean, organize, and transform raw data into usable formats for analysis.

  • To search for inefficiencies and suggest solutions

  • To assess solutions through backtesting, A/B testing and modeling

  • To know well the data landscape and collaborate with Data Engineers to improve it

What makes you a great fit:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Data Science, Computer Science, Statistics, Mathematics, or a related field.

  • 4+ years of hands-on experience in data science.

  • Comprehensive understanding of mathematical statistics and probability theory.

  • Proficiency in SQL and Python (pandas, visualization and ML packages).

  • Expertise in machine learning and math modeling, enabling analysis and interpretation of data for informed decision-making.

  • Strong proficiency in causal inference methods and a proven track record of A/B test design and result interpretation.

Nice to have:

  • Experience with Spark

  • Experience with Metabase and Grafana

  • Experience working in Agile environments or collaborating with development teams

Soft Skills:

  • Acting as a team player

  • Highly organized and rigorous thinker, able to solve problems diligently and creatively

  • Detail-oriented and result-oriented individual

  • Absolutely quick learner, able to work independently

  • Able to adapt to constant requirement changes and produce fast solutions

What we offer along the way:

  • Competitive and attractive compensation

  • Extensive learning opportunities, such as professional training and certifications, soft skills development, free English courses, and trading workshops

  • Health and life insurance for employees, spouses, and children, including vaccinations, tests, mental health care, and coverage for vision and dental care

  • Generous time off, including 21 days of annual leave and paid sick leave

  • Allowance for sports club memberships or other physical exercise activities

  • Holiday flight tickets and accommodation coverage (within the yearly limit)

  • Meal and transportation allowance

  • Education allowance for your children’s school and kindergarten fees

  • Outstanding team-building experiences and corporate parties

Your journey after applying:

  1. TA interview (up to 30 minutes)

  2. English Assessment (30 minutes)

  3. Technical Interview (1 hour)

  4. Task Assessment (up to 5 days)

  5. Task Assessment discussion (30 mins)

  6. Behavioural interview (1 hour)


#GBA

job_description: Role OverviewAs our Business Analyst, you will take complete ownership of defining detailed user flows, creating UI/UX wireframes, and managing the end-to-end User Acceptance Testing (UAT) process. Your focus will span across optimizing current remittance and bill payment features as well as mapping out upcoming DuitNow and cross-border payment modules.Key Responsibilities* Functional Documentation & Specification: Translate high-level Product Requirement Documents (PRDs) into detailed Functional Specification Documents (FSDs), user stories, system use cases, and technical step-by-step logic maps.* UI/UX Wireframing & Journey Mapping: Design intuitive UI/UX wireframes, mockups, and end-to-end user journey maps for e-wallet features (e.g., remittance onboarding, checkout screens, and DuitNow transaction flows).* UAT Management & Documentation: Define and document structured UAT test plans and test cases to ensure payment systems are reliable, secure, and bug-free before deployment.* Process & Logic Mapping: Map out complex transaction flows, settlement processes, and API integration logics for card reloads, utility billing, ongoing remittance expansions, and upcoming DuitNow services.* Production Support & Triage: Act as the first point of contact for production issues, analyzing transaction failures or system anomalies and translating them into technical tickets for the development team.* Stakeholder Alignment: Coordinate closely with Developers, QA Engineers, Compliance officers, and external partners (such as PayNet or bill aggregators) to clear blockers and clarify business logic.* Agile Story Writing: Break down specifications into precise Agile User Stories and Acceptance Criteria within Github for the engineering team.---Requirements & Qualifications* Experience: Minimum of 2–4 years of experience as a Business Analyst, Systems Analyst, or QA Analyst, preferably within FinTech, E-wallets, Remittance, or Digital Payment sectors.* Domain Knowledge: Familiarity with digital payment processes (e.g., FPX, credit/debit card processing, utility bill aggregation). Knowledge of PayNet frameworks (DuitNow) or remittance systems is highly advantageous.* Documentation Skills: Mastery in drafting highly technical FSDs / SRS, mapping detailed user flows, and writing clear Github User Stories.* Technical & Tools Proficiency:* Proficient in wireframing and prototyping tools (e.g., Figma, Balsamiq, Sketch, or Adobe XD).* Experience with Agile project management tools (e.g., Github, Jira, Confluence).* Basic understanding of APIs, JSON structures, and system integration concepts.* Analytical Skillset: Strong ability to analyze complex data, map complicated business rules, and spot edge-case scenarios in transaction flows.* Education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Business Information Systems, Information Technology, or a related field.Soft Skills We Look For* Meticulous attention to detail—nothing slips past your documentation or test cases.* Excellent communication skills to seamlessly translate business needs to technical teams.* A collaborative mindset that pairs effectively with Product Managers and Developers in a fast-paced environment.
raw_html:
Role Overview

As our Business Analyst, you will take complete ownership of defining detailed user flows, creating UI/UX wireframes, and managing the end-to-end User Acceptance Testing (UAT) process. Your focus will span across optimizing current remittance and bill payment features as well as mapping out upcoming DuitNow and cross-border payment modules.

Key Responsibilities

* Functional Documentation & Specification: Translate high-level Product Requirement Documents (PRDs) into detailed Functional Specification Documents (FSDs), user stories, system use cases, and technical step-by-step logic maps.

* UI/UX Wireframing & Journey Mapping: Design intuitive UI/UX wireframes, mockups, and end-to-end user journey maps for e-wallet features (e.g., remittance onboarding, checkout screens, and DuitNow transaction flows).

* UAT Management & Documentation: Define and document structured UAT test plans and test cases to ensure payment systems are reliable, secure, and bug-free before deployment.

* Process & Logic Mapping: Map out complex transaction flows, settlement processes, and API integration logics for card reloads, utility billing, ongoing remittance expansions, and upcoming DuitNow services.

* Production Support & Triage: Act as the first point of contact for production issues, analyzing transaction failures or system anomalies and translating them into technical tickets for the development team.

* Stakeholder Alignment: Coordinate closely with Developers, QA Engineers, Compliance officers, and external partners (such as PayNet or bill aggregators) to clear blockers and clarify business logic.

* Agile Story Writing: Break down specifications into precise Agile User Stories and Acceptance Criteria within Github for the engineering team.

---

Requirements & Qualifications

* Experience: Minimum of 2–4 years of experience as a Business Analyst, Systems Analyst, or QA Analyst, preferably within FinTech, E-wallets, Remittance, or Digital Payment sectors.

* Domain Knowledge: Familiarity with digital payment processes (e.g., FPX, credit/debit card processing, utility bill aggregation). Knowledge of PayNet frameworks (DuitNow) or remittance systems is highly advantageous.

* Documentation Skills: Mastery in drafting highly technical FSDs / SRS, mapping detailed user flows, and writing clear Github User Stories.

* Technical & Tools Proficiency:

* Proficient in wireframing and prototyping tools (e.g., Figma, Balsamiq, Sketch, or Adobe XD).

* Experience with Agile project management tools (e.g., Github, Jira, Confluence).

* Basic understanding of APIs, JSON structures, and system integration concepts.

* Analytical Skillset: Strong ability to analyze complex data, map complicated business rules, and spot edge-case scenarios in transaction flows.

* Education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Business Information Systems, Information Technology, or a related field.

Soft Skills We Look For

* Meticulous attention to detail—nothing slips past your documentation or test cases.

* Excellent communication skills to seamlessly translate business needs to technical teams.

* A collaborative mindset that pairs effectively with Product Managers and Developers in a fast-paced environment.

raw_html:
Job Responsibility:

Report Development and Maintenance

  • Collaborate with key stakeholders to collect and analyze requirements on Dashboard/reports. 

  • Provide in-depth data analysis and dashboard designing.

  • Design, develop and build PBI report to support complex business scenarios. 

  • Maintain and monitor PBI Dashboard on regular basis to ensure data accuracy and completeness.

  • Continue optimizing logic and stability to ensure high performance, scalability, and reliability.

  • Collaborate with cross team, implement relative changes as required

Data Analysis and Monitoring

  • Perform Data Analysis and monitor execution result, provide insightful analysis on operation KPIs. 

  • Take proper action on abnormal performance indicator to ensure Biz Operating healthy 

  • Prepare comprehensive reports (with driver base variance analysis) for management review and support decision making.

  • Conduct regular review and report processes, ensuring key operation indicators are on track and on target Identify opportunities for process improvements and efficiencies with team. 

  • Implement best practices and tools to improve efficiency and enhance reporting and analysis capabilities

Daily Operation Support

  • Conduct regular health check on IT tickets management process to ensure meet compliance requirements.

  • Co-work and collaborate with multiple teams to implement key management directions.

  • Conduct various ad hoc activities as requested by management and key stakeholders to support strategic initiatives

Job Requirements:

  • Bachelor's Degree in Data Analytics, Statistics, Computer Science, Business Analytics, or related field.

  • 2–3 years of experience in Data Analytics, Business Intelligence, or Reporting roles.

  • Strong hands-on experience with Power BI (dashboard development, data modeling, DAX, Power Query).

  • Proficient in SQL and Microsoft Excel for data analysis and reporting.

  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with attention to detail.

  • Good communication and stakeholder management skills.

  • Able to work independently and collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams.

  • Experience with process improvement, data quality management, or automation initiatives is an advantage.

rhi is recruiting for a Business Analyst to join our clients team based in Mercu Aspire KL Eco City. This is a contract position until the 1st Dec 2026 - maternity cover.

raw_html:
Role Purpose:

We are looking for a high-calibre Account/Finance Executive with strong work ethic, passion for excellence, good organizational skills and attention to details to join our regional office.

Necessary skills for the role:

  • Knowledge in the use of MS Excel, MS Word and other Accounting software.

  • Analytical, hardworking, detail-mined and logical thinking

  • Ability to manage and process a high volume of transactions accurately and efficiently

  • Proactive in identifying opportunities to improve processes through the use of IT solutions or AI technologies

  • Good team players with effective communication and interpersonal skills

  • Mature, proactive, independent and able to work under pressure

  • Good command of spoken Cantonese/Mandarin and Fluent in English

Desirable qualifications for the role:

  • Candidate must possess at least Diploma/Bachelor's Degree in Finance/Accounting or equivalent

  • Fresh graduated or at least 1-2 Year(s) of working experience in the related field is required for this position

Impact and Key Deliverables:

  • To perform daily accounting duties of the account receivable, account payable, general ledger and bank reconciliation.

  • Manage daily accounting function of the account receivables including prepare sales order, invoices, credit notes and statement of accounts.

  • Assist in the credit control and collection of customers’ payment, including sending reminder.

  • Handle a high volume of transactions and ensure accuracy, timeliness, and compliance

  • Identify opportunities to enhance operational efficiency and automate processes by leveraging IT systems or AI tools

  • Assist in update and maintains of the project management system

  • Assist in month-end closing and general accounts administration

  • Perform ad-hoc assignments as required

  • Collaborate with team members to support various departments and activities on a daily basis Essential personal attributes and behavioural traits the individual must possess.

  • Desire and ability to work independently, to drive the regional office concept.

  • Able to demonstrate an ability to influence and persuade at all levels.

  • Strong character who’s able to remain motivated and motivate others whilst working independently and remotely

  • Shall be capable of working under pressure

  • Highly motivated; eager to contribute to an effective team operation

  • Reliable and responsible, shows attention to detail.

  • Strong analytical, interpersonal and negotiation skills.

  • Must work at all times in the best interest of the COMPANY and CLIENT.

  • Must have good written and verbal communication skills and be able to effectively communicate with staff, management, customers and vendors. 

  • Being multi-lingual is preferred.

  • Must possess sound reasoning skills and have the ability to follow directions

  • Ability to deal with different types of people and speak with tact and diplomacy

  • Must have the ability to communicate effectively with both technical and non-technical staff in a multi-cultural environment.

  • Able to work independently and remotely.

  • Demonstrated mindset for continuous improvement, with the ability to leverage digital tools and AI to optimize processes

job_title: Financial Capital Market - Reference Data/ Market Data Analyst
job_description: This role is responsible for ensuring high-quality data management within Financial Markets Operations by maintaining timely and accurate updates of Static & Market data in respective processing systems . Business Reference Data is a critical component of Financial Market Operations, supporting Static and Market data processing across regions and various processing systems .Key Responsibilities1. Strategy & Data Quality- Ensure timely, accurate, and error-free processing of Static and Market data.- Adhere to processes and controls as detailed in the Department Operating Instructions (DOI) .- Provide high-quality Data Management by ensuring timely updates of Static & Market data in the respective processing systems.2. Business Reference Data Operations- Support Market Data Team in performing all Market Data activities.- Support Static Data Team for Static updates .- Understand Business Reference Data as an integral part of Financial Market Operations, covering Static and Market data processing across regions and various processing systems.3. Process & Daily Operations- Set up and validate rates captured across each time zone to ensure EOD (End of Day) timelines are met .- Generate and circulate Control reports, track signoffs, and escalate to Manco members if signoffs are not received as per agreed timelines .- Develop familiarity with key systems and platforms including Asset Control, Murex, Reuters, Bloomberg, and Markit .- Review and update all Department Operating Instructions (DOIs) on time.- Provide training and knowledge transfer to new joiners in the team.4. Risk & Compliance- Process and make decisions as per the Department Operating Instructions within specified timeliness and accuracy standards.- Ensure compliance with all applicable rules, regulations, and Group Policies.- Uphold Group KYC, AML, and Sanctions Policy / Procedures to the extent applicable and report all suspicious transactions to the Line Manager .- Contribute to the development of a control framework to ensure compliance with internal policies and procedures.5. Projects & Stakeholder Management- Assist the team by participating in various projects.- Represent Market Data Team in Project Calls and Book of Work Calls.- Maintain a close working relationship with stakeholders to ensure service issues are promptly escalated and acted upon.Key RequirementsEducation - Bachelor's degree or equivalent.Experience- 3-7 years of relevant experience in banking operations, particularly in Financial Markets or Reference Data operations.Technical Skills & Knowledge- Bloomberg and Refinitiv – proficiency required .- Asset Control, Murex, Reuters, Markit – familiarity with these systems is highly preferred .- Financial Products Knowledge – understanding of Financial Markets products including FX, OTC derivatives, equities, fixed income, etc.- Systems: Proficiency in MS Office (Excel pivots, lookups).Soft Skills- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.- Good communication skills (verbal and written).- Ability to collaborate and work in a team environment.- Self-motivated, proactive, and detail-oriented.- Ability to work under pressure and meet tight deadlines.
raw_html:
This role is responsible for ensuring high-quality data management within Financial Markets Operations by maintaining timely and accurate updates of Static & Market data in respective processing systems . Business Reference Data is a critical component of Financial Market Operations, supporting Static and Market data processing across regions and various processing systems .

Key Responsibilities
1. Strategy & Data Quality
- Ensure timely, accurate, and error-free processing of Static and Market data.
- Adhere to processes and controls as detailed in the Department Operating Instructions (DOI) .
- Provide high-quality Data Management by ensuring timely updates of Static & Market data in the respective processing systems.

2. Business Reference Data Operations
- Support Market Data Team in performing all Market Data activities.
- Support Static Data Team for Static updates .
- Understand Business Reference Data as an integral part of Financial Market Operations, covering Static and Market data processing across regions and various processing systems.

3. Process & Daily Operations
- Set up and validate rates captured across each time zone to ensure EOD (End of Day) timelines are met .
- Generate and circulate Control reports, track signoffs, and escalate to Manco members if signoffs are not received as per agreed timelines .
- Develop familiarity with key systems and platforms including Asset Control, Murex, Reuters, Bloomberg, and Markit .
- Review and update all Department Operating Instructions (DOIs) on time.
- Provide training and knowledge transfer to new joiners in the team.

4. Risk & Compliance
- Process and make decisions as per the Department Operating Instructions within specified timeliness and accuracy standards.
- Ensure compliance with all applicable rules, regulations, and Group Policies.
- Uphold Group KYC, AML, and Sanctions Policy / Procedures to the extent applicable and report all suspicious transactions to the Line Manager .
- Contribute to the development of a control framework to ensure compliance with internal policies and procedures.

5. Projects & Stakeholder Management
- Assist the team by participating in various projects.
- Represent Market Data Team in Project Calls and Book of Work Calls.
- Maintain a close working relationship with stakeholders to ensure service issues are promptly escalated and acted upon.

Key Requirements
Education
- Bachelor's degree or equivalent.

Experience
- 3-7 years of relevant experience in banking operations, particularly in Financial Markets or Reference Data operations.

Technical Skills & Knowledge
- Bloomberg and Refinitiv – proficiency required .
- Asset Control, Murex, Reuters, Markit – familiarity with these systems is highly preferred .
- Financial Products Knowledge – understanding of Financial Markets products including FX, OTC derivatives, equities, fixed income, etc.
- Systems: Proficiency in MS Office (Excel pivots, lookups).

Soft Skills
- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
- Good communication skills (verbal and written).
- Ability to collaborate and work in a team environment.
- Self-motivated, proactive, and detail-oriented.
- Ability to work under pressure and meet tight deadlines.

job_description:
At Zurich, we rely on insightful data to power our systems and solutions. We’re seeking an experienced data scientist to deliver insights on a daily basis. The ideal candidate will have mathematical and statistical expertise, a natural curiosity, and a creative mind. While mining, interpreting, and cleaning our data, this person will be relied on to ask questions, connect the dots, and uncover hidden opportunities for realizing the data’s full potential. As part of a team of specialists, the data scientist will “slice and dice” data using various methods and create new visions for the future.

Objectives of this role


Collaborate with product design and engineering teams to develop an understanding of needs. 
Research and devise innovative statistical models for data analysis, including advanced AI techniques such as LLMs and Agentic AI. 
Communicate findings to all stakeholders. 
Enable smarter business processes by using analytics for meaningful insights. 
Keep current with technical and industry developments, especially in generative AI and autonomous agent systems.


Responsibilities


Serve as data strategist to identify and integrate new datasets that can be leveraged through our product capabilities, and work closely with the engineering team in the development of data products. 
Execute analytical experiments to help solve problems across various domains and industries. 
Identify relevant data sources and sets to mine for client business needs, and collect large structured and unstructured datasets and variables. 
Devise and utilize algorithms and models to mine big-data stores; perform data and error analysis to improve models; clean and validate data for uniformity and accuracy. 
Analyze data for trends and patterns, and interpret data with clear objectives in mind. 
Implement analytical models/machine learning, including LLMs and agentic AI solutions, in production by collaborating with software developers and IT team. 
Utilize Azure technologies like Azure Cognitive Technologies, Azure Machine Learning, and Azure Bot Services to design, create, and deploy AI-based applications. 
Develop, fine-tune, and deploy large language models and agentic AI systems for automation, knowledge extraction, and conversational AI use cases. 
Stay updated with the latest advancements in generative AI, prompt engineering, and autonomous agents.


Required skills and qualifications

Three or more years of experience in data science or proven experience. 
Advanced experience in pattern recognition, predictive modeling, and generative AI (LLMs, transformers, etc.). 
Hands-on experience with LLM frameworks (e.g., Hugging Face Transformers, LangChain, OpenAI APIs). 
Familiarity with agentic AI concepts and frameworks (e.g., AutoGPT, BabyAGI, CrewAI). 
Ability to work effectively in a dynamic, research-oriented group that has several concurrent projects. 
Experience in data mining. 
Understanding of machine learning, deep learning, and operations research. 
Knowledge of R, SQL, and Python; familiarity with Scala, Java. 
Experience using business intelligence tools (e.g., Power BI) and data frameworks (e.g., Azure, AWS, Hadoop, RDMS). 
Analytical mind and business acumen. 
Strong math skills  
Problem-solving aptitude. 
Excellent communication and presentation skills. 
BSc/BA in Computer Science, Engineering, or relevant field; graduate degree in Data Science or other quantitative field is preferred. 
Able to multitask and manage projects with minimal supervision. 
Professional certification.



You are the heart & soul of Zurich! 

At Zurich, we like to think outside the box and challenge the status quo. We take an optimistic approach by focusing on the positives and constantly asking What can go right?

We highly value the experience and know-how of our employees and offer a wide range of opportunities across business areas to encourage you to apply for new opportunities within Zurich when you are ready for your next career step.

Let’s continue to grow together!

Location(s): MY - Kuala Lumpur Recruiter name: Caroline Louis

COMPANY OVERVIEW

With a culture rooted in innovation, Glory’s people are transforming our customer’s businesses every day. Our automation solutions empower retailers, restaurants and financial institutions to save time, money, and deliver unrivalled customer experiences. Publicly listed and proudly international, Glory has been a trusted name for over 100 years, and a global leader for more than a decade. This reputation is built on our pioneering software and hardware combined with our dynamic people. Alongside our technology, it’s our people who drive our success. 

PURPOSE OF THE ROLE

To assist the FP&A team in delivering financial support (control, analysis and reporting) to the CFO and the wider

Executive team with focus and responsibility of specific HQ overhead functions.

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

  • Following analysis of actual results, prepare month end journals for accrual, prepayments and corrections for head office cost centres

  • Prepare and issue details of actual expenditure versus forecast and budget to central cost centre managers

  • Prepare month end analysis and commentary for overheads, including variances to budget and forecast for the International Business for inclusion in the main Executive Board reporting pack

  • Collate input and assumptions and act as finance business partner for HQ functions in the preparation of head office budgets and forecasts

  • Prepare function specific monthly reporting

  • Assist in reviewing regional performance for actual results, forecasts and budgets

  • Additional analysis and reporting tasks as required

KEY INTERFACES

  • IBHQ Cost centre owners

  • IBHQ & Regional Finance teams

  • Sales teams for transfer pricing

EDUCATIONAL QUALIFICATIONS / TRAINING

  • Ideally have experience working in a multinational finance function

  • Ideally educated to degree level

  • Ideally part/newly qualified CIMA/ACCA

REQUIRED SKILLS AND ABILITIES

  • Good analytical and data presentation skills

  • English speaking, with the ability to communicate knowledgeably and professionally with senior operatives within the business

  • Reasonable understanding of financial management, financial forecasting, budgeting and reporting

  • A team player, they will be highly self-motivated and organised, have a high attention to detail and be able to work under pressure in light of tight deadlines

  • Demonstrate ability to pro-actively suggest improvements to existing processes

  • Strong Excel skills & Power BI an advantage

  • Japanese language skills advantageous given role stakeholders

Working Hours (Monday to Friday)

Country Time Zone      Start      End
Malaysia                         11am      8pm

job_description:
Company Description

SEEK is a place where potential meets possibility – it’s where your career aspiration and our purpose can make great things happen.Why join us? raw_html:
Company Description

About SEEK

At SEEK, we serve a noble purpose: to help people live more productive and fulfilling working lives and to help organisations succeed.

By joining us, you’ll be part of a multinational technology business that is far-reaching with a start-up working culture that focuses on a set of collaborative values and appreciates dynamic cultures. SEEK is a place where potential meets possibility – it’s where your career aspiration and our purpose can make great things happen.

Why join us?

Be part of a multinational tech company with strong core values to help us solve complex challenges while building a flexible, exciting career – one that could take you anywhere. We’re looking for people who thrive in dynamic teams and enjoy tackling regular new challenges in a large-scale, modern, and agile environment.

As one of Asia Pacific’s largest tech companies, you’ll contribute to multilingual systems, solving high-impact problems to the benefit of millions of people within the region. Be part of a fast-growing company with a strong culture and clear purpose, innovation and strong investment in responsible AI. SEEK offers you the opportunity to be involved in impactful work and be part of a great team.

Expect a great investment in your career development with access to workshops, conferences & courses while you work alongside seasoned experts.

Job Description

Join SEEK's Data Enablement function as a Data Enablement Lead. You will unlock the value of SEEK's data by improving how it is discovered, understood, and used across the organisation. Reporting to the Head of Data Enablement, you will translate strategy into execution, working across product, engineering, and business teams to enable self-serve analytics, trusted data foundations, and AI-driven use cases. Your focus: drive adoption, improve data usability, and enable confident decision-making and innovation.

The Role

  • Drive execution of SEEK's Data Enablement strategy into measurable initiatives
  • Shape solutions that improve data discoverability, usability, and trust
  • Design capabilities like data discovery tools, metadata frameworks, semantic layers, and glossaries
  • Strengthen data ownership, stewardship, and "data as a product" practices with domain teams
  • Identify and prioritise opportunities to improve data health, accessibility, and user experience
  • Support adoption of metadata, quality, and lifecycle controls with governance partners
  • Drive data literacy by uplifting skills across analyst and product communities
  • Lead through influence in a federated model, aligning stakeholders and driving change

Your work enables faster, safer, more effective use of data across SEEK — powering decision-making and next-gen AI.

Qualifications

What we're looking for:

  • Experience in data enablement, analytics, or data platforms in complex environments
  • Strong understanding of modern data ecosystems, architecture patterns, and semantic layers
  • Ability to engage analysts, data scientists, engineers, and business stakeholders
  • Experience improving data discoverability, metadata, or self-serve analytics at scale
  • Strong stakeholder management and influencing skills without direct authority
  • Ability to translate technical concepts for non-technical audiences
  • Proven ability to prioritise by value and drive execution through distributed teams

Nice to have:

  • Experience in product-led or platform organisations
  • Familiarity with data governance or data risk practices
  • Exposure to AI/ML use cases where data foundations are critical
  • Experience scaling self-serve data platforms or "data as a product"
  • Pragmatic, outcome-focused mindset with passion for improving data use
Additional Information

At SEEK we offer:

  • Annual Performance Bonus Plan
  • Support of flexible working, including a mix of office and work from home days depending on your role.
  • Paid and unpaid leave benefits including Personal Flexi Days  as well as the opportunity to purchase additional leave
  • SEEK is committed to operating sustainably and is preparing for the impacts of climate change and the transition to a low-carbon future, and is working to minimise its environmental impacts which includes a long-term emissions reduction target of net zero by FY2050
  • The opportunity to work from anywhere for up to 4 weeks per financial year
  • SEEKer Support, a confidential service that offers employees up to six sessions with a mental health professional of your choice
  • Tailored career development planning (including Education Assistance Program)
  • Professional development sessions with industry leading guest speakers
  • Frequent events including sports days, annual Christmas party, hackathon, and trivia
  • Free kick-start breakfast every morning and fresh fruit available all day in our offices
  • Casual dress – every day

 

At SEEK, we are passionate about fostering a culture of inclusion and wellbeing that embraces and values the diversity of our people. We are a purpose driven business that works with heart.

We know teams with diverse ideas, experiences and perspectives are more creative and are critical to ensuring effective delivery and innovating to enable our future success. As such, we welcome applications from people with diverse backgrounds and life experiences, especially as they relate to gender, sexual identity, culture, faith, disability and life stages. If you have the skills, curiosity and an adaptable mindset but don't meet every responsibility or qualification listed in this advertisement, please still get in touch with us.

Should you require any specific support or adjustments throughout the recruitment process and beyond, please advise us and we will be happy to assist.

For this role, only those with eligible right to work will be considered.

SEEK kindly requests no unsolicited resumes or approaches from recruitment agencies and will not be responsible for any associated fees.

job_title: Assistant Vice President – Retail Banking Strategy & Analytics
company: Al Rajhi Banking & Investment Corporation (Malaysia) Bhd
