The role requires strong understanding of Retail Banking strategy, deep data-centric thinking, and exceptional presentation and storytelling capabilities, particularly using PowerPoint.Retail Banking Strategy & Sales Performance AnalyticsProvide data-driven insights to support Retail Banking strategy, business planning, and execution.Analyze sales performance, productivity, conversion, and portfolio growth across products and channels.Conduct sales funnel diagnostics, lead performance analysis, and customer behavior studies.Support target setting, forecasting, and performance benchmarking for Retail Banking sales teams.Identify risks, opportunities, and trends impacting revenue, efficiency, and growth.Sales Tracking & Management ReportingDesign and maintain sales tracking frameworks and KPI definitions aligned with business objectives.Build and manage management dashboards to track sales performance, branch productivity, and channel effectiveness.Ensure accuracy, consistency, and governance of sales and performance data.Partner with BI, IT, and Finance teams to ensure data readiness and integrity.Executive & Board-Level Insights and PresentationDevelop high-impact analytical decks for EXCO, senior management, and Board presentations.Translate complex analytics into simple, structured, and compelling business narratives.Provide clear recommendations and decision options, supported by data and visual storytelling.Redesign analytical content into executive-ready PowerPoint presentations with strong visual flow and messaging.Business Partnering & Strategic AdvisoryAct as a trusted analytics advisor to Sales Management, Products, Finance, and Senior Leadership.Translate business questions into analytical problem statements.Support strategic reviews, business performance deep dives, and management committees with data-backed insights.Provide market, competitor, and trend analysis where relevant to Retail Banking strategy.
raw_html:
About the job

This role is responsible for driving Retail Banking sales growth, productivity, and strategic decision making through analytics, sales performance tracking, and executive level insights.

The role acts as a strategic analytics partner to Retail Banking leadership, translating complex data into clear, actionable recommendations for senior management and Board-level discussions. The role requires strong understanding of Retail Banking strategy, deep data-centric thinking, and exceptional presentation and storytelling capabilities, particularly using PowerPoint.

Retail Banking Strategy & Sales Performance Analytics

  • Provide data-driven insights to support Retail Banking strategy, business planning, and execution.

  • Analyze sales performance, productivity, conversion, and portfolio growth across products and channels.

  • Conduct sales funnel diagnostics, lead performance analysis, and customer behavior studies.

  • Support target setting, forecasting, and performance benchmarking for Retail Banking sales teams.

  • Identify risks, opportunities, and trends impacting revenue, efficiency, and growth.

Sales Tracking & Management Reporting

  • Design and maintain sales tracking frameworks and KPI definitions aligned with business objectives.

  • Build and manage management dashboards to track sales performance, branch productivity, and channel effectiveness.

  • Ensure accuracy, consistency, and governance of sales and performance data.

  • Partner with BI, IT, and Finance teams to ensure data readiness and integrity.

Executive & Board-Level Insights and Presentation

  • Develop high-impact analytical decks for EXCO, senior management, and Board presentations.

  • Translate complex analytics into simple, structured, and compelling business narratives.

  • Provide clear recommendations and decision options, supported by data and visual storytelling.

  • Redesign analytical content into executive-ready PowerPoint presentations with strong visual flow and messaging.

Business Partnering & Strategic Advisory

  • Act as a trusted analytics advisor to Sales Management, Products, Finance, and Senior Leadership.

  • Translate business questions into analytical problem statements.

  • Support strategic reviews, business performance deep dives, and management committees with data-backed insights.

  • Provide market, competitor, and trend analysis where relevant to Retail Banking strategy.

job_description: Responsibilities:Support the review of production, order processing, inventory, and operational workflows to identify opportunities for automation and process improvement.Assist in developing and maintaining automation solutions using tools such as Power Automate, Power BI, Excel, VBA, or other digital workflow tools.Help streamline manual tasks such as job order creation, status tracking, reporting, queue coordination, and customer order follow-up.Prepare and maintain Power BI dashboards and reports to improve visibility of operational data, production progress, and workflow performance.Work closely with production and operations teams to understand business needs and translate them into practical automation or reporting solutions.Monitor existing automation flows and reporting tools, troubleshoot basic issues, and support continuous process improvement.Document workflows, process changes, and automation logic, and prepare standard operating procedures (SOPs) for internal reference.Provide user support and basic training to internal staff to encourage smooth adoption of new digital tools and automation solutions.Keep up to date with new tools and technologies relevant to automation, reporting, and digital transformation within manufacturing operations.Skills and Experience:Bachelor's degree in Information Technology, Industrial Engineering, Computer Science, Business Analytics, or a related field.Fresh graduates are encouraged to apply. Candidates with 1-3 years of relevant experience in automation, reporting, process improvement, or operations support will have an added advantage.Languages fluent English & Mandarin as this roles will required to liaise with Mandarin-speaking clients and partners (Verbal and Writing).Basic to intermediate knowledge of Power Automate, Power BI, Excel, and/or VBA.Strong analytical thinking, problem-solving skills, and attention to detail.Good communication skills and the ability to work effectively with both technical and non-technical teams.Willingness to learn and adapt in a fast-paced manufacturing or operational environment.Preferred AdvantageInternship, academic project, or working experience involving Power BI dashboards, Power Automate flows, Excel automation, or process improvement initiatives.Exposure to ERP systems, inventory systems, order management platforms, or manufacturing workflows.Experience in  printing or production-related industry is a plus.
raw_html:
Responsibilities:

  • Support the review of production, order processing, inventory, and operational workflows to identify opportunities for automation and process improvement.

  • Assist in developing and maintaining automation solutions using tools such as Power Automate, Power BI, Excel, VBA, or other digital workflow tools.

  • Help streamline manual tasks such as job order creation, status tracking, reporting, queue coordination, and customer order follow-up.

  • Prepare and maintain Power BI dashboards and reports to improve visibility of operational data, production progress, and workflow performance.

  • Work closely with production and operations teams to understand business needs and translate them into practical automation or reporting solutions.

  • Monitor existing automation flows and reporting tools, troubleshoot basic issues, and support continuous process improvement.

  • Document workflows, process changes, and automation logic, and prepare standard operating procedures (SOPs) for internal reference.

  • Provide user support and basic training to internal staff to encourage smooth adoption of new digital tools and automation solutions.

  • Keep up to date with new tools and technologies relevant to automation, reporting, and digital transformation within manufacturing operations.

Skills and Experience:

  • Bachelor's degree in Information Technology, Industrial Engineering, Computer Science, Business Analytics, or a related field.

  • Fresh graduates are encouraged to apply. Candidates with 1-3 years of relevant experience in automation, reporting, process improvement, or operations support will have an added advantage.

  • Languages fluent English & Mandarin as this roles will required to liaise with Mandarin-speaking clients and partners (Verbal and Writing).

  • Basic to intermediate knowledge of Power Automate, Power BI, Excel, and/or VBA.

  • Strong analytical thinking, problem-solving skills, and attention to detail.

  • Good communication skills and the ability to work effectively with both technical and non-technical teams.

  • Willingness to learn and adapt in a fast-paced manufacturing or operational environment.

Preferred Advantage

  • Internship, academic project, or working experience involving Power BI dashboards, Power Automate flows, Excel automation, or process improvement initiatives.

  • Exposure to ERP systems, inventory systems, order management platforms, or manufacturing workflows.

  • Experience in  printing or production-related industry is a plus.

job_description: We are looking for a Salesforce Data Cloud Specialist to manage and optimize data integration and harmonization within Salesforce Data Cloud. The candidate will ensure accurate, real-time data connectivity and segmentation to support personalized experiences across channels.Key Responsibilities:• Configure and manage Salesforce Data Cloud environments, including Data Streams and Data Model Objects (DMOs).• Design and implement identity resolution rules to unify customer profiles.• Collaborate with marketing, analytics, and IT teams to define and maintain data strategy.• Utilize Calculated Insights to support advanced audience segmentation and analytics.• Ensure data quality, privacy compliance, and governance within the CDP ecosystem.Required Skills & Qualifications:• Hands-on experience with Salesforce Data Cloud (Customer Data Platform).• Strong understanding of data ingestion, unification, and segmentation processes.• Experience with data modeling, ETL processes, and identity resolution.• Familiarity with Salesforce ecosystem including Marketing Cloud, Sales Cloud, and Service Cloud.• Strong analytical skills and understanding of data privacy regulations.• 4-5 years of experience.• Hands-on experience with Salesforce Marketing Cloud Intelligence.• Hands-on experience with reports and dashboards.
raw_html:
We are looking for a Salesforce Data Cloud Specialist to manage and optimize data integration and harmonization within Salesforce Data Cloud. The candidate will ensure accurate, real-time data connectivity and segmentation to support personalized experiences across channels.

Key Responsibilities:

• Configure and manage Salesforce Data Cloud environments, including Data Streams and Data Model Objects (DMOs).

• Design and implement identity resolution rules to unify customer profiles.

• Collaborate with marketing, analytics, and IT teams to define and maintain data strategy.

• Utilize Calculated Insights to support advanced audience segmentation and analytics.

• Ensure data quality, privacy compliance, and governance within the CDP ecosystem.


Required Skills & Qualifications:

• Hands-on experience with Salesforce Data Cloud (Customer Data Platform).

• Strong understanding of data ingestion, unification, and segmentation processes.

• Experience with data modeling, ETL processes, and identity resolution.

• Familiarity with Salesforce ecosystem including Marketing Cloud, Sales Cloud, and Service Cloud.

• Strong analytical skills and understanding of data privacy regulations.

• 4-5 years of experience.

• Hands-on experience with Salesforce Marketing Cloud Intelligence.

• Hands-on experience with reports and dashboards.

job_description:
ABOUT THE ROLE
We are seeking a meticulous and detail-oriented Data Analyst to join our team. The successful candidate will be responsible for ensuring the accuracy, consistency, and reliability of data inputted into the various systems. This role involves analyzing data, developing data quality standards, and generating comprehensive reports to support the scope and proactively improve outcomes.
WHAT YOU WILL DO

Analyze and validate data for accuracy, consistency, and integrity.
Develop and implement data quality standards and processes.
Generate data reports and presentations.
Collaborate with IT and data management teams to design and implement data strategies and models.
Use statistical tools and software to interpret and analyze data.
Monitor and update data dictionaries and metadata to ensure data consistency.
Provide technical support to team members facing data-related issues.
Recommend ways to improve data reliability, efficiency, and quality.
Conduct data cleaning to remove old, unused, or duplicate data.
Perform quality assurance tests to ensure data integrity and accuracy.
Identify, analyze, and interpret trends or patterns in complex data sets.
Work with management to prioritize business and information needs.
Locate and define new process improvement opportunities.

WHAT YOU WILL NEED

Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.
Proven experience as a Data Analyst or in a similar role.
Strong analytical skills with the ability to collect, organize, analyze, and disseminate significant amounts of information with attention to detail and accuracy.
Proficiency in data analysis tools and software (e.g., SQL, Excel, Python).
Excellent communication and presentation skills.
Ability to work collaboratively with cross-functional teams.
Knowledge of data quality management practices and standards.
Experience with data visualization tools (e.g., Tableau, Power BI).
Familiarity with data governance and compliance regulations.
Strong problem-solving skills and a proactive approach to identifying and resolving data issues.


Why CBRE
When you join CBRE, you become part of the global leader in commercial real estate services and investment that helps businesses and people thrive. We are dynamic problem solvers and forward-thinking professionals who create significant impact. Our collaborative culture is built on our shared values — respect, integrity, service and excellence — and we value the diverse perspectives, backgrounds and skillsets of our people. At CBRE, you have the opportunity to chart your own course and realize your potential. We welcome all applicants.
Applicant AI Use Disclosure
We value human interaction to understand each candidate's unique experience, skills and aspirations. We do not use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to make hiring decisions, and we ask that candidates disclose any use of AI in the application and interview process.
OUR VALUES IN HIRING
At CBRE, we are committed to fostering a culture where everyone feels they belong. We value diverse perspectives and experiences, and we welcome all applications.

job_description: We are seeking a Senior Data Engineer to lead the design and implementation of a scalable data architecture tailored to our growing application ecosystem. This is a high-impact role that requires a strong foundation in data lake and data warehouse design, along with the ability to evaluate multiple technologies and recommend the best-fit solution for our businessneeds.You will work closely with engineering, analytics, and business stakeholders to assess our current data sources, propose a unified architecture, and implement robust pipelines and storage strategies to enable advanced analytics and business intelligence.Key Responsibilities- Analyze the current ecosystem involving multiple source databases (SQL, NoSQL, APIs, etc.) and identify integration points for a unified data platform.- Evaluate and compare potential data lake and data warehouse solutions (e.g., Hive, Delta Lake, BigQuery, Snowflake, Redshift) based on cost, performance, scalability, and team needs.- Propose and implement the most appropriate architecture for both batch and real-time data ingestion and processing.- Design and build efficient, secure, and reliable ETL/ELT pipelines for structured andsemi-structured data.- Ensure the resulting architecture supports data discoverability, query performance, lineage tracking, and governance.- Collaborate with data analysts, product teams, and backend developers to ensure seamless data access and usability.- Define and enforce standards around data quality, security, and compliance.- Stay up to date with industry best practices and emerging technologies in data engineering and cloud infrastructure.Requirements- 5+ years of professional experience in data engineering or backend data-intensive roles.- Proven experience in designing and implementing data pipelines, data lakes, and data warehouses in cloud or hybrid environments.- Strong command of SQL, data modeling, and performance tuning.- Hands-on experience with data pipeline tools such as Apache Airflow, Spark, or equivalents.- Familiarity with various data storage and processing systems including traditional RDBMS, NoSQL, and streaming platforms (Kafka, Kinesis, etc.).- Experience in evaluating and selecting data storage and compute platforms (e.g., Hive, Redshift, Snowflake, Delta Lake).- Experience with cloud platforms such as AWS, GCP, or Azure.- Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.Nice to Have- Experience with Hive, HDFS, or Hadoop ecosystem components.- Background in data governance, security frameworks, and compliance (GDPR, HIPAA, etc.).- Proficiency in scripting or programming languages like Python, Scala, or Java.- Experience with real-time data processing architectures.
raw_html:
We are seeking a Senior Data Engineer to lead the design and implementation of a scalable
data architecture tailored to our growing application ecosystem. This is a high-impact role
that requires a strong foundation in data lake and data warehouse design, along with the
ability to evaluate multiple technologies and recommend the best-fit solution for our business
needs.


You will work closely with engineering, analytics, and business stakeholders to assess our
current data sources, propose a unified architecture, and implement robust pipelines and
storage strategies to enable advanced analytics and business intelligence.


Key Responsibilities
- Analyze the current ecosystem involving multiple source databases (SQL, NoSQL,
APIs, etc.) and identify integration points for a unified data platform.
- Evaluate and compare potential data lake and data warehouse solutions (e.g., Hive,
Delta Lake, BigQuery, Snowflake, Redshift) based on cost, performance, scalability,
and team needs.
- Propose and implement the most appropriate architecture for both batch and real-time
data ingestion and processing.
- Design and build efficient, secure, and reliable ETL/ELT pipelines for structured and
semi-structured data.
- Ensure the resulting architecture supports data discoverability, query performance,
lineage tracking, and governance.
- Collaborate with data analysts, product teams, and backend developers to ensure
seamless data access and usability.
- Define and enforce standards around data quality, security, and compliance.
- Stay up to date with industry best practices and emerging technologies in data
engineering and cloud infrastructure.


Requirements
- 5+ years of professional experience in data engineering or backend data-intensive
roles.
- Proven experience in designing and implementing data pipelines, data lakes, and
data warehouses in cloud or hybrid environments.
- Strong command of SQL, data modeling, and performance tuning.
- Hands-on experience with data pipeline tools such as Apache Airflow, Spark, or
equivalents.
- Familiarity with various data storage and processing systems including traditional
RDBMS, NoSQL, and streaming platforms (Kafka, Kinesis, etc.).
- Experience in evaluating and selecting data storage and compute platforms (e.g.,
Hive, Redshift, Snowflake, Delta Lake).
- Experience with cloud platforms such as AWS, GCP, or Azure.
- Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.

Nice to Have
- Experience with Hive, HDFS, or Hadoop ecosystem components.
- Background in data governance, security frameworks, and compliance (GDPR,
HIPAA, etc.).
- Proficiency in scripting or programming languages like Python, Scala, or Java.
- Experience with real-time data processing architectures.

This role is ideal for someone who enjoys building end-to-end BI solutions and working closely with stakeholders to drive data-driven decision-making.What You’ll Be DoingBI DevelopmentTranslate business requirements into technical BI solutionsDesign and maintain data models and schemas, including dimensional modellingBuild and optimize ETL processes using SSISDevelop reports and dashboards using Power BI, SSRS, Tableau, or similar toolsWrite and optimize complex SQL queriesEnsure data accuracy through validation and governance practicesEnhance performance of BI solutions and reporting outputsImplement data security and access control mechanismsCollaborate with data engineers, data scientists, and cross-functional teamsArchitecture & DocumentationMaintain clear documentation for data models, ETL workflows, and BI solutionsApply best practices across the Microsoft BI Stack (SQL, SSIS, SSAS, SSRS, Power BI)Stay updated on BI tools, trends, and emerging technologiesLeadership & SupportLead or contribute to BI projects, ensuring timely deliveryProvide training and support to business usersTroubleshoot and resolve BI and reporting issuesWhat We’re Looking ForProven experience as a Senior BI Developer / BI DeveloperStrong hands-on experience with MS BI Stack (SQL Server, SSIS, SSAS, SSRS, Power BI)Solid expertise in SQL, ETL, and data modellingExperience in data warehousing and performance optimisationStrong stakeholder engagement and communication skillsAbility to work independently and lead initiatives
raw_html:
The Role at a Glance

We are looking for a Senior BI Developer with strong expertise in the Microsoft BI Stack to join our team on a 12-month contract. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys building end-to-end BI solutions and working closely with stakeholders to drive data-driven decision-making.


What You’ll Be Doing

BI Development

  • Translate business requirements into technical BI solutions

  • Design and maintain data models and schemas, including dimensional modelling

  • Build and optimize ETL processes using SSIS

  • Develop reports and dashboards using Power BI, SSRS, Tableau, or similar tools

  • Write and optimize complex SQL queries

  • Ensure data accuracy through validation and governance practices

  • Enhance performance of BI solutions and reporting outputs

  • Implement data security and access control mechanisms

  • Collaborate with data engineers, data scientists, and cross-functional teams

Architecture & Documentation

  • Maintain clear documentation for data models, ETL workflows, and BI solutions

  • Apply best practices across the Microsoft BI Stack (SQL, SSIS, SSAS, SSRS, Power BI)

  • Stay updated on BI tools, trends, and emerging technologies

Leadership & Support

  • Lead or contribute to BI projects, ensuring timely delivery

  • Provide training and support to business users

  • Troubleshoot and resolve BI and reporting issues


What We’re Looking For

  • Proven experience as a Senior BI Developer / BI Developer

  • Strong hands-on experience with MS BI Stack (SQL Server, SSIS, SSAS, SSRS, Power BI)

  • Solid expertise in SQL, ETL, and data modelling

  • Experience in data warehousing and performance optimisation

  • Strong stakeholder engagement and communication skills

  • Ability to work independently and lead initiatives

job_description: Company description:Alliance Bank Malaysia BerhadJob description:Key ResponsibilitiesFinancial Performance Prepare GBTB division monthly business performance reports for submission to Group Finance & senior management Prepare monthly sales production and financial forecast with analysis to highlight risks and opportunities Conduct weekly / monthly review with business sales teams to update on business performance against financial / KPI targets, provide variance analysis and highlight opportunities & risk areas Business Planning Assist Group Chief Business & Transaction Banking Officer on developing business plans, implement strategic initiatives, prepare annual budget, KPI and scorecards Expense Management Manage expense reporting and accruals, monitor operating expenses and capital expenditure against budget Conduct periodic cost allocation and service level agreements review for GBTB Financial Modelling Perform financial simulations / modelling to generate profitability analysis for potential new investments (e.g. SME Expansion, Digital SME & etc.)  Job Requirements A recognize degree in preferably Accounting/ Finance/ Mathematics/ Statistics Minimum 6 years of working experience in similar field Strong analytical skills Independent, resourceful and meticulous in work approach with excellent interpersonal skills
raw_html:
Company description:

Alliance Bank Malaysia Berhad



Job description:

Key Responsibilities

Financial Performance

  • Prepare GBTB division monthly business performance reports for submission to Group Finance & senior management
  • Prepare monthly sales production and financial forecast with analysis to highlight risks and opportunities
  • Conduct weekly / monthly review with business sales teams to update on business performance against financial / KPI targets, provide variance analysis and highlight opportunities & risk areas

Business Planning

  • Assist Group Chief Business & Transaction Banking Officer on developing business plans, implement strategic initiatives, prepare annual budget, KPI and scorecards

Expense Management

  • Manage expense reporting and accruals, monitor operating expenses and capital expenditure against budget
  • Conduct periodic cost allocation and service level agreements review for GBTB

Financial Modelling

  • Perform financial simulations / modelling to generate profitability analysis for potential new investments (e.g. SME Expansion, Digital SME & etc.)

Job Requirements

  • A recognize degree in preferably Accounting/ Finance/ Mathematics/ Statistics
  • Minimum 6 years of working experience in similar field
  • Strong analytical skills
  • Independent, resourceful and meticulous in work approach with excellent interpersonal skills

job_description:
Role Overview
The Sales Operations function provides analytical, administrative, and operational support to the sales organization. As a Sales Analyst – Data Management, you will play a key role in enabling data‑driven sales decisions by supporting enterprise data solutions, governance, and analytics capabilities.
This role partners closely with Global Technology Services (GTS) and cross‑functional business teams to design, implement, and maintain secure, scalable access to high‑quality sales and commercial data, supporting ResMed’s strategic goals.
Key Responsibilities
Sales Operations & Data Enablement

Support Sales Operations activities with a focus on data management, governance, and analytics enablement.
Contribute to data acquisition, integration, quality, and governance initiatives to ensure trusted sales and market insights.
Work with stakeholders to understand business needs and translate them into clear data and reporting requirements.

Sales Commission Data Support

Support data-related activities for the development, implementation, and administration of sales commission and incentive programs, including plans, policies, and quotas.
Ensure accuracy, consistency, and availability of commission-related data for analysis and reporting.

Data Access & Security

Collaborate with GTS and business stakeholders to support data access policies, procedures, and controls.
Assist in defining user access requirements and permissions.
Support implementation of data security measures in compliance with applicable regulations (e.g. GDPR, HIPAA).

Data Warehouse & DataMart Solutions

Support the design, development, and maintenance of enterprise Data Warehouse and DataMart solutions aligned with business needs.
Participate in integrating new internal and external data sources with existing customer and physician datasets.
Prepare and maintain data documentation including Data Dictionaries, Source‑to‑Target mappings, and Data Lineage.
Support data modeling, integration, and transformation (ETL/ELT) processes.

Data Quality & Performance

Ensure data accuracy, consistency, and readiness for reporting and analytics.
Identify data discrepancies, inconsistencies, and performance bottlenecks.
Support investigation and resolution of data‑related issues in collaboration with GTS teams.
Contribute to performance monitoring and optimization of data solutions.

Continuous Improvement

Stay informed on industry best practices in data management, analytics, and sales operations.
Contribute ideas and improvements to enhance data reliability, usability, and scalability.

Qualifications & Experience
Required

Bachelor’s degree in a relevant field.
Minimum 5 years of experience in sales analytics, data management, sales operations, or a related role.
Experience handling moderately complex issues requiring data analysis and business judgment.
Proficiency in data warehousing technologies (e.g. SQL Server, Oracle, AWS Redshift, Snowflake).
Proficiency in BI and reporting tools (e.g. Power BI, Tableau, Cognos).
Experience with data modeling and ETL processes.
Knowledge of data access control methodologies and data privacy/security regulations.
Strong analytical, problem‑solving, communication, and collaboration skills.

Preferred

Experience or exposure to Python, ML, or AI.
Certification in data management, analytics, or data warehousing technologies.
Experience supporting sales compensation or incentive-related datasets.

#LI-APAC
Joining us is more than saying “yes” to making the world a healthier place. It’s discovering a career that’s challenging, supportive and inspiring. Where a culture driven by excellence helps you not only meet your goals, but also create new ones. We focus on creating a diverse and inclusive culture, encouraging individual expression in the workplace and thrive on the innovative ideas this generates. If this sounds like the workplace for you, apply now! We commit to respond to every applicant.

job_description: Key Responsibilities• Lead the end-to-end delivery of AI-driven solutions, from data ingestion and engineering to application development, deployment, and production support.• Design, develop, and maintain scalable data pipelines, data models, and processing workflows to support AI and machine learning applications.• Build and implement AI-powered features, including Large Language Model (LLM) integrations, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), agent-based workflows, and intelligent automation solutions.• Deploy, monitor, and optimize applications in production environments, solutions while maintaining high standards of quality and performance.• Develop and maintain comprehensive technical documentation, including system architecture, deployment procedures, configurations, operational runbooks, and technical decision records.• Collaborate directly with customers and stakeholders to gather requirements, define project scope, and provide technical consultation throughout the project lifecycle.• Translate business requirements into technical solutions, proactively managing expectations and recommending best-practice approaches to achieve desired outcomes.• Work closely with cross-functional teams to ensure successful project delivery, customer satisfaction, and continuous improvement of solutions and processes.Job Requirements:• Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Data Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, or a related field.• 2–5 years of experience in software engineering, data engineering, cloud solutions, AI/ML development, or technical project delivery.• Experience participating in data, cloud, analytics, or AI-related projects, with exposure to one or more areas such as data pipelines, application development, system integration, or solution deployment.• Familiarity with Large Language Models (LLMs), Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), AI agents, machine learning applications, or other AI raw_html:
Key Responsibilities

• Lead the end-to-end delivery of AI-driven solutions, from data ingestion and engineering to application development, deployment, and production support.

• Design, develop, and maintain scalable data pipelines, data models, and processing workflows to support AI and machine learning applications.

• Build and implement AI-powered features, including Large Language Model (LLM) integrations, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), agent-based workflows, and intelligent automation solutions.

• Deploy, monitor, and optimize applications in production environments, ensuring reliability, scalability, and operational efficiency with minimal manual intervention.

• Analyze complex technical and business challenges, providing practical, efficient, and scalable solutions while maintaining high standards of quality and performance.

• Develop and maintain comprehensive technical documentation, including system architecture, deployment procedures, configurations, operational runbooks, and technical decision records.

• Collaborate directly with customers and stakeholders to gather requirements, define project scope, and provide technical consultation throughout the project lifecycle.

• Translate business requirements into technical solutions, proactively managing expectations and recommending best-practice approaches to achieve desired outcomes.

• Work closely with cross-functional teams to ensure successful project delivery, customer satisfaction, and continuous improvement of solutions and processes.


Job Requirements:

• Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Data Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, or a related field.

• 2–5 years of experience in software engineering, data engineering, cloud solutions, AI/ML development, or technical project delivery.

• Experience participating in data, cloud, analytics, or AI-related projects, with exposure to one or more areas such as data pipelines, application development, system integration, or solution deployment.

• Familiarity with Large Language Models (LLMs), Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), AI agents, machine learning applications, or other AI technologies. Hands-on project experience is preferred but not mandatory.

• Proficiency in English is required. Ability to communicate in Chinese and/or Bahasa Malaysia is highly preferred to support customer and stakeholder engagement.

job_description: About UsTentacle Tech is an IT and software development consulting company serving some of Malaysia's largest enterprises. We deliver technology solutions, software development services, and IT consulting across multiple industries. We are looking for a talented professional to join our growing team in the sector.The RoleWe are looking for a seasoned Software Developer / Software Programmer to join our team on a 6-month contract, based onsite at Damansara. In this role, you will be a key member of an applications development team, driving the design, development, and maintenance of Business Enabler systems while supporting data enrichment, ETL processes, and data warehouse initiatives within a highly regulated financial environment.What You'll Do• Analyse business requirements and perform feasibility studies, gap analysis, and functional/technical design for data profiling, cleansing, and transformation.• Design, develop, implement, test, and deploy SAS ETL programmes and solutions that create SAS datasets from diverse data sources.• Manage and reconstruct specific data mart requirements and user data mapping from a business perspective, including planning for a scalable data warehouse roadmap.• Work closely with Project Managers, Business Analysts, and Technical Delivery teams to ensure quality deliveries aligned to project timelines.• Provide second-level support through problem investigation, identification, and system change implementation for permanent or preventive solutions.• Maintain technical, administration, operations, and CAB documentation for all supported systems.• Ensure compliance with local and regional regulatory requirements such as BNM and MAS, and liaise with internal and external auditors as required.What We're Looking For• Bachelor's Degree in Information Technology or an equivalent discipline.• Minimum 10 years of hands-on SAS ETL development experience using SAS Data Integration.• Minimum 12 years of experience across the full software development life cycle and processes.• Demonstrated domain knowledge in at least one of the following: Banking and Financial Services, Risk Management, Regulatory Reporting, or Basel II / Basel III.• Strong programming proficiency in SAS, SQL, and scripting languages, with deep understanding of metadata, database models, and business data models.• Experience with data warehouse or big data implementation projects; familiarity with Business Intelligence and reporting tools is an advantage.• Good knowledge of Unix, Linux, and Windows environments, with strong analytical, troubleshooting, and problem-solving skills.What We Offer• Competitive salary• Opportunity to work with some of Malaysia's largest enterprises on high-impact financial technology systems• Exposure to complex, large-scale data warehouse and ETL environments• Mentorship and knowledge-sharing within a skilled and collaborative technical team• Supportive team culture with a focus on professional growth and learning• Potential for career progression within Tentacle Tech's expanding project portfolioHow to ApplyApply now with your latest CV, or reach out to our recruitment team to learn more.
raw_html:
About Us

Tentacle Tech is an IT and software development consulting company serving some of Malaysia's largest enterprises. We deliver technology solutions, software development services, and IT consulting across multiple industries. We are looking for a talented professional to join our growing team in the sector.

The Role

We are looking for a seasoned Software Developer / Software Programmer to join our team on a 6-month contract, based onsite at Damansara. In this role, you will be a key member of an applications development team, driving the design, development, and maintenance of Business Enabler systems while supporting data enrichment, ETL processes, and data warehouse initiatives within a highly regulated financial environment.

What You'll Do

• Analyse business requirements and perform feasibility studies, gap analysis, and functional/technical design for data profiling, cleansing, and transformation.

• Design, develop, implement, test, and deploy SAS ETL programmes and solutions that create SAS datasets from diverse data sources.

• Manage and reconstruct specific data mart requirements and user data mapping from a business perspective, including planning for a scalable data warehouse roadmap.

• Work closely with Project Managers, Business Analysts, and Technical Delivery teams to ensure quality deliveries aligned to project timelines.

• Provide second-level support through problem investigation, identification, and system change implementation for permanent or preventive solutions.

• Maintain technical, administration, operations, and CAB documentation for all supported systems.

• Ensure compliance with local and regional regulatory requirements such as BNM and MAS, and liaise with internal and external auditors as required.

What We're Looking For

• Bachelor's Degree in Information Technology or an equivalent discipline.

• Minimum 10 years of hands-on SAS ETL development experience using SAS Data Integration.

• Minimum 12 years of experience across the full software development life cycle and processes.

• Demonstrated domain knowledge in at least one of the following: Banking and Financial Services, Risk Management, Regulatory Reporting, or Basel II / Basel III.

• Strong programming proficiency in SAS, SQL, and scripting languages, with deep understanding of metadata, database models, and business data models.

• Experience with data warehouse or big data implementation projects; familiarity with Business Intelligence and reporting tools is an advantage.

• Good knowledge of Unix, Linux, and Windows environments, with strong analytical, troubleshooting, and problem-solving skills.

What We Offer

• Competitive salary

• Opportunity to work with some of Malaysia's largest enterprises on high-impact financial technology systems

• Exposure to complex, large-scale data warehouse and ETL environments

• Mentorship and knowledge-sharing within a skilled and collaborative technical team

• Supportive team culture with a focus on professional growth and learning

• Potential for career progression within Tentacle Tech's expanding project portfolio

How to Apply

Apply now with your latest CV, or reach out to our recruitment team to learn more.

job_description: SummaryAs an Annotation Associate, you will be responsible for manually annotating and labeling data items for our client in the Data Annotation space. This role includes supporting various streams that are part of the team/project. You will provide day-to-day support to the project leads and the teams, ensuring the accuracy and reliability of data sets.Responsibilities:Manually annotate and label data items.Verify the accuracy and reliability of data sets.Create targeted sets to evaluate and improve judgment quality.Annotate search results based on how well they satisfy user needs.Verify annotated data and correct any errors.Maintain records of completed work.Ensure consistency in data annotation.Provide feedback to improve data annotation processes.Collaborate with team members to meet project objectives.Analyze test results to identify areas of weakness and make recommendations for improvement.Qualifications:A bachelor’s or master’s degree.Open to fresh graduate OR with 1-2 years of working experiences in annotation OR content moderator.Native OR Certified in Korean Language (TOPIC 4 or higher).Proficient in English communication.Excellent communication skills, verbal & written.Experience with data labeling and categorizing.A keen eye for detail to ensure accuracy in annotation.Strong research skills to analyze the possible intents behind user search queries.Ability to manage time effectively and meet deadlines.Ability to analyze data and follow complex instructions.Ability to aggregate and analyze data in Excel.Listening to content and transcribing the content (Listening, Speaking, Reading, Writing).Understanding of the domain relevant to the annotation project (Ex: Audio, Text annotation, speech recognition). Natural language Processing is preferred. Experience with annotation tools and platforms is preferred.
raw_html:
Summary

As an Annotation Associate, you will be responsible for manually annotating and labeling data items for our client in the Data Annotation space. This role includes supporting various streams that are part of the team/project. You will provide day-to-day support to the project leads and the teams, ensuring the accuracy and reliability of data sets.


Responsibilities:

  • Manually annotate and label data items.

  • Verify the accuracy and reliability of data sets.

  • Create targeted sets to evaluate and improve judgment quality.

  • Annotate search results based on how well they satisfy user needs.

  • Verify annotated data and correct any errors.

  • Maintain records of completed work.

  • Ensure consistency in data annotation.

  • Provide feedback to improve data annotation processes.

  • Collaborate with team members to meet project objectives.

  • Analyze test results to identify areas of weakness and make recommendations for improvement.


Qualifications:

  • A bachelor’s or master’s degree.

  • Open to fresh graduate OR with 1-2 years of working experiences in annotation OR content moderator.

  • Native OR Certified in Korean Language (TOPIC 4 or higher).

  • Proficient in English communication.

  • Excellent communication skills, verbal & written.

  • Experience with data labeling and categorizing.

  • A keen eye for detail to ensure accuracy in annotation.

  • Strong research skills to analyze the possible intents behind user search queries.

  • Ability to manage time effectively and meet deadlines.

  • Ability to analyze data and follow complex instructions.

  • Ability to aggregate and analyze data in Excel.

  • Listening to content and transcribing the content (Listening, Speaking, Reading, Writing).

  • Understanding of the domain relevant to the annotation project (Ex: Audio, Text annotation, speech recognition). Natural language Processing is preferred. 

  • Experience with annotation tools and platforms is preferred.

job_description:
PURPOSE
Under only general supervision, responsible for various duties within sales and distribution. Supports the sales force by providing information and analysis that help drive the delivery of Zurich products and services to customers and distributors

NATURE OF WORK
Key Accountabilities


Independently researches and business development opportunities.

Utilizes industry knowledge and expertise to Implement strategies to achieve sales goals.
Consultation to field sales personnel.
Uses industry knowledge and respond to inquires and-or distributors, provide clear resolves various issues as they arise.
Resolve operational customer-distributor (or other partner) management activities (e.g. remuneration, sales initiatives, event management, cross-selling), ensuring an efficient and high-quality service is extended to all internal and external customers.
Identifies opportunities for improvement by monitoring business processes and keeping abreast of industry developments.
Participates on assigned project teams.
Analyzes competing process methodologies and efficiencies in order to contributes to process improvement.

Develops customer or distributor reports to help preparations for key tenders-meetings, including commentary and an analysis of trends to facilitate decision-making where required.



Performance Management Accountabilities

Demonstrate commitment to corporate values.
Take accountability for participating in the performance management cycle. Take action to improve performance on the job.
Assist and support co-workers.
Take action to manage own personal development.


JOB REQUIREMENTS
GI Agency – Collect, Organise and Analyse data

Daily Market Agent Report
New Recruitment Report
Monthly monitoring and report on Agency Business Segment ( Motor and Non Motor )
Monthly monitoring and report on Agency Production Report
GI Agency Monthly Production Report
ISM Analysis - Market Share
ISM Analysis - Fire/ Motor
Quarterly Business Review reports / presentation slides
Assist in yearly GWP Forecast for GI Agency
Assist in yearly GWP Budget breakdown into branches and LoB
Monthly monitoring of selected agents
Daily Branch Reports to Branches
Motor Profitability Analysis: Loss Ratio/ Windscreen/ Z-Rider
Private Car with Attachment Report and Analysis
Agent Profitability Analysis - by Motor and Non Motor Loss Ratio
Agent Segmentation Slides and Analysis
Monitoring Fire Growth Report by Branches
Monthly ZT production by ZI agents



You are the heart & soul of Zurich!  
At Zurich, we like to think outside the box and challenge the status quo. We take an optimistic approach by focusing on the positives and constantly asking What can go right? 
We highly value the experience and know-how of our employees and offer a wide range of opportunities across business areas to encourage you to apply for new opportunities within Zurich when you are ready for your next career step. 
Let’s continue to grow together!


Location(s):  MY - Kuala Lumpur, MY - Remote Work 
Remote working: 
Schedule: Full Time
Recruiter name: Taren Kaur
Closing date:

raw_html:
Are you ready to shape a better tomorrow?

AIA Digital+ is a Technology, Digital and Analytics innovation hub dedicated to powering AIA to be more efficient, connected and innovative as it fulfils its Purpose to help millions of people across Asia-Pacific live Healthier, Longer, Better Lives.

If you are hungry and driven to play an active role in shaping a better tomorrow, we want to hear from you. Because the work we do at AIA Digital+ makes a difference in the lives of millions of people, every day. We will equip you with the critical skills, tools and technology, and endless opportunities to learn, contribute and thrive in a dynamic and exciting environment.

If you want to shape a brighter future at AIA Digital+, please read on.

Position Objective:

  • Supporting mainly HR applications (Workday)

  • Supporting HRIT Technical Lead & Manager on work assignments.

  • Able to manage all aspects of the integration, business mapping between Global HRIT Platform and other related systems.

  • Ensure solutions are consistent with global standards and ensure global solutions architecture team is aligned.

Roles and Responsibilities:

  • Perform system configuration and customization.

  • Manages all assigned Change Requests and deliver according to the target resolution time.

  • Self-discipline and good deliverables to promote accountability and trust at work.

  • Support end users in system usage and assist in raising overall HRIT Platform proficiency in the end user base.

  • Support Manager in executing proof of concepts (POCs) for new Change Request when necessary.

  • Successful system and process integration, efficient SLA driven end-user support and communications.

  • Liaises with necessary AIA colleagues or business partners outside HRIT CoE to ensure delivery of the functional work as required

  • Drive new or enhanced features to improve customer experience in using cloud solutions.

  • Contribute to the quality standards and continuous improvement of the HRIT SOPs including alignment of deliverables to business processes.

Communication Requirements

Internal:

  • Works with all HRIT members to ensure teamwork meets users’ requirement/timeline.

  • Liaises with necessary AIA colleagues outside HRIT to ensure delivery of the functional work as required.

External:

  • Escalate and work with vendors for HRIT issues including report system issues, raise service request for changing system parameters, files and customization.

Job Requirements:

  • University / College graduate in computer science or other relevant discipline.

  • 2 to 3 years’ relevant experience in regional solution/system support.

  • Has exposure in Workday as a support function or as an end user.

  • Has Workday configuration experience in Integration module.

raw_html:
Hargreaves Industrial Services is part of the Hargreaves Group. Established in 1994 as a specialist bulk haulier, the Hargreaves Group has grown, both organically and via acquisition, into a major force in the supply, movement and management of mineral resources and the provision of support services to the energy and waste industries.

At Hargreaves, we combine our assets and our competencies to provide our blue-chip customers with high-quality integrated solutions. Our flexibility and integration makes for strong and mutually beneficial relationships, and our customers understand the benefits to them of the Hargreaves approach; after all, it’s what sets us apart from our competitors.


Role Purpose:

  • To design and develop applications using the Microsoft Power Platform including Power Apps, Power Automate, Power BI

  • To liaise with the internal stakeholders to understand business requirements and develop PowerApps to provide solutions.

  • To maintain documentation of functional, solution specifications, and codes according to best practices.

  • To configure and develop dashboards and reports

  • To create analytics using Power Query and DAX in Power BI.

  • To collaborate with the newly created UK Hargreaves Digital team.


Necessary skills for the role:

  • At least 1 years experience in developing and deploying solutions with Power Platform.

  • Must have experience in all phases of Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC)

  • English spoken and written


Desirable qualifications for the role:

  • A Degree or Diploma in IT/ Computer Science or equivalent qualification.

  • Microsoft Power Platform certifications is an added advantage.


Impact and Key Deliverables:

Scope of the impact the role has (e.g. financial, staff, geographical spread)

  • Works with internal stakeholders to improve and create new software and apps for the business

  • Tests, trouble shoots and performs internal quality control of software

  • Performs backups of company data

  • Develops and provides training to end-users for internally developed software

  • May undertake site visits to Hargreaves project sites

  • Research commercial software which may benefit the company

  • Assists with basic IT networking / config tasks (those that can’t be performed remotely by UK IT)


Key Competencies:

Essential personal attributes and behavioural traits the individual must possess.

  • Shall be capable of working under pressure whilst maintaining the ability to plan & coordinate

  • Highly motivated; eager to contribute to an effective team operation

  • Reliable and responsible, shows attention to detail

  • Strong analytical, interpersonal and negotiation skills


**To apply for this position please attach a document containing screenshots or links to applications you have worked on. Please outline what your specific involvement was in these projects and how they benefited the business you developed them for

We're looking for ETL Operations and ETL Operations Developer.

6+ Years in :

Kuala Lumpur

ETL Operations

Role Summary

The ETL Operations is responsible for ensuring the stability, reliability, and timely delivery of enterprise data pipelines and batch processing environments. This role oversees end-to-end ETL operations, including monitoring, incident resolution, and performance optimization of data workflows. The incumbent drives operational excellence, enforces data governance standards, and collaborates with data engineering, platform, and business teams to ensure data availability and accuracy for critical business functions.

  • Scripting (bash, shell) for automation Operational & Analytical Skills

  • Strong troubleshooting and root cause analysis capabilities

  • Experience managing production support (L2/L3)

  • Understanding of data lineage and dependency management

  • Ability to work under tight batch timelines and business-critical cycles Leadership & Stakeholder Management

  • Experience leading production operations teams

  • Strong communication and incident management skills

  • Ability to manage cross-team dependencies effectively

ETL Operations Developer

Job Purpose

The Senior ETL OPS developer is responsible for ensuring the stability, reliability, and timely delivery of enterprise data pipelines and batch processing environments. This role oversees end-to-end ETL operations, including monitoring, incident resolution, and performance optimization of data workflows. The incumbent drives operational excellence, enforces data governance standards, and collaborates with data engineering, platform, and business teams to ensure data availability and accuracy for critical business functions.

Bachelor Degree / Master in IT/Computer Science / Engineering or related discipline

raw_html:
Why Us?

In AIA Digital+, we serve as AIA’s Group-led Technology, Digital & Analytics hub by evolving innovative technology to shape the future. We aim to design & develop a detailed, human centered experiences to positively impact the lives of millions of people.

Join us as a part of AIA Group today!


Roles & Responsibilities:

  • Develop and deliver high-quality AIAS enhancements within scope, timeline, and budget to meet business needs.

  • Provide production support by resolving incidents and ensuring system stability and availability (≥99.94%).

  •  Maintain code quality through best practices, testing, and reviews to minimize defects.

  •  Manage security and compliance by remediating vulnerabilities and closing audit findings on time.

  •  Drive continuous improvement by enhancing automation, test coverage, and reducing technical debt.

  •  Collaborate with stakeholders to support delivery and operational outcomes.

  •  Ensure that the work done by the department colleagues are aligned to corporate responsibilities (e.g. Fair Dealing)

  • Ensures there are no major risk audit comments and achieve audit rating of Needs Minor Improvement or above.


Requirements:

  • Education: Degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, or equivalent.

  • Experience & Technical Skills:

    • Possess 3–5 years of experience in backend development, preferably using .NET Core and/or Node.js.

    • Demonstrate proficiency in frontend development, particularly with the React framework.

    • Apply strong knowledge of databases and SQL (MSSQL Server), including performance tuning and query optimization.

    • Utilize RESTful APIs and microservices architecture in application design and integration.

    • Use version control systems, CI/CD pipelines, and integrated security tools like GitHub/GitLab/Bitbucket within the development lifecycle.

  • Preferred Skills (Advantageous):

    • Experience in writing and maintaining unit tests (e.g., Jest, xUnit).

    • Familiarity with shell scripting.

    • Knowledge of ORM frameworks (e.g., Entity Framework, Hibernate, Dapper).

  • Core Competencies:

    • Demonstrate strong understanding of change management processes and incident/problem resolution.

    • Ability to work independently with minimal supervision while collaborating effectively in a team environment.

    • Champion engineering best practices, including code quality, automated testing (unit, integration, E2E), documentation, and conducting thorough code reviews.

    • Apply secure design principles and ensure solutions are built with high sensitivity to data protection, security controls, and regulatory compliance requirements.

    • Ensure adherence to security-by-design practices, including vulnerability prevention, secure coding, and compliance with organizational and industry standards.

    • Exhibit a highly motivated, proactive, and accountable mindset.

raw_html:
Job Profile / Summary

A results-driven Pentaho Data Integration (PDI/Kettle) Developer or any other ETL tool with over 3-5 years of hands-on experience in designing, developing, and deploying end-to-end ETL pipelines across Data Warehouses and Data Lake environments.

Highly proficient in integrating data from diverse source systems such as Oracle, SQL Server, PostgreSQL, MySQL, APIs, and cloud-based sources. Skilled in building scalable ETL workflows, implementing data quality checks, designing dimensional models, and optimizing transformation performance for enterprise data platforms.

Experienced in working closely with business teams, data modelers, architects, and BI teams to translate business requirements into robust technical ETL specifications. Strong expertise in environment migration, supporting ETL deployments across Dev, SIT, UAT, and Production using repositories.

 

Key Skills & Expertise

  • Pentaho Data Integration (PDI/Kettle):
    Transformation design, job orchestration, workflow branching, parameterization, repository migration, error handling & logging.

  • ETL Development:
    End-to-end data pipeline development covering staging → EDW → data marts, including incremental loads.

  • Data Integration:
    Experience extracting data from RDBMS, flat files, APIs, cloud sources, and loading into DWH/Data Lake environments.

  • Database Skills:
    Strong SQL experience with Oracle, SQL Server, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Vertica.

  • Cloud & Big Data:
    Exposure to AWS,  S3/Data Lake storage, Parquet outputs, and distributed data processing.

  • Data Quality & Governance:
    Data profiling, validations, cleansing transformations, SCD Type 1 & 2 logic, audit & reconciliation frameworks.

  • Performance Optimization:
    Tuning transformations, SQL optimization, lookup caching, memory management, and parallel execution.

 

Roles & Responsibilities

  • Collaborate with business users, BI teams, and data architects to understand reporting and analytical requirements and translate them into ETL specifications.

  • Design and develop PDI transformations and jobs to ingest, cleanse, validate, and integrate data from multiple source systems into the enterprise Data Warehouse.

  • Implement business rules, data quality checks, error handling, and exception management within ETL PDI workflows.

  • Develop and maintain dimensional models (fact tables, dimensions, surrogate keys, SCD logic) to support reporting and dashboards.

  • Optimize existing ETL workflows for performance, scalability, reliability, and proper resource utilization.

  • Manage scheduling, monitoring, and alerting for daily, weekly, and monthly ETL jobs using Kitchen/Pan and OS schedulers.

  • Troubleshoot job failures, conduct root cause analysis, and provide permanent fixes to ensure uninterrupted data operations.

  • Work with DBAs, cloud teams, and infrastructure engineers for performance tuning, environment setup, data modeling, and query optimization.

  • Maintain technical documentation including mapping sheets, ETL logic, SDS/SRS-style specifications, runbooks, and deployment guides.

  • Support UAT cycles, production releases, and post-deployment validation to ensure high-quality deliverables.


Education:

  • Bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science, Information Systems, Data Science, or a related field.

raw_html:
Job Responsibilities

  • Co-create the overarching architecture and framework for Claude-powered solutions across all six Public Listed Companies within Chin Hin Group

  • Partner with stakeholders across functions to identify opportunities for AI-driven transformation, with a focus on Claude Co-work and Claude-powered solutions

  • Translate business needs into clear, structured requirements, including prompt design, workflows, and expected outputs for Claude-based use cases

  • Analyse and design business processes leveraging Claude Co-work and Claude Code to improve efficiency and decision-making

  • Facilitate workshops and discussions to define problem statements, success criteria, and AI use cases

  • Work closely with technical teams to support implementation of solutions using Claude Code, including integrations and workflow automation

  • Develop and maintain documentation such as business requirements, use cases, process flows, and prompt libraries for Claude-driven solutions

  • Act as the liaison between business users and AI/engineering teams throughout the solution lifecycle

  • Support UAT and validation of AI outputs to ensure accuracy, consistency, and alignment with business needs

  • Drive user adoption through training, communication, and change management for Claude Co-work environments

  • Continuously refine requirements, prompts, and workflows based on user feedback and evolving business needs

Job Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s degree in business, Information Systems, Computer Science, or related discipline

  • 3–6 years of relevant experience in Business Analysis, Digital Transformation, or Process Improvement

  • Exposure to AI/LLM tools (e.g., Claude or similar) and understanding of prompt engineering fundamentals

  • Proven experience in requirements gathering, process mapping, and solution documentation

  • Experience working with cross-functional stakeholders in medium to large-scale environments

  • Familiarity with Agile, Waterfall, or hybrid project delivery methodologies

  • Strong written and verbal communication skills in English and Mandarin as this roles will required to liaise with Mandarin-speaking clients and partners.


Key Competencies

  • Ability to translate business problems into structured AI use cases, prompts, and workflows that deliver practical outcomes

  • Confident in engaging senior stakeholders, facilitating discussions, and driving alignment across business and technical teams

  • Strong in breaking down complex problems, conducting gap analysis, and designing clear, logical solution approaches

  • Ability to design, refine, and optimise prompts and AI interactions to ensure consistent, accurate, and useful outputs

  • Comfortable operating in evolving AI environments, quickly picking up new tools, concepts, and ways of working

  • Able to manage multiple priorities, maintain momentum, and ensure timely delivery of quality outputs

  • Works effectively across functions, bridging business users, developers, and AI teams

  • Ensures AI outputs are validated, reliable, and aligned with business intent, with awareness of risks and limitations

Responsibilities

  • Power Platform development and support services to meet AIA's business needs by using various programming languages. (Including JavaScript, HTML, CSS, Canvas, MDA, and Power Automate, web resource, Dataflow, and Dataverse.)

  • Excellent problem-solving skills and attention to detail.

  • Understand and perform technical investigation and diagnosis.

  • Ensure that system improvements are successfully implemented

  • Provide technical support to end user as required.

  • Able to guide & support Senior/Junior Analyst to solve project technical challenge.

  • Technically strong to investigate, diagnosis, develop or oversee development of PowerApps and Power BI reports to improve existing solution app.


Requirements

Experiences:

  • 3+ years working experience as BAU L2 Support for Power Apps (especially MDA) & Power Automate

  • Extensive experience in the Microsoft Power Platform MS PowerApps, Flow, and Power BI (good to have).

  • A clear understanding of PowerApps formulas and development methods.

  • Strong .Net development experience with familiarity with C#, ASP.Net MVC, Entity Framework, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS

  • Strong foundational knowledge of Office 365 platform including Exchange, Intune, Azure AD, and Azure ecosystem.

  • Prior experience with SOA/web services design and programming; experience with SharePoint 2016, ASP.NET MVC and JavaScript

  • Strong teamwork skills and attention to details.

  • Experience in DevOps tool such as MS Azure DevOps will be advantageous.


Practical Skills/Abilities:

  • Able to communicate well in English.

  • SLA familiarity and performance driven work culture.

  • Experience in customer service, leadership and business support will be advantageous.

  • Presentation skills with a high degree of comfort with both large and small audiences.

  • Resourceful, independent and result oriented.

  • A good team player and keen to learn.

  • Possess personal attributes such as hard-working attitude, interpersonal skills, professional integrity, and initiative.

  • Keen to learn, a team player and have good working attitude.

  • MS Office (Excel, Word, Project, PowerPoint, Access, Visio) skills

job_description:
Purpose

Acts under direct instruction, performing actuarial duties in order to provide highly accurate data and analyses for use by more senior actuaries in relation to reserving, reporting, quantitative risk management or the pricing of business.

Key Accountabilities


Provide basic actuarial services under direct instruction of a more experienced actuary.
Perform statistical analyses, model and analyze data and develop models and programs for model building and analyses; interpret results of models and analyses.
Compile and categorize data and document and verify factors and assumptions used in computations to ensure robust output.
Assist in the development of risk based capital models as well as parameterization and allocation activities to support actuarial services.
Participate in the evaluation and review of new and proposed processes and systems.
Demonstrate increasing knowledge of actuarial disciplines and procedures to build value adding, relevant technical knowledge.
Work with actuarial colleagues to develop understanding of company operations, business objectives and actuarial methodologies.
Actively pursue local actuarial qualification.


At Zurich we are proud of our culture. We are passionate about Diversity and Inclusion. We want you to bring your whole self to work we have a diverse mix of customers, and we want our employee base to reflect that.Our diversity and inclusion initiatives are creating an environment where everyone feels welcome regardless of protected characteristics.

With the above in mind, we accept applications from everyone regardless of your background, beliefs, or culture.We are committed to continuous improvement, and we offer access to a comprehensive range of training and development opportunities. Zurich is passionate about supporting employees to help others by getting involved in volunteering, charitable and community activity.

So, make a difference. Be challenged. Be inspired. Be supported, Love what you do. Work for us.

We’re proud to have earned Great Place To Work® Certification™. Our company culture is our top priority! #GPTWcertifiedLet’s continue to grow together!

raw_html:
We are seeking talented AI and Software Engineering professionals to develop innovative AI-driven solutions using modern technologies across software development, machine learning, and intelligent systems.

The role offers the opportunity to work on cutting-edge areas such as Generative AI, Large Language Models (LLMs), AI applications, machine learning, robotics, computer vision, and AI-powered platforms.

The ideal candidate will have strong programming foundations, experience building AI or software solutions, and a passion for exploring emerging technologies to solve complex real-world challenges.

Requirements:

  • Degree in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Software Engineering, Machine Learning, Robotics, or related fields.

  • Strong programming skills (Python preferred).

  • Understanding of AI/ML concepts and modern development practices.

  • Strong analytical thinking, problem-solving abilities, and communication skills.

  • Experience in Generative AI, LLM applications, machine learning, computer vision, robotics, or AI software development will be considered.

Join a team at the forefront of AI innovation and contribute to building next-generation intelligent solutions that create meaningful impact.

raw_html:
Responsibilities

  • Act as the first line of support, responsible for communicating with users to understand, log, categorize and prioritize Incidents & Service Requests (SR) accurately.

  • Perform investigation and diagnosis of incidents with references to existing knowledgebase/ problem management/ list of known errors.

  • Provide solutions or workarounds to users to resolve tickets within stipulated Service Level Agreement (SLA).

  • Highlight and escalate recurring Incidents which are similar in nature.

  • Escalate Incident and Service Request tickets which are unable to be resolved to appropriate next-level resolver group.

  • Escalate and highlight Incidents that are at risk of breaching SLA to Team Lead.

  • Closely follow up with outstanding Incidents and Service Requests up till closure.

  • Provides specialized expertise in Workday systems.

  • Supports the implementation of WORKDAY, ensuring integration with other HRIT systems.

  • Develops a comprehensive understanding of our broader Workday ecosystem by learning and supporting various WORKDAY modules in day-to-day operations.

  • Works closely with business departments to understand their requirements and recommend process improvements within HRIT, providing high-quality deliverables.

Requirements

Education

  • Bachelor’s degree in Human Resources Management, IT or a related field is required or other relevant discipline.

Experience

  • Experience using ITSM tools (i.e. Ticketing Tools) will be added advantage.

  • WORKDAY certification in any module or other HRIT system will be considered a plus.

  • Strong understanding of Workday process, Workday modules and their integration with other HRIT systems with at least 3 years of experience in Workday.

  • Ability to troubleshoot and resolve Workday systems related issues.


Language skills

  • Fluent in spoken and written English is a must.


Technical skills

  • Microsoft Office

  • Technical WORKDAY

  • Programming languages: JavaScript, React, and JSON (added advantage)

Special skills

  • SLA familiarity and performance driven work culture.

  • Excellent interpersonal skills to rapidly develop robust relationships across all key stakeholders.

  • Ability to diagnose and resolve basic technical issues.

  • Good communication and presentation skills.

  • Resourceful, independent and result oriented.

  • A good team player and keen to learn.

  • Proactive.
