raw_html:
As a Senior Solution Consultant (Business Analyst) in this role, you will bridge the gap between complex business requirements and cutting-edge technical solutions. You will own the end-to-end pre-sales lifecycle, technical strategy, and delivery governance for tier-1 telecom operators and enterprise clients. Your expertise in BSS modules (including CRM, Billing, Charging, Order Management, and Product Catalog) will drive business growth, ensure flawless project execution, and unlock secondary sales opportunities.


  1. Strategic Pre-Sales & Technical Solutioning

  • Solution Architecture Design: Lead the formulation of end-to-end, high-performance pre-sales technical solutions, ensuring alignment with enterprise architecture standards for BSS/CRM systems.

  • Bid Management & RFP Ownership: Spearhead the preparation of technical bids, RFIs, and RFPs. Draft comprehensive, compliant, and competitive technical proposals.

  • Proof of Concept (POC) Leadership: Design, scope, and execute high-impact pre-sales POCs to validate feasibility, showcase product capabilities (such as omni-channel CRM journeys or real-time billing integration), and mitigate technical risks.

  • Executive Presentations: Deliver high-level technical presentations and solution consultations to client stakeholders, C-level executives, and telecom operators, translating complex technical architectures into clear business value.

  1. Advanced Requirement Analysis & SRS Architecture

  • Consultative Discovery: Conduct deep-dive requirement research workshops with clients and operators, utilizing industry frameworks (e.g., TM Forum Frameworx, Open Digital Architecture) to clarify complex, ambiguous needs.

  • SRS Engineering: Author and govern high-quality Software Requirements Specifications (SRS), translating business workflows into precise functional and non-functional requirements for BSS/CRM integrations.

  1. Release Planning, Resource Allocation & R&D Governance

  • Cross-Functional Alignment: Act as the primary technical liaison between external clients, telecom operators, Project Managers, and internal R&D teams to reconcile client expectations with engineering realities.

  • Strategic Roadmapping: Formulate realistic, phased product version output and delivery plans. Conduct rigorous feasibility and workload assessments (estimating man-months/story points) considering internal R&D capacity and timeline constraints.

  • Capacity Optimization: Optimize project resource planning for the R&D department to ensure timeline compliance without compromising architecture quality or over-allocating manpower.

  1. End-to-End Requirement Tracking & Delivery Governance

  • Lifecycle Management: Oversee and audit the entire version delivery pipeline across three critical pillars:

  • Requirement Review: Lead technical and functional gap analyses to ensure zero ambiguity before development begins.

  • Requirement Import: Govern the structured ingestion of requirements into agile delivery tools (e.g., Jira, Confluence) mapped against BSS/CRM product baselines.

  • Requirement Tracking: Establish traceability matrices to monitor requirements from design through testing (UAT) to final production deployment.

  1. Value Realization & Commercial Account Expansion (Secondary Sales)

  • Stakeholder Ecosystem Alignment: Organize and facilitate strategic communication alignment meetings involving clients, operators, vendor PMs, and engineering leads.

  • Proactive Risk & Operations Management: Analyze product performance and operator live-network conditions. Proactively identify operational bottlenecks, security risks, or scalability issues in the CRM/BSS ecosystem, and pitch technical optimization roadmaps.

  • Account Mining & Upselling: Identify latent client needs during project lifecycles to create organic opportunities for secondary sales, change requests (CRs), and extended software contract expansions.

  1. High-Tier Post-Sales Support Escalation

  • Provide expert daily technical and architectural support for post-sales projects, acting as the ultimate escalation point for complex technical challenges on live-site environments.


Job Requirements

  1. Educational Background

  • Minimum Qualification: Full-time Bachelor’s degree or above from a reputable institution.

  • Preferred Majors: Telecommunications Engineering, Electronic Engineering, Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a technical degree paired with an advanced business/marketing qualification.

  1. Professional Experience

  • Experience Level: 5+ years (minimum 3 years required) of progressive experience spanning market analysis, pre-sales solution architecture, system testing, and end-to-end delivery within the technology sector.

  • Domain Expertise: Proven track record in the Software, Fintech, or Telecom BSS/OSS industries. Direct experience working with CRM systems, Omni-channel engagement engines, Billing/Charging platforms, or telecom operator networks is highly advantageous.

  • Global Mobility: Strong willingness and flexibility to travel internationally as required to support on-site client deployments and high-stake pre-sales workshops.

  1. Core Competencies & Soft Skills

  • Consultative Communication: Exceptional capability to engage in strategic dialogues with enterprise clients. Ability to accurately capture business pain points, convert them into robust consulting architectures, and present ideas with maximum clarity.

  • Analytical & Logical Prowess: Sharp logical thinking, structure-driven problem-solving skills, and the resilience to operate effectively under tight project delivery pressures.

  • Bilingual Fluency: Absolute proficiency (written and spoken) in both English and Mandarin. Must be capable of hosting technical workshops, writing documentation, and negotiating complex technical agreements in both languages with global clients and internal offshore R&D centers.

job_title: Experienced Associate - Data Engineer cum Scientist
job_description:
Description

Line of ServiceInternal Firm Services

Job Description & SummaryAt PwC, our people in data and analytics focus on leveraging data to drive insights and make informed business decisions. They utilise advanced analytics techniques to help clients optimise their operations and achieve their strategic goals.In business intelligence at PwC, you will focus on leveraging data and analytics to provide strategic insights and drive informed decision-making for clients. You will develop and implement innovative solutions to optimise business performance and enhance competitive advantage.
PwC Malaysia is seeking a versatile Data Scientist & Data Engineer to join our team. This hybrid role involves designing and maintaining robust data infrastructure while also developing advanced analytical and machine learning models. You will work closely with business stakeholders, data scientists, and engineers to deliver scalable, data-driven solutions that address complex business challenges.
Key Responsibilities:

Design, develop, and maintain scalable data pipelines and ETL/ELT workflows to ingest, process, and transform structured and unstructured data from multiple sources.
Build and optimize data architectures leveraging cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or GCP to support analytics and machine learning workloads.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to identify data requirements, ensure data quality, and implement data governance standards.
Perform exploratory data analysis and apply statistical techniques to extract actionable insights supporting business decision-making.
Develop, validate, and deploy machine learning and predictive models to solve various client business problems.
Monitor model performance in production and implement continuous improvement processes.
Automate routine data management and analytical tasks to enhance efficiency.
Create dashboards and data visualization reports to communicate findings to technical and non-technical stakeholders effectively.
Stay current with emerging technologies and best practices in data engineering, data science, and AI to drive innovation within projects.


Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Engineering, Statistics, Mathematics, or related fields.
Minimum 2 years of professional experience across data engineering, data science, or combined analytics roles.
Strong programming skills in Python, SQL, and experience with data engineering tools and frameworks (e.g., Apache Hadoop, Spark, Kafka, Airflow).
Proficiency with machine learning libraries such as scikit-learn, TensorFlow, or PyTorch.
Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP) and their data ecosystem (e.g., Redshift, Synapse, BigQuery).
Solid understanding of data warehousing, data modeling, and ETL best practices.
Strong foundation in statistics, data mining, and algorithm development.
Ability to work collaboratively in dynamic, hybrid team environments.
Excellent communication skills, capable of translating complex analyses into business insights.

raw_html:
Job Purposes

  • Planning & managing IT projects and exercise prudent project management principles to implement the projects/system enhancements successfully.

  • Supervise the technical team, managing work assignments and skill resources in delivering quality output and meeting project deadlines.

  • Design, analyse, code and test programs for system development / enhancements in accordance to user specifications

  • Provide application support, performance and problem resolution activities and be responsive to the needs and meeting user demands.


Job Responsibilities

  • Constant Liaison with the appropriate party within IT with regard to project SDLC

  • Liaison with business counterpart for any concern raised.

  • Mitigate technical constraints and recommend alternative workaround for business users considerations.

  • Work with Vendor / Development team and Support team for the delivery and testing.

  • Team motivation and monitoring of progress.

  • UH/SH regular updates on progress.

  • Monitors overall system performance, availability and chart/plan appropriate action whenever issues arise.

  • Research on system performance improvements and work with Support team for execution.

  • Promptly assign most appropriate technical resource to analyse and resolve problem.

  • Mitigate impact of problem and execute quick recovery plan.

  • Prompt escalation of problems if necessary.

  • Review requirements with QA, IT Security and Audit.

  • Mitigate risk and recommend alternative workaround solutions / controls to address non-compliance items for consideration.


Job Requirements

  • Degree in Computer Science / Information Technology or equivalent with minimum 5 years of experience in IT Application delivery and support or IT Project Management.

  • Project management skills.

  • Application Architecture Analysis & Design

  • Application Support - strong Analytical mind, good Problem analysis & Troubleshooting skills

  • Knowledge & experience in Banking Sector particularly in Unit Trust or Investment.

  • Good interpersonal and communication skills

  • Strong Technical skill-sets:-

  1. Core Java / Java EE (J2EE): solid understanding of OOP principles, exception handling, multithreading, design patterns.

  2. API & Web Development: RESTful API, Microservices, XML, JSON, HTML5, CSS, JavaScript

  3. Mobile architecture and development: React Native, React JS

  4. CI/CD & Build Tools: Maven, GitHub

  5. Tools: JUnit, Postman, JMeter (or equivalent)

  6. Operating Systems: RHEL, Windows Server, AIX, Solaris Server

  7. Middleware: Oracle Weblogic, JBOSS/WildFly, IBM WebSphere, Apache Kafka, API Gateway

  8. Database: Oracle – proficient in SQL, stored procedures and performance tuning

  9. Web: Apache HTTP Server, Oracle HTTP Server

  10. Java Frameworks: hands-on experience with Spring Framework (Spring Boot, Spring MVC)

  11. Monitoring: Nagios, Dynatrace, ELK stack, Grafana.

raw_html:
About Business Consulting:

Continuous growth and agile way of collaboration defines our Business path. Everything we do - from requirements analysis, through testing to creating new solutions - is done with passion and high-quality assurance. With an open mind and business advisory craft at hand, our innovative teams lead our international clients to success.

About the role. You will:

  • Be a part of consulting or implementation team during IT projects for financial institutions, primarily insurance companies .

  • Conduct business analysis, define functional requirements, and test developed solutions and support UATs.

  • Work closely with software developers and IT architects on a daily basis.

  • Test yourself in various roles performing varied tasks in an international environment.

  • Be an active member of an Agile team, taking ownership for your topics. 
     

About the requirements. You need:

  • First professional experience in IT projects for the financial sector, preferably insurance or bancassurance.

  • Great command of English (at least B2) and Japanese (at least N2) language.

  • To be creative, resourceful, and proactive in finding solutions to complex problems.

  • Ability to apply analytical thinking and synthesis to present results of your work.

  • Strong aptitude to work with clients from the financial sector in a professional environment.

  • Ability to learn quickly in a friendly but challenging international environment.

  • To enjoy teamwork with experts with various professional backgrounds and skills.

  • To be able to work in Malaysia on a full-time basis.

  • At least a bachelor's degree. 


About the wishes. Nice to haves:

  • Familiarity with insurance business processes.

  • Experience working in fintech, consulting, implementation, or IT company, especially in the fields of insurance or bancassurance.

  • Team leadership skills and management experience.

  • Additional languages, especially Japanese.

  • While having the main office in Kuala Lumpur, you want to work with our Clients abroad, traveling up to 50% of your work time. 
     

About our promises. We can offer:

•Flexible working hours and a hybrid home office model (2-3 times per week in the office) as work-life balance is crucial at Sollers.
•A chance to be promoted twice a year and a clearly defined career path with salary forecast.
•Opportunities for growth with a training budget that you can use for courses and conferences. We also provide access to an online training platform and co-fund language classes.
•An internal coach to guide you through the onboarding, further training and career opportunities, plus a budget to be used for your lunches together.
•A chance to #domore for the planet and the community as part of Sollers Change Makers - our volunteering program.
•Lots of teambuilding activities, trips, hobby groups and cultural events to create a company powered by teamwork.
•Probably all the benefits you can think of!

Job Responsibilities

-Investigate overseas cheating reports and player ban appeals through evidence and video review.

-Assess anti-cheat systems to minimize false positives and enhance game integrity.

-Analyze user complaints, identify root causes, and support developers in implementing fixes.

-Monitor and review all player-generated content (voice, video).

-Proactively identify and remove inappropriate material, including adult content, violent, and cyberbullying.

-You will primarily support Mandarin-speaking players and content, including reviewing reports, appeals, and user-generated content in Mandarin.



Requirements：

* Must have achieved Conqueror rank in at least one season of FPS game, or Ace rank or above in multiple seasons with strong performance records. (DF, CS,& COD)

* Candidates with professional tournament experience will be given priority. Alternatively, candidates with high-ranking achievements in other competitive games are also encouraged to apply.

* Possess strong communication skills, a positive work attitude, and excellent teamwork.

* Strong sense of responsibility and willingness to contribute to maintaining a fair and secure gaming environment.

* Prior experience in the internet or FPS industry is a plus.

* Ability to communicate in Chinese (Mandarin) is required.

* High school diploma or above (fresh graduates are welcome).


Working Location: KL Eco City (accessible by public transport)

Work Schedule: 9 am-6 pm, 5 working days per week


What You’ll Get:

Medical benefits (inpatient & outpatient)

14 days of annual leave

Team-building activities & birthday celebrations

Office within walking distance of public transport

raw_html:
Job Summary

The Regulatory Operations Department is responsible for regulatory reporting across multiple global jurisdictions, including CFTC, SEC, ESMA, FCA, MiFID, SFTR, HKMA, ASIC, and MAS.

In this role, you will support the end-to-end regulatory reporting process by ensuring accurate, timely, and complete reporting of traded financial instruments, while maintaining strong controls and compliance with regulatory requirements.

You will also be responsible for trade reconciliation, exception monitoring, root cause analysis, and collaboration with internal stakeholders and technology teams to resolve reporting issues and enhance process efficiency.


Key Responsibilities

Regulatory Reporting & Reconciliation

  • Perform timely and accurate trade reporting reconciliation.

  • Ensure regulatory reports are prepared and submitted in accordance with regulatory and internal guidelines.

  • Extract and validate reports from trade repositories (e.g., DTCC, UnaVista, MDP) for daily BAU processing.

Exception Management & Issue Resolution

  • Monitor reconciliation feeds and identify exceptions, anomalies, and spikes.

  • Escalate issues promptly to management and technology teams to ensure reporting timelines are not impacted.

  • Investigate reconciliation breaks, perform root cause analysis, and work with relevant stakeholders to remediate issues within agreed timelines.

  • Assign ADOs to trades with reconciliation exceptions and track resolution progress.

Reporting & Controls

  • Ensure all Management Information (MI) reports are accurate, complete, and submitted on time.

  • Maintain adherence to process documentation and ensure updates are reflected where necessary.

  • Support and strengthen the control framework within Regulatory Operations.

Stakeholder Management & Collaboration

  • Respond to internal and external queries in a timely manner.

  • Collaborate with Technology, Front Office, Middle Office, and other Operations teams to resolve issues and improve processes.

  • Participate in global/regional projects and change initiatives.

Process Improvement & Governance

  • Identify process gaps and contribute to continuous improvement initiatives.

  • Ensure consistency of processes across multiple regulatory regimes (e.g., SFTR, EMIR, MiFID, CFTC, SEC).

  • Support governance and compliance requirements across Regulatory Operations.

Risk & Compliance

  • Ensure adherence to regulatory requirements, internal policies, and control standards.

  • Identify, escalate, and mitigate operational, regulatory, and conduct risks.

  • Understand system limitations and support remediation planning to minimize reporting impact.

Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, Business, or related field.

  • Min 2 years of working experience in related background

  • Understanding of capital markets, financial instruments, or trade lifecycle (preferred).

  • Exposure to regulatory reporting regimes (e.g., EMIR, MiFID, SFTR, CFTC, SEC) is an advantage.

  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

  • Good attention to detail with ability to work under tight deadlines.

  • Strong communication and stakeholder management skills.

  • Ability to work in a fast-paced, global team environment.

  • Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and data analysis tools is an advantage.

raw_html:
Be a part of something BIG!


Say HELLO to BIG Possibilities with Singtel KL (Sudong MY Sdn Bhd)! 

Singtel is Asia's leading communications technology group, our presence spans across 21 countries in Asia, Australia, and Africa. We thrive on innovation, digital transformation, and harnessing next-generation technology to create a more sustainable and digital future. Now, we are bringing this energy to Kuala Lumpur with the launch of our brand-new Shared Services Centre.


The Finance Executive -Opex Planning supports budgeting, forecasting, financial analysis, and reporting activities to ensure effective cost management and financial governance across the business. The role partners closely with stakeholders to monitor expenditure trends, validate financial data, identify variances, and support continuous process improvements that strengthen operational and financial performance.

 

Make an Impact by

  • Support pre month-end financial operations by coordinating with business and commercial stakeholders on reporting updates, process changes, and issue resolution

  • Review financial transactions and prepare journals for posting while ensuring accuracy and alignment with month-end reporting requirements

  • Prepare month-end review files, Opex reports, and BPR reporting packs for business and finance stakeholders

  • Coordinate Annual Operating Plan (AOP) and forecasting activities including FTE/Opex planning, stakeholder reviews, and planning system updates

  • Facilitate budget transfer requests and maintain Opex master data changes to support financial governance and operational continuity

  • Support audit, annual reporting, and headquarters finance operations by providing timely and accurate financial information to Finance Controllers and business teams


Skills for Success

  • Degree in Business, Commerce, Finance, or a related discipline, or a recognized professional accounting qualification

  • At least 4 years of experience in financial accounting, budgeting, and financial analysis within a corporate environment, with exposure to Opex planning being advantageous 

  • Ability to collaborate effectively across business and finance stakeholders while driving process and system improvement

  • Strong analytical, problem-solving, and decision-making skills with the ability to work independently, manage ambiguity, and deliver under tight timelines and changing business needs

  • Proficiency in SAP and financial planning tools, with experience in budgeting, forecasting, and planning environments such as BPC or Tagetik being advantageous


Good to Have

  • Ability to support Opex planning and budgeting activities within large corporate environments

  • Ability to adapt to changing business priorities and operate effectively in dynamic environments

  • Exposure to financial forecasting, variance analysis, and business performance reporting

  • Experience with financial planning and reporting systems such as SAP, BPC, or Tagetik


Your Career Growth Starts Here. Apply Now!

job_title: S&C GN - TS&T - Technology Operating Model- Consultant
job_description:
Key Responsibilities• Assess current-state IT environments, including organization structure, governance, processes, and sourcing models• Identify improvement opportunities across people, process, technology, and data to align IT capabilities with business strategy• Design target-state IT operating models, including organizational structures, capability models (Run, Change, Transform), and governance frameworks• Define delivery and sourcing strategies, including in-house, managed services, and hybrid models• Develop service management frameworks, including KPIs, SLAs, and performance monitoring mechanisms• Establish governance structures across portfolio, architecture, security, and service management domains• Develop transformation roadmaps and implementation plans to enable effective execution• Collaborate with cross-functional teams (e.g. Enterprise Architecture, Cloud, Cybersecurity, PMO) to ensure integrated solutions• Support stakeholder engagement with senior client leadership, contributing to business case development and strategic alignment
Required Qualifications• Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, Business, or a related discipline• Minimum 5+ years of experience in IT strategy, operating model design, or enterprise transformation programs• Proven experience delivering large-scale consulting or transformation engagements aligned to defined roadmaps• Strong understanding of IT domains including applications, infrastructure, cloud, data, cybersecurity, and PMO functions• Knowledge of governance and service management frameworks such as ITIL, COBIT, or ISO standards• Strong analytical and structured problem-solving skills, with the ability to translate business strategy into operating model designs• Excellent communication and presentation skills, with experience engaging senior stakeholders


Preferred Qualifications• Experience working with C-level stakeholders and leading client-facing engagements• Exposure to enterprise architecture frameworks such as TOGAF or ArchiMate• Familiarity with agile and scaled agile methodologies (e.g. SAFe, LeSS, ICAgile)• Experience supporting governance setup, transformation offices (PMO/TMO), or value realization frameworks• Proficiency in tools such as PowerPoint, Excel, and Visio to develop high-quality deliverables (e.g. org designs, capability maps, process flows)• Experience in cross-geography team collaboration and global delivery environments

We are a talent- and innovation-led company with approximately 791,000 people serving clients in more than 120 countries. Technology is at the core of change today, and we are one of the world’s leaders in helping drive that change, with strong ecosystem relationships. We combine our strength in technology and leadership in cloud, data and AI with unmatched industry experience, functional expertise and global delivery capability. Our broad range of services, solutions and assets across Strategy & Consulting, Technology, Operations, Industry X and Song, together with our culture of shared success and commitment to creating 360° value, enable us to help our clients reinvent and build trusted, lasting relationships. We measure our success by the 360° value we create for our clients, each other, our shareholders, partners and communities.Visit us at www.accenture.com

job_description: What You’ll Do•           Build and iterate AI/ML models to predict stock and crypto price movements•           Develop quantitative trading strategies using Python•           Analyse daily P&L — Perform daily P&L analysis, investigating profit and loss drivers and providing insights into performance variances•           Monitor market-moving news (macro events, policy changes, sentiment) and model its impact on markets•           Build web scrapers and data pipelines using AI tools•           Use and guide the team on AI tools (ChatGPT, Cursor, etc.)•           Develop and maintain long-term strategy modelsWhat We’re Looking For•           Strong Python skills — quantitative coding is a must•           Hands-on experience with AI/ML models•           Ability to use AI tools proficiently and guide others•           Interest in financial markets — stocks, crypto, macro•           Self-driven, fast learner, can pick up trading concepts independently            •           Able to build a web scraper using AI within 2 days (this will be tested)            •           Experience with data pipelines and market data handling is a plus
raw_html:
What You’ll Do

•           Build and iterate AI/ML models to predict stock and crypto price movements

•           Develop quantitative trading strategies using Python

•           Analyse daily P&L — Perform daily P&L analysis, investigating profit and loss drivers and providing insights into performance variances

•           Monitor market-moving news (macro events, policy changes, sentiment) and model its impact on markets

•           Build web scrapers and data pipelines using AI tools

•           Use and guide the team on AI tools (ChatGPT, Cursor, etc.)

•           Develop and maintain long-term strategy models

What We’re Looking For

•           Strong Python skills — quantitative coding is a must

•           Hands-on experience with AI/ML models

•           Ability to use AI tools proficiently and guide others

•           Interest in financial markets — stocks, crypto, macro

•           Self-driven, fast learner, can pick up trading concepts independently

            •           Able to build a web scraper using AI within 2 days (this will be tested)

            •           Experience with data pipelines and market data handling is a plus

raw_html:
Company Description

SEEK operates market-leading online employment marketplaces, including Jobstreet and Jobsdb in Asia. SEEK has been helping people live more fulfilling and productive working lives and helping organisations succeed for over 25 years.
Founded and headquartered in Melbourne, Australia, SEEK has grown into a multinational technology company with over 3,300 employees and is listed on the Australian Securities Exchange.
SEEK’s presence spans Australia, New Zealand, Hong Kong, Indonesia, Malaysia, the Philippines, Singapore and Thailand. Additionally, SEEK has minority investments in employment marketplaces in China, South Korea and Bangladesh.
SEEK develops and applies innovative data and technology tools to facilitate high-quality matching and improve reliability of marketplace information.
In 2021, 2022, 2023 and 2024, SEEK was recognised as one of Australia’s Top Ten Places to Work in Technology in the AFR BOSS Best Places to Work awards. SEEK was also named a 5-Star Employer of Choice by HRD Asia in 2024 and won four accolades at TalentCorp’s Life at Work Awards 2023 in Malaysia.

The Role

The primary purpose of this role, with an APAC focus, is to fully participate in the planning, delivery and support of HCM technology solutions across the P&C function. This is an important step in our transformation journey as we look to enhance our capabilities in this space, manage multiple stakeholders and collaborate effectively across the functions of Finance and Technology.

There are various technologies in P&C that are in scope for this role, where Workday HCM, being our primary system-of-record for all employees across APAC, will be a key focus area.

The HCM Systems Specialist – People & Culture is a highly collaborative role working with the various members in the People Technology & Insights team, the broader P&C, cross-functional teams as well as with third-party vendors. This role reports directly into the HCM Technology Senior Manager. You will be designing and implementing requirements in but not limited to Workday Core HCM, Absence, Compensation, Advanced Compensation and Performance modules. 

The Team

As our organisation grows globally with over 3000 staff, the team is pivotal in its purpose of enabling our people to work easily and effectively at scale.

The People Technology and Insights team is responsible for implementation, maintenance, reporting and the management of systems and applications across People and Culture at Seek.

Job Description
  • Understand and maintain the overall P&C technology eco-system in partnership with the Finance and Technology teams, as well as the various third-party vendors (including the Application Management Services provider)
  • Serve as a strong consultative partner with the P&C function and with business stakeholders, to continuously improve service delivery, including facilitation and requirements gathering while serving as a subject matter expert on Workday’s capabilities
  • Apply strong Workday functional design and configuration capabilities. Strong configuration capability in modules like Absence, Core HCM, Performance, Compensation and Advanced Compensation
  • Fully participate in all areas of prioritising, delivery, including the application of the continuous improvement framework to the existing business processes
  • Effective problem solving and managing defect resolutions, triaging and escalations – providing day-to-day support and administration of the system
  • Develop and lead policy/ process training, promote continuous learning and knowledge sharing within the team and stakeholders and assist in testing integrations and security features.
  • Identify opportunities to automate, standardise and simplify P&C processes using systems, workflows and AI
Qualifications
  • Experience of ideally 3+ years in configuring Workday to business requirements. Ideally experience in Absence, Core, Talent and Compensation is desired
  • Evaluation of new releases and functionality for optimisation opportunities, configure and implement business process changes in Workday
  • Strong attention to detail and planning capability, with ability to manage competing priorities, deadlines and coordinate with a variety of stakeholders
  • Ability to facilitate and gather business requirements, user needs and translate them into pragmatic digital solutions
  • Effective interpersonal and influencing skills, including demonstrated experience in relationship building and collaborating with stakeholders across geographies.
  • Exceptional written and verbal communication skills that can be adapted to range of business scenarios, with ability to communicate with impact.
  • Strong understanding of the end-to-end employee lifecycle processes

Other Qualifications, Skills and Experience

  • Apply design thinking and journey mapping as part of the overall solution with technology as a key enabler
  • Proactive self-starting approach with strong ownership
  • Strong problem solving, troubleshooting and analytical skills
  • Project Management experience, including Agile
  • Data Governance and Data Management frameworks
  • Experience using Trello, JIRA, Confluence, Miro and Slack

raw_html:
Business Executive

We are looking for a Business Executive to support our business development and sales strategy functions. The role involves preparing proposals, presentation decks, costings, tender tracking, market research, lead identification, and sales database management.

This is a non-client-facing role suited for someone analytical, organised, and strong in writing and research, with an interest in supporting business growth from behind the scenes.

Key Responsibilities

  • Proposals and Presentations — Prepare proposals, quotations, tender submissions, and presentation decks. Develop solution write-ups, service descriptions, and value propositions, ensuring all materials are professional and aligned with company branding.

  • Costing and Business Support — Assist in preparing costings for manpower, technology solutions, and other services. Support pricing calculations, margin analysis, and maintain costing templates with properly documented assumptions.

  • Research, Lead Identification, and Tender Tracking — Conduct market and competitor research, identify leads and upcoming opportunities, and monitor relevant platforms for tenders. Track submission deadlines, clarification dates, and award outcomes.

  • Database and Pipeline Management — Update and maintain the sales database, CRM, and pipeline records. Prepare regular pipeline updates, opportunity reports, and management summaries.

  • Sales Campaign and Strategy Support — Assist in planning targeted campaigns, preparing outreach materials, and supporting management in developing sales strategies and business positioning.

  • Internal Coordination — Liaise with operations, HR, finance, and technology teams to gather inputs for proposals and costings. Maintain organised records of all commercial and business development materials.

Requirements

  • Diploma or Degree in Business, Marketing, Mass Communication, Economics, Finance, or a related discipline.

  • 1 to 3 years of relevant experience in sales support, proposal writing, tender administration, or business analysis preferred.

  • Fresh graduates with proficient writing, research, and analytical skills are welcome to apply.

  • Experience in security, facilities management, manpower outsourcing, or B2B services is an advantage.

Skills

  • Proficient written, communication and proposal writing skills.

  • Good research, analytical, and organisational skills.

  • Comfortable with numbers, costing templates, and pricing assumptions.

  • Proficient in Microsoft Office particularly PowerPoint, Excel, and Word.

  • Detail-oriented and able to manage multiple deadlines independently.


Why This Role

  • Exposure to strategic business development and growth initiatives.

  • Develop expertise in market research, costing, and competitive analysis.

  • Opportunity to build strong business acumen and tender management skills

raw_html:
World Business Press Online (WBPO) is a full-service business support company providing outsourced marketing, administrative, and back-office solutions to international financial services companies. We work closely with leading brokerage and proprietary trading firms, helping them grow their global presence. We are currently looking for an experienced Financial Market Analyst & Content Specialist & Brand Ambassador to become the public face of one of our rapidly growing international brokerage brands (Forex).

This unique role combines financial market expertise, content creation, public speaking, and brand representation. If you are passionate about financial markets, enjoy educating others, and thrive in front of both cameras and live audiences, this opportunity is for you.


Key Responsibilities


Financial Market Analysis

  •  Conduct in-depth research and analysis of global financial markets, including:

·   Forex (FX)

·   Commodities

·   Equities (Stocks)

·   Macroeconomic developments

·   Trading trends and market sentiment

  • Produce insightful market commentary, forecasts, and educational content.

  • Write high-quality articles, research reports, and financial publications for company websites and partner media.

  • Contribute expert opinions and market insights across digital channels.



Content Creation & Thought Leadership

  • Create engaging educational and promotional content covering trading, investing, proprietary trading, and financial markets.

  • Record videos for YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, Facebook, and other social media platforms.

  • Participate in webinars, podcasts, interviews, and educational campaigns.

  • Collaborate with the marketing team to develop creative content strategies and brand campaigns.

  • Stay up to date with industry developments and emerging trends in financial markets and digital media.


Brand Representation

  • Act as the official market commentator and public representative of the company.

  • Represent the brand at international conferences, expos, networking events, and industry exhibitions.

  • Participate in panel discussions, deliver keynote presentations, take part in interviews, and appear in the media.

  • Build both your personal professional profile and the company’s global brand awareness.

  • Engage with the trading community both online and offline.

Examples of international events include:

·         iFX Expo Cyprus

·         iFX Expo Dubai

·         Forex Traders Summit Dubai

·         Traders Fair (multiple locations across Asia)

·         Other leading global fintech and trading conferences



Requirements


  • Strong understanding of global financial markets, particularly Forex, commodities, equities, and macroeconomics.

  • Ability to conduct independent market research and produce professional market analysis.

  • Excellent written and spoken English.

  • Outstanding communication and presentation skills.

  • Confident public speaker with the ability to engage both live and online audiences.

  • Comfortable appearing on camera and creating video content.

  • Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Economics, Business Administration, Investment Management, Marketing, Accounting, or a related field.

  • Previous experience in brokerage, proprietary trading, financial journalism, market analysis, fintech, investment research, or financial content creation is highly desirable.

  • Willingness to travel internationally for conferences and exhibitions.


Nice to Have


  • Active social media presence or established online community.

  • Experience in fintech, proprietary trading, cryptocurrency, or financial media.

  • Experience hosting webinars, moderating panels, podcasts, or public speaking.

  • Knowledge of digital marketing, personal branding, and content creation.

  • Basic video production or social media content editing skills.


What We Offer


  • A unique opportunity to become the public face of an internationally growing brokerage brand.

  • International exposure through leading financial conferences and industry events.

  • Career growth within a diversified international investment group.

  • Modern office facilities in a prestigious city-centre business location.

  • Complimentary refreshments and employee amenities.

  • Professional development and continuous learning opportunities.

  • A creative, dynamic, and fast-paced working environment.

  • The opportunity to build your own professional brand alongside the company’s global expansion.

  • Competitive salary with performance-based bonuses.

  • International travel opportunities across Europe, the Middle East, and Asia.



How to Apply


If you are passionate about financial markets, enjoy sharing your expertise, and are excited to represent a growing international financial brand, we would love to hear from you.

Please submit:

  1. Your CV

  2. Your expected salary

  3. (Optional.) Samples of financial articles, market analysis, research reports, published content, videos, podcasts, webinars, or links to your social media profiles showcasing your work.

job_description: DUTIES AND RESPONSIBILITIES:  Partner with the local & global team to build consumer focused assortments for Singapore & Malaysia and develop annual strategic brand management plans & activities for assigned brand / category in the market. Ensure products and product lines fall under their respective consumer profile in the region.Work closely with cross-functional teams to manage product offerings, pricing, promotions, forecasting and inventory to achieve sales and market share KPI’s/targetWork with channel teams to communicate quarterly to annual GTM plans Execute jewelry category plans including customer channels, product, fixtures, VM, training, marketing and launch activitiesRecommendations on operating plans, promotion mechanics and changes in market trendsFacilitate door approvals to ensure compliance with global approval guidelinesMonitor & identify market trends & competitors in the marketplaceManaging newness buys provided by Global brand team – watches, leather & jewelryAny other add hoc tasks as assignedRequirements:Minimum Diploma / Degree holder or equivalentMinimum 3 years of related working experience (preferably within the retail industry)Proficiency in MS Office application with Advanced Excel skills is a MUST.Fluent in English, being multilingual would be an added advantage.Experience with Navision and SAP will be an added advantage.Good ability to executive to timelines, standards, meticulous with an eye for details.
raw_html:
DUTIES AND RESPONSIBILITIES:  

  • Partner with the local & global team to build consumer focused assortments for Singapore & Malaysia and develop annual strategic brand management plans & activities for assigned brand / category in the market. Ensure products and product lines fall under their respective consumer profile in the region.

  • Work closely with cross-functional teams to manage product offerings, pricing, promotions, forecasting and inventory to achieve sales and market share KPI’s/target

  • Work with channel teams to communicate quarterly to annual GTM plans 

  • Execute jewelry category plans including customer channels, product, fixtures, VM, training, marketing and launch activities

  • Recommendations on operating plans, promotion mechanics and changes in market trends

  • Facilitate door approvals to ensure compliance with global approval guidelines

  • Monitor & identify market trends & competitors in the marketplace

  • Managing newness buys provided by Global brand team – watches, leather & jewelry

  • Any other add hoc tasks as assigned


Requirements:

  • Minimum Diploma / Degree holder or equivalent

  • Minimum 3 years of related working experience (preferably within the retail industry)

  • Proficiency in MS Office application with Advanced Excel skills is a MUST.

  • Fluent in English, being multilingual would be an added advantage.

  • Experience with Navision and SAP will be an added advantage.

  • Good ability to executive to timelines, standards, meticulous with an eye for details.

raw_html:
About the role: 

  • Maintain and update lease records, including amendments, expirations, terminations, and property transactions.

  • Extract and input critical lease data into the client’s database, ensuring accuracy and compliance with standards.

  • Conduct quality reviews of lease abstractions, resolving discrepancies and ensuring data integrity.

  • Track critical lease dates and generate scheduled and ad hoc reports as per client requirements.

  • Lead lease administration meetings and support reporting tool enhancements.

  • Ensure accurate formatting and timely delivery of reports and database updates.

  • Process rent payments, track receivables/payables, and reconcile financial records.

  • Investigate and resolve lease-related payment issues and discrepancies.

  • Review Estoppel Certificates and SNDA Agreements, coordinating legal reviews for timely submission.

  • Conduct financial reconciliations, audit lease expenses, and ensure compliance with accounting standards.


About you: 

  • Bachelor's degree required.

  • 2-3 years of experience in the real estate industry with a strong understanding of commercial lease terms.

  • Proficient in Microsoft applications, particularly Excel for data entry and management.

  • Skilled in data entry and database management.

  • Strong interpersonal and relationship management skills.

  • Possesses analytical thinking and financial acumen.

  • Capable of solving complex problems and navigating various options in challenging situations.


Why join Cushman & Wakefield?

As one of the leading global real estate services firms transforming the way people work, shop and live working at Cushman & Wakefield means you will benefit from;

  • Being part of a growing global company;

  • Career development and a promote from within culture;

  • An organisation committed to Diversity and Inclusion

  • We're committed to providing work-life balance for our people in an inclusive, rewarding environment.


We achieve this by providing a flexible and agile work environment by focusing on technology and autonomy to help our people achieve their career ambitions. We focus on career progression and foster a promotion from within culture, leveraging global opportunities to ensure we retain our top talent. We encourage continuous learning and development opportunities to develop personal, professional and technical capabilities, and we reward with a comprehensive employee benefits program.


We have a vision of the future, where people simply belong.

That's why we support and celebrate inclusive causes, not just on days of recognition throughout the year, but every day. We embrace diversity across race, colour, religion, gender, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity or persons with disabilities or protected veteran status. We ensure DEI is part of our DNA as a global community - it means we go way beyond than just talking about it - we live it. If you want to live it too, join us.

raw_html:
Our client is seeking an Associate SAS Programmer (Junior) to join their team!

Are you passionate about data analysis and programming? This role is a perfect fit for someone who is eager to kickstart their career in the Science & Technology field, specifically in Mathematics, Statistics & Information Sciences. With this role, you will have the opportunity to work with cutting-edge technology, collaborate with a dynamic team, and contribute to meaningful projects.


About Our Client

Our client is a local financial consultancy firm based in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, providing top-notch audit and tax services to clients.


What you'll be doing?

  • Follow protocols: Adhere to clinical trial protocols, CRF, SDTM specification, and CDISC guidelines to convert raw data to SDTM, validate SDTM datasets, maintain SAS programs, package deliverables, and document SDTM/Raw Data related issues.

  • Develop and define: Create SDTM data specs, define CRF annotation, etc.

  • Perform data comparison: Use SAS to perform data comparison for different data transfer batches and identify relevant changes if necessary.

  • Manual data check: Conduct manual data checks on SDTM datasets to ensure the successful conversion of raw datasets without mistakes.

  • Correct deviations: Use Pinnacle 21 and other tools to correct deviations.

  • Develop patient profile: Develop patient profile and perform rerun.

  • Work independently and in a team: Work independently, as well as being a team member working with other statistical analysts and statisticians.

  • Perform additional duties: Perform other duties as directed by management or senior personnel.


Who are they looking for?

  • Educational Background: Bachelor's degree in Statistics, Biostatistics, Computer Science, Information Technology, Data Science, Mathematics, Pharmacy, Life Sciences, Biomedical Science, or related field

  • Language Proficiency: Fluency in Mandarin (Chinese) and English, both written and spoken, as you'll be collaborating with international teams and working with global clinical data

  • Relocation Flexibility: Willingness to relocate to Guangzhou, China for 6 months of comprehensive on-the-job training to build your expertise

  • Technical Skills: Experience with R and/or Python for statistical analysis is valued but not essential as training will be provided

  • Industry Experience: Prior experience with clinical data programming, SDTM/CDISC standards, or Pinnacle 21 tools is advantageous, though candidates with no prior experience are welcomed to apply

  • Research Exposure: Internship experience in clinical research or pharmaceutical data is beneficial but not required


Why should you consider this opportunity?

Our client offers an attractive remuneration package and other benefits, such as:

  • Competitive salary

  • Opportunities for career growth and development

  • A dynamic and inclusive work environment

  • EPF, SOCSO (statutory)

  • Working Schedule: Mon-Fri 9:00AM - 6:00PM


How to apply

Ready to join this role? Click Apply now to submit your resume and share your availability and expected salary with us!

We welcome all applicants, regardless of their background or experience.

All information received will be kept strictly confidential and will be used only for employment-related purposes.

Know someone who'd be perfect for this role? Share this role with them! (Click this link to share referral details via Email)

#SmartHire

raw_html:
Product Manager – Growth and AI

Company Overview:

PhillipCapital is an integrated Asian financial house with a global presence. Today, we operate in the financial hubs of 15 countries globally. Through our platforms, we are dedicated to providing a seamless experience blending technology with personalized human touch to empower our users worldwide to achieve their financial goals.

Position Overview:

We’re seeking a strategic and results-driven Product Manager to lead initiatives focused on client acquisition and AI-enhanced user experiences in our global mobile trading platform. This role is pivotal in driving growth by enhancing user onboarding, conversion, and engagement across our digital platforms. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams—including marketing, engineering, design, and data analytics—to deliver impactful features that attract, convert, and retain users.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Define and execute the product roadmap for our global trading platform in the area of client acquisition, marketing funnel optimization, and AI features.

  • Conduct competitive analysis and market research to identify trends and best practices in digital acquisition and AI-driven product innovation.

  • Identify and address friction points in the user acquisition journey to improve conversion rates and reduce drop-offs.

  • Prioritize and manage a backlog of features, enhancements, and optimizations to increase user engagement and retention.

  • Lead cross-functional teams through the product development lifecycle, from ideation to launch, ensuring timely and high-quality deliverables.

  • Work closely with engineering to understand technical requirements and overcome potential roadblocks.

  • Collaborate with design and UX teams to craft a compelling, user-friendly interface and smooth navigation flow.

  • Monitor key product metrics, analyze user feedback, and use data to inform decision-making and prioritize features.

  • Conduct regular product demos and communicate updates to internal stakeholders, including executive leadership.

  • Stay up-to-date on the latest trends and best practices in mobile trading, fintech, and product management.


Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Business, Computer Science, Finance, or a related field

  • 3+ years of experience as a Product Manager. Must have experience having launched features on mobile native apps.

  • Proven experience working on trading or investment platforms is highly preferred.

  • Familiarity with MarTech tools such as MoEngage, Marketo, Appsflyer.

  • Proven track record of improving acquisition metrics through product-led initiatives.

  • Strong analytical skills and experience with A/B testing, funnel analysis, or user segmentation.

  • Familiarity with GPT or other generative AI technologies and their application in product features.

  • Strong understanding of mobile development processes and mobile UX best practices. Good aptitude for understanding technical concepts and managing technical complexity is preferred.

  • Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills, with the ability to align teams around product goals and roadmap as well as the ability to convey complex ideas to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.

  • Familiarity with product management and analytics tools (e.g., JIRA, Roadmunk, Google Analytics, Tableau).

  • Fast learner, diligent and open to learning new things and accumulate domain knowledge over time.

  • Passion for fintech but also on building delightful customer-facing products and experiences

  • Ability to adapt quickly in a fast-paced, agile environment.

raw_html:
Business Reporting Analyst – Korean Language Support (6-Month Contract)

We are supporting a leading global manufacturing company in the search for a Business Reporting Analyst to join its regional Shared Services Centre in Kuala Lumpur. The successful candidate will partner with finance teams across South Korea and the wider APAC region to support financial reporting, month-end close activities and compliance requirements.

 

Key Responsibilities

  • Prepare and maintain management reports, dashboards and KPI reporting

  • Analyse business performance and operational trends

  • Support monthly reporting cycles and executive reporting requirements

  • Validate and reconcile data from multiple systems and sources

  • Develop reporting improvements and automation opportunities

  • Collaborate with business stakeholders to understand reporting requirements

  • Support ad hoc analysis and decision-making initiatives

  • Ensure reporting accuracy, consistency and governance standards

 

Requirements

  • 2+ years of experience within Business Reporting, Data Analytics, FP&A or Management Reporting

  • Advanced Microsoft Excel skills

  • Experience with Power BI, Tableau or other BI/reporting tools preferred

  • Experience working with large datasets and reporting environments

  • Korean language proficiency required to support Korean-speaking stakeholders

  • Strong analytical, communication and stakeholder management skills

WHAT WE DO

As a next-generation human capital firm, we connect the best talent in the market to execute transformation and high-value projects for our global clients—solving problems in the areas of Business Transformation, Governance, Risk and Compliance, and Technology and Digital Innovation.

Our unique consulting model allows you the radical flexibility and control you demand in the “Now of Work,” enabling you to define your career path based on your expertise, passion, desire to travel, work environment and life stage. At RGP, diversity, equity and inclusion are critical underpinnings of our shared values. We recognize diversity as a strength that is cultivated through our culture, our people, and our business.

EQUAL OPPORTUNITY EMPLOYER: RGP is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer and is deeply invested in the success of our clients, 3rd parties and our colleagues.

Direct applications only, no agencies will be accepted. Please note that due to the high volume of applications, only successful applicants will be contacted.

raw_html:
Job Purpose:

To develop and execute effective digital marketing strategies across multiple platforms, ensuring campaigns meet client objectives, are delivered on time and within budget, and achieve measurable business results through data-driven insights and cross-functional collaboration.


Essential Duties & Responsibilities:

  • Design and implement data-driven digital marketing strategies tailored to the automotive industry

  • Utilize data science techniques to analyze market trends, consumer behavior, and campaign performance

  • Develop predictive models to guide strategic decisions and optimize marketing efforts

  • Collaborate with department teams to ensure data-driven insights inform planning, content and design decisions

  • Oversee digital campaigns across all platforms, ensuring consistency, effectiveness, and ROI

  • Assist to ensure seamless integration of digital tools and technologies

  • Analyze large datasets to provide actionable insights and recommendations

  • Stay updated and conduct internal and external presentations on the latest digital marketing, data science, and automotive industry trends

  • IT system (Software. etc. set of team microsoft) internal set up for company in collaboration with HR team for more efficient and seamless operations


Education & Experience

  • Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Business Administration, Data Science, Computer Science, or a related field

  • Minimum 8 years of relevant professional experience in Digital Strategy or a related field

  • Strong understanding of Digital Strategy and Data Analytics


Core Skills

  • Strong strategic thinking and analytical skills

  • Proficiency in digital marketing, analytics, CRM and AI platforms

  • Ability to interpret complex data and translate insights into business strategies

  • Excellent project, stakeholder and client management skills

  • Strong presentation, communication and influencing skills


Additional Competencies

  • Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously while performing effectively under pressure

  • Excellent organizational and time management skills with strong attention to detail

  • Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications, particularly Excel, PowerPoint, Word, and Outlook


Preferred

  • Experience in the automotive industry is an advantage

raw_html:
Please apply until June 30, 2026

Role: Internship (4 to 6 Months)

Location: Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia


JTI Talent Internship – Strategic Insights Track


Unlock the power of data with the JTI Talent Internship – Strategic Insights Track at JT International Trading Sdn. Bhd. (JTI Malaysia), an award-winning Top Employer known for its exceptional culture, strong career growth, and global environment. Based in a dynamic and highly regulated corporate setting, you will gain meaningful exposure as part of a high-performing team.



This internship is a hands-on experience where you will work with real data to support business decisions. Your contributions will help translate data into actionable insights that drive commercial performance.


As a JTI Talent Intern in Strategic Insights, you will:


  • Support data consolidation and performance reporting for business tracking

  • Assist in transforming data into clear insights and presentations for internal stakeholders

  • Contribute to market analysis, competitor tracking, and category understanding

  • Support consumer research activities and insight generation

  • Develop skills in data storytelling, analysis, and reporting


Requirements:


  • Candidate with full working rights for Malaysia who is currently pursuing a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree at a recognised university or college

  • Available to commit to the internship for at least 4 months (16 weeks)

  • Studying Business Management, Marketing, Economics, Mathematics/Statistics, Data Science, or any quantitative or research-related fields.

  • Strong analytical and data interpretation skills, with the ability to identify patterns and translate findings into insights

  • Comfortable working with data, spreadsheets, and performance metrics; competent in Excel (pivot tables, formulas, charts) and PowerPoint

  • Communicates effectively in English; proficiency in Bahasa Melayu and/or Mandarin, and prior experience in data analysis or research is an advantage. We are seeking candidates proficient in Mandarin to effectively communicate with Mandarin-speaking clients.


What's in it for you?


You’ll gain hands-on experience working with real business data and learn how insights shape strategic decisions. Guided by experienced professionals, this internship builds the confidence and capability you need to step into your future career.

raw_html:
About the role

Verinon Technology Solutions Sdn Bhd is seeking an experienced Senior Oracle DBA / Database Administrator to join our dynamic Information & Communication Technology team. This is a contract position based in Kuala Lumpur. As a Senior Oracle DBA, you will play a critical role in managing, maintaining, and optimising our Oracle database infrastructure. This position is pivotal to ensuring the reliability, performance, and security of our database systems, which are fundamental to our business operations and strategic objectives.

Key responsibilities

  1. Design, implement, and maintain Oracle database environments across development, testing, and production systems

  2. Monitor database performance and conduct regular health checks to identify and resolve bottlenecks and inefficiencies

  3. Perform database backup, recovery, and disaster recovery procedures to ensure business continuity and data protection

  4. Execute database administration tasks including user management, security configuration, and access control implementation

  5. Manage database patches, upgrades, and updates whilst minimising downtime

  6. Optimise SQL queries and provide performance tuning recommendations to application development teams

  7. Establish and maintain database documentation, procedures, and best practices

  8. Collaborate with system administrators, application developers, and IT teams to support database-related infrastructure needs

  9. Provide technical support and troubleshoot complex database issues in a timely manner

  10. Implement security measures and compliance requirements for database environments


What we're looking for:

 Minimum 5 years of Database Administration on MidRange/Wintel Databases. Knowledge on Mainframe Databases will be advantageous.

 Bachelor’s Degree in any discipline - Minimum of 5 years relevant experience in IT.

 Diploma in IT - Minimum of 7 years relevant experience in IT.

 Professional DBMS certification is advantageous.

Competencies

 Good knowledge on Oracle Database Administration Installation, upgrade, patches

 Database performance tuning.

 Backup & Recovery.

 Automation of monitoring & alerts generation.

 Experience on Disaster Recovery.

 Knowledge on Cluster setup such as Oracle RAC, HACMP, Veritas Cluster and Windows cluster.

 Knowledge on DB replication such as Dataguard, Goldengate & Disks Replication.

 DBMS installation & Upgrades.

 Standard enforcements.

 Capacity Management & Planning.

What we offer

Verinon Technology Solutions Sdn Bhd is committed to providing a rewarding work environment with competitive benefits and opportunities for professional growth. We offer flexible working arrangements tailored to the needs of this contract role, allowing you to balance your professional responsibilities with personal priorities. Our comprehensive benefits package includes access to professional development programmes, industry training opportunities, and certification support to help you advance your career in database administration. We foster a collaborative culture that values innovation, continuous learning, and technical excellence. Our team benefits from working with cutting-edge technologies and challenging projects that enhance expertise and career prospects.

About us

Verinon Technology Solutions Sdn Bhd is a leading provider of innovative information and communication technology solutions, specialising in database development and administration services. We are committed to delivering high-quality, reliable technology services that drive business success for our clients. Our team comprises skilled professionals dedicated to implementing robust, secure, and scalable database solutions. We pride ourselves on our technical expertise, customer-focused approach, and commitment to staying at the forefront of industry developments. At Verinon Technology Solutions, we create an environment where technical talent can thrive and make meaningful contributions to our clients' digital transformation journeys.

Apply now

If you are a highly skilled Senior Oracle DBA with a passion for database excellence and are looking for a challenging contract opportunity, we would like to hear from you. Please submit your CV, a cover letter outlining your relevant experience, and any relevant certifications to our recruitment team. Join Verinon Technology Solutions Sdn Bhd and contribute your expertise to our growing organisation.

raw_html:
Job Requirements:

  • Bachelor's Degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field;

  • Professional qualification (ACCA / CPA Australia / CIMA / MIA) is preferred;

  • Minimum 3 years of experience in FP&A, corporate finance, management accounting, financial analysis, or a related finance roles, preferably in a corporate or consulting environment;

  • Solid knowledge of Malaysian financial regulations, tax laws, and accounting standards. / accounting principles, statutory laws and regulations;

  • Proficient in accounting software (e.g., SQL, AutoCount, Bukku or similar) and Microsoft Excel;

  • Strong analytical, problem-solving skills with high attention to detail, and ability to meet tight deadlines;

  • Good communication and presentation skills, with the ability to interact with stakeholders across different functions.

  • Able to work independently, manage multiple priorities, and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.

  • Strong business acumen and ability to interpret financial data into actionable insights;

  • Proficient in English; ability to speak Mandarin is an advantage for liaison with Mandarin-speaking stakeholders.


Job Responsibilities:

  • Prepare and maintain annual budgets, forecasts, and financial models to support business planning and decision-making;

  • Prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual management reports, including financial performance analysis and commentary;

  • Conduct variance analysis against budgets, forecasts, and prior periods, and provide insights on key business drivers;

  • Monitor and analyze financial and operational KPIs to support performance management and continuous improvement initiatives;

  • Partner with department heads and business units on budget planning, forecasting, and scenario analysis;

  • Analyze profitability, cost structures, and operational efficiency, and identify opportunities for cost optimization and business improvement;

  • Evaluate the financial impact, return on investment (ROI), and risks of business initiatives, projects, and capital expenditures;

  • Provide actionable financial insights and recommendations to support management decision-making;

  • Conduct market, industry, and competitor analysis to support business growth and strategic planning;

  • Ensure the accuracy and integrity of financial data used for reporting and analysis;

  • Support the enhancement of financial reporting processes, dashboards, and analytical tools to improve reporting efficiency;

  • Liaise with internal and external auditors, where required, and support compliance with applicable financial reporting standards;

  • Undertake ad hoc financial analysis, projects, and other finance-related assignments as required by management;

raw_html:
About the role

Alliance Bank Malaysia Berhad is seeking a Manager, MFRS 9 Systems & Support to join our Group Finance division. This is a full-time position based in Kuala Lumpur City Centre, Kuala Lumpur.

Key responsibilities

  1. Manage and maintain MFRS 9 systems infrastructure, ensuring optimal performance, reliability and security across all platforms and applications

  2. Provide expert technical and functional support to end-users, stakeholders and business units utilising MFRS 9 systems

  3. Develop and document MFRS 9 system processes, procedures and best practices to ensure consistency and compliance

  4. Lead the design, testing and implementation of system enhancements and updates to meet evolving business and regulatory requirements

  5. Monitor system performance, identify issues and implement solutions to minimise downtime and improve efficiency

  6. Collaborate with finance, risk and IT teams to ensure seamless integration of MFRS 9 systems with other banking platforms and data sources

  7. Prepare and deliver training to users on MFRS 9 system functionality, features and updates

  8. Conduct regular audits and quality assurance checks on MFRS 9 data and reporting outputs

  9. Support regulatory reporting requirements and external audit processes related to MFRS 9 compliance

  10. Lead a team of analysts and support staff, providing coaching, mentoring and performance management


What we're looking for

  • Good proficiency in MS SQL and data handling.

  • Good analytical, problem-solving, and critical thinking abilities.

  • Minimum 5 years of relevant experience in accounting, financial planning & analysis (FP&A), MIS, or external audit, preferably within the banking or financial services industry.

Apply now
If you meet the above criteria and are ready to make a significant impact on our MFRS 9 systems and support operations, we would like to hear from you. Please submit your CV outlining your relevant experience and interest in this role.
